   699	        // Pre-gameover: acquire RNG, drain, then unlock
   700	        if (rngWordByDay[day] == 0) {
   701	            uint256 rngWord = _gameOverEntropy(
   702	                uint48(block.timestamp),
   703	                day,
   704	                lvl,
   705	                lastPurchaseDay
   706	            );
   707	            if (rngWord == 1 || rngWord == 0) return (true, STAGE_GAMEOVER);
   708	        }
   709	
   710	        // Best-effort drain of queued tickets so every purchased ticket is
   711	        // eligible for the terminal jackpot trait-bucket share. Both ticket
   712	        // slots drain ONE batch per tx (mirroring the normal daily ticket
   713	        // drain): after any batch does work the path breaks with
   714	        // STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING, so a finishing batch never composes with a
   715	        // second ticket batch -- or with handleGameOverDrain's terminal
   716	        // jackpot -- inside one transaction. That composition would push a
   717	        // single advanceGame tx past the EIP-7825 per-tx gas ceiling and
   718	        // permanently brick the game-over heartbeat. handleGameOverDrain runs
   719	        // only in its OWN tx, entered with ticketsFullyProcessed already set.
   720	        //
   721	        // FUND-RELEASE FALLBACK: a catastrophic delegatecall revert (e.g., an
   722	        // unforeseen error in ticket processing) is swallowed so game-over
   723	        // continues straight to handleGameOverDrain -- undrained tickets forfeit
   724	        // trait-bucket eligibility, but terminal fund release is never blocked.
   725	        if (!ticketsFullyProcessed) {
   726	            (bool dOk, bytes memory dData) = ContractAddresses
   727	                .GAME_MINT_MODULE
   728	                .delegatecall(
   729	                    abi.encodeWithSelector(
   730	                        IDegenerusGameMintModule.processTicketBatch.selector,
   731	                        lvl + 1
   732	                    )
   733	                );
   734	            if (dOk && dData.length >= 64) {
   735	                (bool finished, ) = abi.decode(dData, (bool, bool));
   736	                if (!finished) {
   737	                    // Read slot has more entries -- retry next tx.
   738	                    return (true, STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING);
   739	                }
   740	                // Read slot drained: swap the write slot into the read position
   741	                // (safe because the read queue is now empty) so its tickets
   742	                // drain on the next tx. When the swapped-in slot is already
   743	                // empty, both slots are drained -- mark fully processed. Either
   744	                // way break, so the terminal jackpot runs in its own tx.
   745	                _swapTicketSlot();
   746	                if (ticketQueue[_tqReadKey(lvl + 1)].length == 0) {
   747	                    ticketsFullyProcessed = true;
   748	                }
   749	                return (true, STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING);
   750	            }
   751	            // dOk=false -> swallow, fall through to handleGameOverDrain.
   752	        }
   753	
   754	        (ok, data) = ContractAddresses.GAME_GAMEOVER_MODULE.delegatecall(
   755	            abi.encodeWithSelector(
   756	                IDegenerusGameGameOverModule.handleGameOverDrain.selector,
   757	                day
   758	            )
   759	        );
   760	        if (!ok) _revertDelegate(data);
   761	        _unlockRng(day);
   762	        return (true, STAGE_GAMEOVER);
   763	    }
   764	
   765	    /*+======================================================================+
   766	      |                           LEVEL END                                 |
   767	      +======================================================================+*/
   768	    function _endPhase(uint24 lvl) private {
   769	        phaseTransitionActive = true;
   770	        if (lvl % 100 == 0) {
   771	            levelPrizePool[lvl] = _getFuturePrizePool() / 3;
   772	        }
   773	        jackpotCounter = 0;
   774	        compressedJackpotFlag = 0;
   775	    }
   776	
   777	    /*+================================================================================================================+
   778	      |                    DELEGATE MODULE HELPERS                                                                     |
   779	      +================================================================================================================+
   780	      |  Internal functions that delegatecall into specialized modules.                                                |
   781	      |  All modules MUST inherit DegenerusGameStorage for slot alignment.                                             |
   782	      |                                                                                                                |
   783	      |  Modules:                                                                                                      |
   784	      |  • ContractAddresses.GAME_DECIMATOR_MODULE - Decimator claim credits and lootbox payouts                       |
   785	      |  • ContractAddresses.GAME_MINT_MODULE     - Mint data recording, airdrop multipliers                           |
   786	      |  • ContractAddresses.GAME_WHALE_MODULE    - Whale pass purchases and whale pass claims                       |
   787	      |  • ContractAddresses.GAME_JACKPOT_MODULE  - Jackpot calculations and payouts                                   |
   788	      |                                                                                                                |
   789	      |  SECURITY: delegatecall executes module code in this contract's                                                |
   790	      |  context, with access to all storage. Modules are constant.                                                    |
   791	      +================================================================================================================+*/
   792	
   793	    /// @dev Reward the top affiliate for a level and segregate per-level DGNRS allocation.
   794	    ///      After the 1% top-affiliate draw, snapshots 5% of the remaining affiliate
   795	    ///      pool into the allocation half of levelDgnrsPacked[lvl]. Affiliate scores
   796	    ///      always route to level + 1 during gameplay, so at transition time (when level
   797	    ///      becomes lvl), all scores at index lvl are frozen — new scores go to lvl + 1.
   798	    ///      Claims read the allocation half of levelDgnrsPacked[currLevel] directly.
   799	    ///      Unclaimed tokens are never physically moved — they remain in the pool
   800	    ///      and naturally roll into the next level's snapshot.
   801	    function _rewardTopAffiliate(uint24 lvl) private {
   802	        (address top, ) = affiliate.affiliateTop(lvl);
   803	
   804	        uint256 poolBalance = dgnrs.poolBalance(
   805	            IsDGNRS.Pool.Affiliate
   806	        );
   807	        if (top != address(0)) {
   808	            uint256 dgnrsReward = (poolBalance * AFFILIATE_POOL_REWARD_BPS) /
   809	                10_000;
   810	            uint256 paid = dgnrs.transferFromPool(
   811	                IsDGNRS.Pool.Affiliate,
   812	                top,
   813	                dgnrsReward
   814	            );
   815	            emit AffiliateDgnrsReward(top, lvl, paid);
   816	            // transferFromPool returns the exact pool decrement (clamped to the
   817	            // available balance, zero on the empty-pool path), so the remaining
   818	            // pool is derivable without a second external read.
   819	            poolBalance -= paid;
   820	        }
   821	
   822	        // Segregate 5% of remaining affiliate pool for per-affiliate claims.
   823	        // Scores at index lvl are frozen (new scores go to lvl + 1).
   824	        _setLevelDgnrsAllocation(
   825	            lvl,
   826	            (poolBalance * AFFILIATE_DGNRS_LEVEL_BPS) / 10_000
   827	        );
   828	    }
   829	
   830	    /// @dev Distribute yield surplus via JackpotModule delegatecall.
   831	    ///      Runs while frozen, before pool consolidation. The obligations sum
   832	    ///      includes both live pools and the pending buffer, so freeze-window
   833	    ///      revenue (which routes to pending) is never misread as yield surplus.
   834	    function _distributeYieldSurplus(uint256 rngWord) private {
   835	        (bool ok, bytes memory data) = ContractAddresses
  1635	        // Non-blocking: if stETH contract fails, game continues normally.
  1636	        _autoStakeExcessEth();
  1637	    }
  1638	
  1639	    /// @dev Stake all ETH above claimablePool into stETH via Lido.
  1640	    ///      Uses try/catch so stETH is never a hard dependency — game
  1641	    ///      continues even if Lido is paused or the call reverts.
  1642	    function _autoStakeExcessEth() private {
  1643	        uint256 ethBal = address(this).balance;
  1644	        uint256 reserve = claimablePool;
  1645	        if (ethBal <= reserve) return;
  1646	        uint256 stakeable = ethBal - reserve;
  1647	        try steth.submit{value: stakeable}(address(0)) returns (
  1648	            uint256
  1649	        ) {} catch {
  1650	            emit StEthStakeFailed(stakeable);
  1651	        }
  1652	    }
  1653	
  1654	    /// @dev Request new VRF random word from Chainlink.
  1655	    ///      Sets RNG lock to prevent manipulation during pending window.
  1656	    /// @param isTicketJackpotDay True if this is the last purchase day.
  1657	    /// @param lvl Current level.
  1658	    function _requestRng(bool isTicketJackpotDay, uint24 lvl) private {
  1659	        // Hard revert if Chainlink request fails; this intentionally halts game progress until VRF funding/config is fixed.
  1660	        _finalizeRngRequest(
  1661	            isTicketJackpotDay,
  1662	            lvl,
  1663	            _requestVrfWord(VRF_REQUEST_CONFIRMATIONS)
  1664	        );
  1665	    }
  1666	
  1667	    function _tryRequestRng(
  1668	        bool isTicketJackpotDay,
  1669	        uint24 lvl
  1670	    ) private returns (bool requested) {
  1671	        try
  1672	            vrfCoordinator.requestRandomWords(
  1673	                VRFRandomWordsRequest({
  1674	                    keyHash: vrfKeyHash,
  1675	                    subId: vrfSubscriptionId,
  1676	                    requestConfirmations: VRF_REQUEST_CONFIRMATIONS,
  1677	                    callbackGasLimit: VRF_CALLBACK_GAS_LIMIT,
  1678	                    numWords: 1,
  1679	                    extraArgs: hex"" // Empty for LINK payment (default)
  1680	                })
  1681	            )
  1682	        returns (uint256 id) {
  1683	            _finalizeRngRequest(isTicketJackpotDay, lvl, id);
  1684	            requested = true;
  1685	        } catch {}
  1686	    }
  1687	
  1688	    /// @dev Submit a single-word VRF request on the current coordinator.
  1689	    /// @param confirmations Block confirmations for this request's gas lane.
  1690	    /// @return id The Chainlink request ID.
  1691	    function _requestVrfWord(uint16 confirmations) private returns (uint256 id) {
  1692	        id = vrfCoordinator.requestRandomWords(
  1693	            VRFRandomWordsRequest({
  1694	                keyHash: vrfKeyHash,
  1695	                subId: vrfSubscriptionId,
  1696	                requestConfirmations: confirmations,
  1697	                callbackGasLimit: VRF_CALLBACK_GAS_LIMIT,
  1698	                numWords: 1,
  1699	                extraArgs: hex""
  1700	            })
  1701	        );
  1702	    }
  1703	
  1704	    /// @dev Write the VRF coordinator, subscription, and key hash together.
  1705	    /// @param coord VRF coordinator address.
  1706	    /// @param sub VRF subscription ID for LINK billing.
  1707	    /// @param key VRF key hash for gas lane selection.
  1708	    function _setVrfConfig(address coord, uint256 sub, bytes32 key) internal {
  1709	        vrfCoordinator = IVRFCoordinator(coord);
  1710	        vrfSubscriptionId = sub;
  1711	        vrfKeyHash = key;
  1712	    }
  1713	
  1714	    /// @dev Advance the lootbox RNG index and zero both pending accumulators in a
  1715	    ///      single read-modify-write of the packed slot: new purchases target the
  1716	    ///      NEXT RNG index and the pending ETH/FLIP totals restart at zero.
  1717	    function _lrAdvanceIndexClearPending() private {
  1718	        uint256 packed = lootboxRngPacked;
  1719	        uint256 nextIndex = ((packed >> LR_INDEX_SHIFT) & LR_INDEX_MASK) + 1;
  1720	        packed &= ~((LR_INDEX_MASK << LR_INDEX_SHIFT) |
  1721	            (LR_PENDING_ETH_MASK << LR_PENDING_ETH_SHIFT) |
  1722	            (LR_PENDING_FLIP_MASK << LR_PENDING_FLIP_SHIFT));
  1723	        lootboxRngPacked =
  1724	            packed |
  1725	            ((nextIndex & LR_INDEX_MASK) << LR_INDEX_SHIFT);
  1726	    }
  1727	
  1728	    // =========================================================================
  1729	    // Queue Swap and Prize Pool Freeze
  1730	    // =========================================================================
  1731	
  1732	    /// @dev Toggle the active ticket queue buffer and reset the read-slot drained flag.
  1733	    ///      Fail-open by design: every caller swaps only after the read slot is drained
  1734	    ///      (gated on ticketsFullyProcessed / a finished drain), so a non-empty read slot is
  1735	    ///      unreachable here. This runs inside the advance heartbeat, where a revert would
  1736	    ///      brick the game; in the impossible non-empty case the toggle merely defers those
  1737	    ///      entries one cycle (they stay queued, never lost) rather than reverting.
  1738	    function _swapTicketSlot() internal {
  1739	        ticketWriteSlot = !ticketWriteSlot;
  1740	        ticketsFullyProcessed = false;
  1741	    }
  1742	
  1743	    /// @dev Activate the prize pool freeze. If not already frozen, pre-seeds the pending
  1744	    ///      future-pool buffer with 1% of futurePrizePool so Degenerette ETH wins can resolve
  1745	    ///      during freeze without waiting for bet inflow. Unconsumed remainder rolls back to
  1746	    ///      futurePool via _unfreezePool. If already frozen (jackpot phase), accumulators keep
  1747	    ///      growing.
  1748	    function _freezePool() internal {
  1749	        if (!prizePoolFrozen) {
  1750	            prizePoolFrozen = true;
  1751	            uint256 futureBal = _getFuturePrizePool();
  1752	            uint256 seed = futureBal / 100;
  1753	            if (seed != 0) {
  1754	                _setFuturePrizePool(futureBal - seed);
  1755	                _setPendingPools(0, uint128(seed));
  1756	            } else {
  1757	                prizePoolPendingPacked = 0;
  1758	            }
  1759	        }
  1760	    }
  1761	
  1762	    /// @dev Swap queue buffer AND activate the prize pool freeze (daily RNG path only).
  1763	    function _swapAndFreeze() internal {
  1764	        _swapTicketSlot();
  1765	        _freezePool();
  1766	    }
  1767	
  1768	    /// @dev Apply pending accumulators to live pools and clear freeze.
  1769	    ///      No-op if not currently frozen.
  1770	    function _unfreezePool() internal {
  1771	        if (!prizePoolFrozen) return;
  1772	        (uint128 pNext, uint128 pFuture) = _getPendingPools();
  1773	        (uint128 next, uint128 future) = _getPrizePools();
  1774	        _setPrizePools(next + pNext, future + pFuture);
  1775	        prizePoolPendingPacked = 0;
  1776	        prizePoolFrozen = false;
  1777	    }
  1778	
  1779	    function _finalizeRngRequest(
  1780	        bool isTicketJackpotDay,
  1781	        uint24 lvl,
  1782	        uint256 requestId
  1783	    ) private {
  1784	        // isRetry: some VRF request already reserved the lootbox index (a daily retry OR an
  1785	        // in-flight mid-day lootbox request) — so the index must not be advanced again.
  1786	        bool isRetry = vrfRequestId != 0 &&
  1787	            rngRequestTime != 0 &&
  1788	            rngWordCurrent == 0;
  1789	        // isDailyRetry: a genuine retry of the *daily* request. A daily request holds the lock
  1790	        // (rngLockedFlag set true by the first daily request); a mid-day lootbox request leaves
  1791	        // rngLockedFlag false. Distinguishing them stops an in-flight lootbox request from
  1792	        // making this fresh daily request look like a retry and skip the level increment below.
  1793	        bool isDailyRetry = isRetry && rngLockedFlag;
  1794	        if (!isRetry) {
  1795	            // Fresh request: advance lootbox index so new purchases target the NEXT RNG.
  1796	            _lrAdvanceIndexClearPending();
  1797	        }
  1798	        // Retry: index already advanced from the original request. No action needed —
  1799	        // lootboxRngIndex - 1 still points to the pending index regardless of request ID.
  1800	
  1801	        vrfRequestId = requestId;
  1802	        rngWordCurrent = 0;
  1803	        rngRequestTime = uint48(block.timestamp);
  1804	        rngLockedFlag = true;
  1805	
  1806	        // Close the FLIP purchase window at the final jackpot day's RNG request — the boundary where
  1807	        // new tickets begin routing to the next level (mirrors the route-to-level+1 step in the mint
  1808	        // module). jackpotCounter + step catches the final daily jackpot; the isTicketJackpotDay
  1809	        // (level-transition) request catches the single-day turbo jackpot, where jackpotPhaseFlag is
  1810	        // not yet set here.
  1811	        if (ticketRedemptionOpen && (jackpotPhaseFlag || isTicketJackpotDay)) {
  1812	            uint8 jpStep = 1;
  1813	            if (compressedJackpotFlag == 2 && jackpotCounter == 0) {
  1814	                jpStep = JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP;
  1815	            } else if (
  1816	                compressedJackpotFlag == 1 &&
  1817	                jackpotCounter > 0 &&
  1818	                jackpotCounter < JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP - 1
  1819	            ) {
  1820	                jpStep = 2;
  1821	            }
  1822	            if (jackpotCounter + jpStep >= JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP) {
  1823	                ticketRedemptionOpen = false;
  1824	            }
  1825	        }
  1826	
  1827	        // Increment level at RNG request time when lastPurchaseDay = true.
  1828	        // lvl is already purchaseLevel (= level + 1), so set directly.
  1829	        // Only on a fresh daily request - a daily retry would double-increment, and an
  1830	        // in-flight mid-day lootbox request must not suppress this increment.
  1831	        if (isTicketJackpotDay && !isDailyRetry) {
  1832	            // Snapshot affiliate reward before level increment.
  1833	            // Scores routed to lvl (= level + 1) during the purchase phase just ended.
  1834	            _rewardTopAffiliate(lvl);
  1835	            level = lvl;
  1836	
  1837	            // Decimator window: open at x4/x99, close at x5/x00
  1838	            uint24 mod100 = lvl % 100;
  1839	            uint24 mod10 = lvl % 10;
  1840	            if ((mod10 == 4 && mod100 != 94) || mod100 == 99) {
  1841	                decWindowOpen = true;
  1842	            } else if (
  1843	                decWindowOpen && ((mod10 == 5 && mod100 != 95) || mod100 == 0)
  1844	            ) {
  1845	                decWindowOpen = false;
  1846	            }
  1847	
  1848	            // Resolve charity governance for the completed level.
  1849	            // lvl is the NEW level (old level + 1). CHARITY.currentLevel tracks
  1850	            // the CURRENT governance level (starts at 0, incremented by pickCharity).
  1851	            // The game's level 0->1 transition means level 0 gameplay is complete,
  1852	            // so we resolve governance for level 0 = lvl - 1.
  1853	            charityResolve.pickCharity(lvl - 1);
  1854	        }
  1855	    }
  1856	
  1857	    /// @notice Emergency VRF coordinator rotation (governance-gated).
  1858	    /// @dev Access: ContractAddresses.ADMIN only. The Admin contract enforces
  1859	    ///      stall duration via sDGNRS-holder governance (propose/vote/execute).
  1860	    /// @param newCoordinator New VRF coordinator address.
  1861	    /// @param newSubId New subscription ID.
  1862	    /// @param newKeyHash New key hash for the gas lane.
  1863	    function updateVrfCoordinatorAndSub(
  1864	        address newCoordinator,
  1865	        uint256 newSubId,
  1866	        bytes32 newKeyHash
  1867	    ) external {
  1868	        if (msg.sender != ContractAddresses.ADMIN) revert OnlyAdmin();
  1869	
  1870	        address current = address(vrfCoordinator);
  1871	        _setVrfConfig(newCoordinator, newSubId, newKeyHash);
  1872	
  1873	        // Detect what is in flight and re-issue on the new coordinator.
  1874	        // The request is accepted before the new subscription is LINK-funded; DegenerusAdmin
  1875	        // funds it in the same _executeSwap transaction (transferAndCall), and the VRF node
  1876	        // fulfills once funded. If the new coordinator also stalls, the daily advance abandons a
  1877	        // mid-day request and promotes it to the daily word after MIDDAY_RNG_STALL_TIMEOUT.
  1878	        if (_lrRead(LR_MID_DAY_SHIFT, LR_MID_DAY_MASK) != 0) {
  1879	            // Mid-day in flight: KEEP LR_MID_DAY=1; LR_INDEX preserved so the new word lands
  1880	            // in the same reserved slot [N] via the mid-day fulfillment branch (:1772).
  1881	            vrfRequestId = _requestVrfWord(VRF_MIDDAY_CONFIRMATIONS);
  1882	            rngRequestTime = uint48(block.timestamp);
  1883	        } else if (rngLockedFlag) {
  1884	            // Daily in flight: KEEP rngLockedFlag=true.
  1885	            if (rngWordCurrent == 0) {
  1886	                // Daily word not yet delivered: re-request on the new coordinator (-> :1768).
  1887	                vrfRequestId = _requestVrfWord(VRF_REQUEST_CONFIRMATIONS);
  1888	                rngRequestTime = uint48(block.timestamp);
  1889	            }
  1890	            // else: daily word already delivered and valid -> preserve it; no re-issue
  1891	            // (a fresh callback would be rejected by the :1761 rngWordCurrent!=0 guard).
  1892	        }
  1893	        // else: nothing in flight -> config repoint only; no re-issue, no flag change.
  1894	
  1895	        // Intentional: totalFlipReversals is NOT reset here. Nudges were purchased
  1896	        // with irreversible FLIP burns before or during the stall. They carry over
  1897	        // and apply to the first post-swap VRF word via _applyDailyRng. Resetting
  1898	        // would steal user value (burned FLIP for zero effect).
  1899	
  1900	        emit VrfCoordinatorUpdated(current, newCoordinator);
  1901	    }
  1902	
  1903	    /// @dev Unlock RNG after processing is complete for the day.
  1904	    ///      Resets VRF state and re-enables RNG usage.
  1905	    /// @param day Current day index to record.
  1906	    function _unlockRng(uint24 day) private {
  1907	        dailyIdx = day;
  1908	        rngLockedFlag = false;
  1909	        rngWordCurrent = 0;
  1910	        vrfRequestId = 0;
  1911	        rngRequestTime = 0;
  1912	        _unfreezePool();
  1913	        // The day-seal is the one chokepoint every completed game-day passes through (purchase
  1914	        // daily, jackpot coin+tickets, phase transition). Emit the daily pool snapshot here, after
  1915	        // _unfreezePool folds the pending accumulators back into the live pools, so the indexer
  1916	        // mirrors the settled end-of-day pools and a solvency total (ETH + stETH) from logs alone.
  1917	        // Game-over also seals here but emits its own terminal snapshot in the drain, so skip it.
  1918	        if (!gameOver) {
  1919	            emit PrizePoolDailySnapshot(
  1920	                _getNextPrizePool(),
  1921	                _getFuturePrizePool(),
  1922	                _getCurrentPrizePool(),
  1923	                claimablePool,
  1924	                address(this).balance + steth.balanceOf(address(this)),
  1925	                yieldAccumulator
  1926	            );
  1927	        }
  1928	    }
  1929	
  1930	    /// @notice Chainlink VRF callback for random word fulfillment.
  1931	    /// @dev Access: VRF coordinator only.
  1932	    ///      Daily RNG: stores word for advanceGame processing (nudges applied there).
  1933	    ///      Mid-day RNG: directly finalizes lootbox RNG, no advanceGame needed.
  1934	    ///      SECURITY: Validates requestId and coordinator address.
  1935	    /// @param requestId The request ID to match.
  1936	    /// @param randomWords Array containing the random word (length 1).
  1937	    function rawFulfillRandomWords(
  1938	        uint256 requestId,
  1939	        uint256[] calldata randomWords
  1940	    ) external {
  1941	        if (msg.sender != address(vrfCoordinator)) revert OnlyCoordinator();
  1942	        if (requestId != vrfRequestId || rngWordCurrent != 0) return;
  1943	
  1944	        uint256 word = randomWords[0];
  1945	        if (word == 0) word = 1;
  1950	        } else {
  1951	            // Mid-day RNG: directly finalize lootbox and clear state
  1952	            uint48 index = uint48(_lrRead(LR_INDEX_SHIFT, LR_INDEX_MASK)) - 1;
  1953	            lootboxRngWordByIndex[index] = word;
  1954	            emit LootboxRngApplied(index, word, requestId);
  1955	            vrfRequestId = 0;
  1956	            rngRequestTime = 0;
  1957	        }
  1958	    }
  1959	
  1960	    /// @dev Backfill rngWordByDay and process coinflip payouts for gap days
  1961	    ///      caused by VRF stall. Derives deterministic words from the first
  1962	    ///      post-gap VRF word via keccak256(vrfWord, gapDay).
  1963	    ///      NOTE: Gap days get zero nudges (totalFlipReversals not consumed).
  1964	    ///      NOTE: resolveRedemptionPeriod is NOT called for backfilled gap days —
  1965	    ///      the redemption timer continued ticking in real time during the stall;
  1966	    ///      it resolves only on the current day via the normal rngGate path.
  1967	    /// @param vrfWord The first post-gap VRF random word.
  1968	    /// @param startDay First gap day (dailyIdx + 1).
  1969	    /// @param endDay Current day (exclusive — not backfilled, handled by normal path).
  1970	    function _backfillGapDays(
  1971	        uint256 vrfWord,
  1972	        uint24 startDay,
  1973	        uint24 endDay
  1974	    ) private {
  1975	        // Cap at 120 gap days to stay within block gas limit (~9M gas).
  1976	        // Backfills oldest days first (most likely to have active coinflips).
  1977	        if (endDay - startDay > 120) endDay = startDay + 120;
  1978	        for (uint24 gapDay = startDay; gapDay < endDay; ) {
  1979	            uint256 derivedWord = uint256(
  1980	                keccak256(abi.encodePacked(vrfWord, gapDay))
  1981	            );
  1982	            if (derivedWord == 0) derivedWord = 1;
  1983	            rngWordByDay[gapDay] = derivedWord;
  1984	            // Gap days are calendar days that elapsed during the stall (no advance ran on
  1985	            // them), so none is a level-0 or first-jackpot day — always non-bonus (0).
  1986	            coinflip.processCoinflipPayouts(0, derivedWord, gapDay);
  1987	            emit DailyRngApplied(gapDay, derivedWord, 0, derivedWord);
  1988	            unchecked {
  1989	                ++gapDay;
  1990	            }
  1991	        }
  1992	    }
  1993	
  1994	    /// @dev Backfill any lootbox RNG indices that never received a VRF word.
  1995	    ///      Scans backwards from lootboxRngIndex - 1 until hitting a filled index.
  1996	    ///      Uses VRF-derived entropy so lootbox outcomes cannot be front-run.
  1997	    /// @param vrfWord Fresh VRF word from the post-gap callback.
  1998	    function _backfillOrphanedLootboxIndices(uint256 vrfWord) private {
  1999	        uint48 idx = uint48(_lrRead(LR_INDEX_SHIFT, LR_INDEX_MASK));
  2000	        if (idx <= 1) return; // nothing reserved yet
  2001	
  2002	        // Scan backwards from the most recent reserved index
  2003	        for (uint48 i = idx - 1; i >= 1; ) {
  2004	            if (lootboxRngWordByIndex[i] != 0) break; // hit a filled index, done
  2005	
  2006	            uint256 fallbackWord = uint256(
  2007	                keccak256(abi.encodePacked(vrfWord, i))
  2008	            );
  2009	            if (fallbackWord == 0) fallbackWord = 1;
  2010	            lootboxRngWordByIndex[i] = fallbackWord;
  2011	            emit LootboxRngApplied(i, fallbackWord, 0);
  2012	
  2013	            unchecked {
  2014	                --i;
  2015	            }
  2016	        }
  2017	    }
  2018	
  2019	    /// @dev Apply daily RNG nudges, record the word, and emit the finalized word.
  2020	    function _applyDailyRng(
  2021	        uint24 day,
  2022	        uint256 rawWord
  2023	    ) private returns (uint256 finalWord) {
  2024	        uint256 nudges = totalFlipReversals;
  2025	        finalWord = rawWord;
  2026	        if (nudges != 0) {
  2027	            unchecked {
  2028	                finalWord += nudges;
  2029	            }
  2030	            totalFlipReversals = 0;
  2031	        }
  2032	        rngWordCurrent = finalWord;
  2033	        rngWordByDay[day] = finalWord;
  2034	        lastVrfProcessedTimestamp = uint48(block.timestamp);
  2035	        emit DailyRngApplied(day, rawWord, nudges, finalWord);
  2036	    }
  2037	}
     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only
     2	pragma solidity 0.8.34;
     3	
     4	import {IDegenerusAffiliate} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusAffiliate.sol";
     5	import {IDegenerusCoin} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusCoin.sol";
     6	import {ICoinflip} from "../interfaces/ICoinflip.sol";
     7	import {MintPaymentKind} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusGame.sol";
     8	import {IDegenerusQuests} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusQuests.sol";
     9	import {
    10	    IDegenerusGameBoonModule,
    11	    IDegenerusGameFoilPackModule
    12	} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusGameModules.sol";
    13	import {ContractAddresses} from "../ContractAddresses.sol";
    14	import {DegenerusGameStorage} from "../storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol";
    15	import {DegenerusGameMintStreakUtils, IDegenerusVaultOwner} from "./DegenerusGameMintStreakUtils.sol";
    16	import {DegenerusGamePayoutUtils} from "./DegenerusGamePayoutUtils.sol";
    17	import {DegenerusTraitUtils} from "../DegenerusTraitUtils.sol";
    18	import {BitPackingLib} from "../libraries/BitPackingLib.sol";
    19	import {PriceLookupLib} from "../libraries/PriceLookupLib.sol";
    20	import {EntropyLib} from "../libraries/EntropyLib.sol";
    21	import {ActivityCurveLib} from "../libraries/ActivityCurveLib.sol";
    22	
    23	/**
    24	 * @title DegenerusGameMintModule
    25	 * @author Burnie Degenerus
    26	 * @notice Delegate-called module handling mint history and ticket activation.
    27	 *
    28	 * @dev This module is called via `delegatecall` from DegenerusGame, meaning all storage
    29	 *      reads/writes operate on the game contract's storage.
    30	 *
    31	 * ## Functions
    32	 *
    33	 * - `_recordMintData`: Track per-player mint history and update Activity Score metrics
    34	 *
    35	 * ## Activity Score System
    36	 *
    37	 * Player engagement is tracked through multiple loyalty metrics:
    38	 * - **Level Count**: Total levels minted (lifetime participation)
    39	 * - **Level Streak**: Consecutive level purchases
    40	 * - **Quest Streak**: Daily quest completion streak (tracked in DegenerusQuests)
    41	 * - **Affiliate Points**: Referral program bonus points (tracked in DegenerusAffiliate)
    42	 * - **Whale Pass**: Active pass type (10-lvl or 100-lvl)
    43	 *
    44	 * ### Mint Data Bit Packing Layout (mintPacked_):
    45	 *
    46	 * ```
    47	 * Bits 0-23:    lastLevel          - Last level with ETH mint
    48	 * Bits 24-47:   levelCount         - Total levels minted (lifetime) [Activity Score]
    49	 * Bits 48-71:   levelStreak        - Consecutive levels minted [Activity Score]
    50	 * Bits 72-103:  lastMintDay        - Day index of last mint
    51	 * Bits 104-127: unitsLevel         - Level index for levelUnits tracking
    52	 * Bits 128-151: frozenUntilLevel   - Whale pass: freeze stats until this level (0 = not frozen)
    53	 * Bits 152-153: whalePassType    - Active pass type (0=none, 1=10-lvl, 3=100-lvl) [Activity Score]
    54	 * Bits 154-159: (unused)
    55	 * Bits 160-183: mintStreakLast      - Last level credited for mint streak
    56	 * Bit  184:     hasDeityPass        - Deity pass flag
    57	 * Bits 185-208: affBonusLevel       - Cached affiliate bonus level
    58	 * Bits 209-214: affBonusPoints      - Cached affiliate bonus points (0-50)
    59	 * Bits 215-227: (unused)
    60	 * Bits 228-243: levelUnits         - Units minted this level
    61	 * Bit 244:      (unused)
    62	 * ```
    63	 *
    64	 * Note: Quest Streak is tracked in DegenerusQuests.questPlayerState.
    65	 * Affiliate Points are tracked in DegenerusAffiliate and cached in mintPacked_ bits 185-214 on level transitions.
    66	 *
    67	 * ## Trait Generation
    68	 *
    69	 * Traits are deterministically derived from tokenId via keccak256:
    70	 * - Each token has 4 traits (one per quadrant: 0-63, 64-127, 128-191, 192-255)
    71	 * - Uses 8×8 weighted grid for non-uniform distribution
    72	 * - Higher-numbered sub-traits within each category are slightly rarer
    73	 */
    74	contract DegenerusGameMintModule is
    75	    DegenerusGamePayoutUtils,
    76	    DegenerusGameMintStreakUtils
    77	{
    78	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    79	    // Errors
    80	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    81	
    82	    // error E() — inherited from DegenerusGameStorage
    83	
    84	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    85	    // External Contract References (compile-time constants)
    86	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    87	
    88	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    89	    // Constants
    90	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    91	
    92	    /// @dev Safe write budget for gas control (keeps cold batch under 15M gas).
    93	    uint32 private constant WRITES_BUDGET_SAFE = 550;
    94	
    95	    /// @dev LCG multiplier for trait generation.
    96	    uint64 private constant TICKET_LCG_MULT = 6364136223846793005;
    97	
    98	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    99	    // Purchase / Lootbox Constants
   100	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   101	
   102	    /// @dev Loot box minimum purchase amount (0.01 ETH).
   103	    uint256 private constant LOOTBOX_MIN = 0.01 ether;
   104	    /// @dev Coin-presale-box minimum purchase amount (0.01 ETH). Checked on the
   105	    ///      REQUESTED amount BEFORE the exactly-50-ETH clamp, so a sub-floor gap to
   106	    ///      the 50-ETH cap can never lock the presale close.
   107	    uint256 private constant PRESALE_BOX_MIN = 0.01 ether;
   108	    /// @dev Absolute minimum ticket buy-in (ETH equivalent).
   109	    uint256 private constant TICKET_MIN_BUYIN_WEI = 0.0025 ether;
   110	
   111	    /// @dev Lootbox boost value cap and expiry for the next lootbox purchase.
   112	    uint256 private constant LOOTBOX_BOOST_MAX_VALUE = 10 ether;
   113	    uint32 private constant LOOTBOX_BOOST_EXPIRY_DAYS = 2;
   114	
   115	    /// @dev Loot box pool split: 90% future, 10% next.
   116	    uint16 private constant LOOTBOX_SPLIT_FUTURE_BPS = 9000;
   117	    uint16 private constant LOOTBOX_SPLIT_NEXT_BPS = 1000;
   118	
   119	    /// @dev Share of ticket purchases routed to future prize pool (10%).
   120	    uint16 private constant PURCHASE_TO_FUTURE_BPS = 1000;
   121	
   122	    /// @dev Number of daily jackpots per level (must match AdvanceModule).
   123	    uint8 private constant JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP = 5;
   124	
   125	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   126	    // Events
   127	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   128	
   129	    event LootBoxBuy(
   130	        address indexed buyer,
   131	        uint48 indexed index,
   132	        uint256 amount,
   133	        bool presale
   134	    );
   135	    /// @notice Emitted when a coin-presale box is bought and queued for resolution.
   136	    /// @param buyer The player who bought the box.
   137	    /// @param index The shared lootbox RNG index the box queued at.
   138	    /// @param amount The applied box ETH (post-clamp).
   139	    /// @param closing True iff this buy crossed the 50-ETH cap (latches presaleOver;
   140	    ///        sweeps the Pool.PresaleBox remainder at this box's open).
   141	    event PresaleBoxBuy(
   142	        address indexed buyer,
   143	        uint48 indexed index,
   144	        uint256 amount,
   145	        bool closing
   146	    );
   147	
   148	    /// @notice entryQuantityScaled in purchase units (4 * QTY_SCALE = 400 = one whole ticket);
   149	    ///         weiIn = ETH-in for the manual-mint ticket leg (any funding source). The box leg
   150	    ///         rides LootBoxBuy, so the two stay disjoint for off-chain ETH-in totals.
   151	    event EntriesBought(address indexed buyer, uint256 entryQuantityScaled, uint256 weiIn);
   152	
   153	    event BoostUsed(
   154	        address indexed player,
   155	        uint24 indexed day,
   156	        uint256 originalAmount,
   157	        uint256 boostedAmount,
   158	        uint16 boostBps
   159	    );
   160	
   161	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   162	    // Mint Payment + Data Recording
   163	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   164	
   165	    /// @notice Record a mint payment, funded by ETH, claimable winnings, and/or afking.
   166	    /// @dev Direct internal call on the ETH-purchase path (this frame already runs in the
   167	    ///      Game's storage context). `ethForLeg` is the exact fresh-ETH value the caller
   168	    ///      allocates to this leg — every payment-mode check binds to it, never to the outer
   169	    ///      purchase tx's msg.value (a combined purchase splits one msg.value across legs).
   170	    ///      Payment modes:
   171	    ///      - DirectEth: ethForLeg must be >= costWei (overage ignored for accounting)
   172	    ///      - Claimable: deduct from claimableWinnings (ethForLeg must be 0)
   173	    ///      - Combined: ETH first, then claimable for remainder
   174	    ///      Afking covers any remaining shortfall on every mode.
   175	    ///
   176	    ///      SECURITY: Validates minimum payment amounts; overage is ignored for accounting.
   177	    ///      Splits the prize contribution into its next/future shares and RETURNS them so the
   178	    ///      caller can fold the ticket and lootbox legs into one prize-pool RMW.
   179	    ///
   180	    /// @param player The player address to record mint for.
   181	    /// @param costWei Total cost in wei for this mint.
   182	    /// @param payKind Payment method (DirectEth, Claimable, or Combined).
   183	    /// @param ethForLeg Fresh ETH allocated to this leg by the caller.
   184	    /// @return nextShare Portion of this leg's contribution destined for the next prize pool.
   185	    /// @return futureShare Portion destined for the future prize pool.
   186	    /// @return claimableDraw Per-player claimable + afking drawn; caller subtracts it from claimablePool.
   187	    /// @custom:reverts E If payment validation fails or the funding tiers fall short.
   188	    function _recordMintPayment(
   189	        address player,
   190	        uint256 costWei,
   191	        MintPaymentKind payKind,
   192	        uint256 ethForLeg
   193	    ) internal returns (uint256 nextShare, uint256 futureShare, uint256 claimableDraw) {
   194	        uint256 prizeContribution;
   195	        (prizeContribution, claimableDraw) = _processMintPayment(
   196	            player,
   197	            costWei,
   198	            payKind,
   199	            ethForLeg
   200	        );
   201	        if (prizeContribution != 0) {
   202	            futureShare = (prizeContribution * PURCHASE_TO_FUTURE_BPS) / 10_000;
   203	            nextShare = prizeContribution - futureShare;
   204	        }
   205	    }
   206	
   207	    /// @dev Process mint payment and return amount contributed to prize pool.
   208	    ///      Handles three payment modes with strict validation:
   209	    ///
   210	    ///      DirectEth: ethForLeg must be >= amount (overage ignored for accounting)
   211	    ///      Claimable: ethForLeg must be 0, deduct from claimableWinnings
   212	    ///      Combined: ETH first (any amount ≤ cost), then claimable for rest
   213	    ///
   214	    ///      SECURITY: Leaves 1 wei sentinel in claimable to prevent zeroing.
   215	    ///      The per-player claimable/afking balances are debited here; the matching claimablePool
   216	    ///      decrement is deferred to the caller (returned as claimableDraw) so a combined buy folds
   217	    ///      both legs into one pool RMW.
   218	    ///
   219	    /// @param player Player whose claimable balance to check/deduct.
   220	    /// @param amount Total cost in wei to cover.
   221	    /// @param payKind Payment method enum.
   222	    /// @param ethForLeg Fresh ETH allocated to this leg by the caller.
   223	    /// @return prizeContribution Amount contributing to next/future prize pools.
   224	    /// @return claimableDraw Per-player claimable + afking drawn; caller subtracts it from claimablePool.
   225	    function _processMintPayment(
   226	        address player,
   227	        uint256 amount,
   228	        MintPaymentKind payKind,
   229	        uint256 ethForLeg
   230	    ) private returns (uint256 prizeContribution, uint256 claimableDraw) {
   231	        uint256 ethUsed;
   232	        uint256 claimableUsed;
   233	        uint256 newClaimableBalance;
   234	        if (payKind == MintPaymentKind.DirectEth) {
   235	            // Direct ETH: fresh ETH first (overpay ignored), afking covers any shortfall;
   236	            // claimable is skipped on this kind.
   237	            ethUsed = ethForLeg < amount ? ethForLeg : amount;
   238	        } else if (payKind == MintPaymentKind.Claimable) {
   239	            // No fresh ETH allowed: draw claimable to the 1-wei sentinel, then afking.
   240	            if (ethForLeg != 0) revert E();
   241	            uint256 claimable = _claimableOf(player);
   242	            if (claimable > 1) {
   243	                uint256 available = claimable - 1; // Preserve 1 wei sentinel
   244	                claimableUsed = amount < available ? amount : available;
   245	                if (claimableUsed != 0) {
   246	                    unchecked {
   247	                        newClaimableBalance = claimable - claimableUsed;
   248	                    }
   249	                }
   250	            }
   251	        } else if (payKind == MintPaymentKind.Combined) {
   252	            // ETH first, then claimable to the sentinel, then afking for any remainder.
   253	            if (ethForLeg > amount) revert E();
   254	            ethUsed = ethForLeg;
   255	            uint256 remaining = amount - ethForLeg;
   256	            if (remaining != 0) {
   257	                uint256 claimable = _claimableOf(player);
   258	                if (claimable > 1) {
   259	                    uint256 available = claimable - 1; // Preserve 1 wei sentinel
   260	                    claimableUsed = remaining < available
   261	                        ? remaining
   262	                        : available;
   263	                    if (claimableUsed != 0) {
   264	                        unchecked {
   265	                            newClaimableBalance = claimable - claimableUsed;
   266	                        }
   267	                    }
   268	                }
   269	            }
   270	        } else {
   271	            revert E();
   272	        }
   273	
   274	        // Afking tier: the player's prepaid afking covers whatever fresh ETH + claimable did
   275	        // not. afking is fresh-ETH-equivalent (own deposited principal), so it counts toward
   276	        // prizeContribution. Reverts when the three tiers together fall short of the cost.
   277	        uint256 afkingUsed = amount - ethUsed - claimableUsed;
   278	
   279	        if (claimableUsed != 0 || afkingUsed != 0) {
   280	            // One load + store of the packed per-player slot; the helper's per-half guards
     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only
     2	pragma solidity 0.8.34;
     3	
     4	import {IDegenerusGame, MintPaymentKind} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusGame.sol";
     5	import {DegenerusGameStorage} from "../storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol";
     6	import {ContractAddresses} from "../ContractAddresses.sol";
     7	
     8	/// @dev Minimal stETH interface (ERC20 subset)
     9	interface IStETH {
    10	    /// @param account Address to query balance of.
    11	    function balanceOf(address account) external view returns (uint256);
    12	    /// @param to Recipient address.
    13	    /// @param amount Transfer amount in wei.
    14	    function transfer(address to, uint256 amount) external returns (bool);
    15	}
    16	
    17	/// @dev Admin interface for VRF shutdown during final sweep.
    18	interface IDegenerusAdminShutdown {
    19	    function shutdownVrf() external;
    20	}
    21	
    22	/// @dev GNRUS interface for gameover GNRUS cleanup.
    23	interface IGNRUSGameOver {
    24	    function burnAtGameOver() external;
    25	    function onFinalSweep() external;
    26	}
    27	
    28	interface IFlipTombstone {
    29	    function tombstoneAtGameOver() external;
    30	}
    31	
    32	/**
    33	 * @title DegenerusGameGameOverModule
    34	 * @notice Handles game over logic including jackpot distribution and final sweeps.
    35	 * @dev Executed via delegatecall from DegenerusGame. Inherits storage layout.
    36	 */
    37	contract DegenerusGameGameOverModule is DegenerusGameStorage {
    38	    /// @notice stETH token contract for liquid staking rewards
    39	    IStETH private constant steth = IStETH(ContractAddresses.STETH_TOKEN);
    40	
    41	    /// @notice Admin contract for VRF shutdown
    42	    IDegenerusAdminShutdown private constant admin =
    43	        IDegenerusAdminShutdown(ContractAddresses.ADMIN);
    44	
    45	    /// @notice GNRUS contract for gameover cleanup
    46	    IGNRUSGameOver private constant charityGameOver =
    47	        IGNRUSGameOver(ContractAddresses.GNRUS);
    48	
    49	    /// @notice FLIP coin contract for the gameover worthless-token tombstone flood
    50	    IFlipTombstone private constant flip =
    51	        IFlipTombstone(ContractAddresses.COIN);
    52	
    53	    /// @notice Fixed refund amount per deity pass for early game over (levels 0-9)
    54	    uint256 private constant DEITY_PASS_EARLY_GAMEOVER_REFUND =
    55	        20 ether;
    56	
    57	    // error E() — inherited from DegenerusGameStorage
    58	
    59	    /// @notice Process game over by distributing remaining funds via jackpots.
    60	    /// @dev Called when liveness guards trigger (1yr deploy timeout or 120-day inactivity).
    61	    ///      Sets terminal gameOver flag.
    62	    ///
    63	    ///      Distribution logic:
    64	    ///      - If game ended early (levels 0-9): Fixed 20 ETH refund per deity pass purchased,
    65	    ///        FIFO by purchase order, budget-capped to available funds minus claimablePool
    66	    ///      - Remaining funds: 10% to Decimator, 90% to next-level ticketholders
    67	    ///      - Decimator refunds flow to terminal jackpot pool
    68	    ///      - Any uncredited remainder swept to vault and sDGNRS
    69	    ///
    70	    ///      Reads rngWordByDay[day] for entropy; reverts if funds exist but word is not yet available.
    71	    ///      VRF fallback logic (historical word, stall timeout) is in AdvanceModule._gameOverEntropy.
    72	    /// @param day Day index for RNG word lookup from rngWordByDay mapping.
    73	    /// @custom:reverts Invariant When distributable funds exist but the RNG word is unavailable (defense-in-depth).
    74	    /// @custom:reverts TransferFailed When an stETH or ETH transfer fails.
    75	    function handleGameOverDrain(uint24 day) external {
    76	        if (_goRead(GO_JACKPOT_PAID_SHIFT, GO_JACKPOT_PAID_MASK) != 0) return; // Already processed
    77	
    78	        uint24 lvl = level;
    79	
    80	        uint256 totalFunds = address(this).balance + steth.balanceOf(address(this));
    81	
    82	        // Compute available funds FIRST (before any side effects)
    83	        // Deity pass refunds have not happened yet, so claimablePool is pre-refund.
    84	        // sDGNRS redemption ETH is segregated out of the game at submit (pullRedemptionReserve
    85	        // transfers it to the sDGNRS contract), so it is no longer part of totalFunds here —
    86	        // subtracting pendingRedemptionEthValue would double-count it.
    87	        uint256 reserved = uint256(claimablePool);
    88	        uint256 preRefundAvailable = totalFunds > reserved ? totalFunds - reserved : 0;
    89	
    90	        // RNG gate: when distributable funds exist, require RNG word.
    91	        // Defense-in-depth -- caller (_handleGameOverPath) already guarantees
    92	        // rngWordByDay[day] != 0 before calling, so this revert should never fire.
    93	        uint256 rngWord;
    94	        if (preRefundAvailable != 0) {
    95	            rngWord = rngWordByDay[day];
    96	            if (rngWord == 0) revert Invariant();
    97	        }
    98	
    99	        // === All side effects below this line (RNG confirmed or no funds to distribute) ===
   100	
   101	        // Deity pass refunds (levels 0-9): refund each owner what they paid, capped at the flat
   102	        // DEITY_PASS_EARLY_GAMEOVER_REFUND so a boon-discounted deity (paid < 20 ETH) never refunds
   103	        // more than it paid, then clamped to the remaining distributable budget (FIFO).
   104	        if (lvl < 10) {
   105	            uint256 ownerCount = deityPassOwners.length;
   106	            uint256 budget = preRefundAvailable;
   107	            uint256 totalRefunded;
   108	            for (uint256 i; i < ownerCount; ) {
   109	                address owner = deityPassOwners[i];
   110	                uint256 refund = deityPassPricePaid[owner];
   111	                if (refund != 0) {
   112	                    if (refund > DEITY_PASS_EARLY_GAMEOVER_REFUND) {
   113	                        refund = DEITY_PASS_EARLY_GAMEOVER_REFUND;
   114	                    }
   115	                    if (refund > budget) {
   116	                        refund = budget;
   117	                    }
   118	                    if (refund != 0) {
   119	                        _creditClaimable(owner, refund);
   120	                        unchecked {
   121	                            totalRefunded += refund;
   122	                            budget -= refund;
   123	                        }
   124	                    }
   125	                    if (budget == 0) break;
   126	                }
   127	                unchecked {
   128	                    ++i;
   129	                }
   130	            }
   131	            if (totalRefunded != 0) {
   132	                claimablePool += uint128(totalRefunded); // Safe: totalRefunded bounded by preRefundAvailable which fits uint128
   133	            }
   134	        }
   135	
   136	        // Latch terminal state
   137	        gameOver = true;
   138	        _goWrite(GO_TIME_SHIFT, GO_TIME_MASK, uint48(block.timestamp));
   139	
   140	        // Burn unallocated tokens
   141	        charityGameOver.burnAtGameOver();
   142	        dgnrs.burnAtGameOver();
   143	        // Flood FLIP's VAULT mint allowance as a one-shot worthless-token tombstone
   144	        flip.tombstoneAtGameOver();
   145	
   146	        _goWrite(GO_JACKPOT_PAID_SHIFT, GO_JACKPOT_PAID_MASK, 1);
   147	        _setNextPrizePool(0);
   148	        _setFuturePrizePool(0);
   149	        _setCurrentPrizePool(0);
   150	        yieldAccumulator = 0;
   151	        // Terminal state also clears the freeze: with the live pools drained, _unlockRng's
   152	        // _unfreezePool must not resurrect the pending pool back into them, and no
   153	        // post-gameOver box/Degenerette resolution may draw ETH from a phantom pending pool.
   154	        prizePoolPendingPacked = 0;
   155	        prizePoolFrozen = false;
   156	        // All three pools are drained to zero at game over. Emit the terminal snapshot here —
   157	        // before the available==0 early return below — so every game-over path logs it once. The
   158	        // daily snapshot in _unlockRng skips game-over (gameOver is set above) to avoid a duplicate.
   159	        emit PrizePoolDailySnapshot(
   160	            0,
   161	            0,
   162	            0,
   163	            claimablePool,
   164	            address(this).balance + steth.balanceOf(address(this)),
   165	            yieldAccumulator
   166	        );
   167	
   168	        // Recalculate available after refunds (claimablePool may have grown).
   169	        // sDGNRS redemption ETH was already segregated out of the game at submit, so it is not
   170	        // part of totalFunds here — only claimablePool is reserved.
   171	        uint256 postRefundReserved = uint256(claimablePool);
   172	        uint256 available = totalFunds > postRefundReserved ? totalFunds - postRefundReserved : 0;
   173	
   174	        if (available == 0) return;
   175	
   176	        emit GameOverDrained(lvl, available, claimablePool);
   177	
   178	        // remaining tracks unallocated funds.
   179	        uint256 remaining = available;
   180	
   181	        // 10% Terminal Decimator (death bet) -- refunds flow back to remaining for terminal jackpot
   182	        uint256 decPool = remaining / 10;
   183	        if (decPool != 0) {
   184	            uint256 decRefund = IDegenerusGame(address(this)).runTerminalDecimatorJackpot(decPool, lvl, rngWord);
   185	            uint256 decSpend = decPool - decRefund;
   186	            if (decSpend != 0) {
   187	                claimablePool += uint128(decSpend); // Safe: decSpend bounded by decPool which is a fraction of available
   188	            }
   189	            remaining -= decPool;
   190	            remaining += decRefund;
   191	        }
   192	
   193	        // 90% (+ decimator refund) to next-level ticketholders (Day-5-style bucket distribution).
   194	        // gameOver=true prevents auto-rebuy inside _addClaimableEth (tickets worthless post-game).
   195	        // Any leftover from empty trait buckets stays in the contract until handleFinalSweep
   196	        // (30 days later) folds it into the three-way split to vault / sDGNRS / GNRUS.
   197	        if (remaining != 0) {
   198	            IDegenerusGame(address(this)).runTerminalJackpot(remaining, lvl + 1, rngWord);
   199	        }
   200	    }
   201	
   202	    /// @notice Final sweep of all remaining funds after 30 days post-gameover.
   203	    /// @dev Pays each sink (vault, sDGNRS, GNRUS) the claimable balance still
   204	    ///      owed to it, then splits the remainder ~1/3 each (GNRUS absorbs the
   205	    ///      rounding wei). All other unclaimed player balances are forfeited.
   206	    ///      After GO_SWEPT=1, claimWinnings() reverts, so this is the last
   207	    ///      chance for the three sinks to receive what they earned in-game.
   208	    ///      Also shuts down the VRF subscription and sweeps LINK to vault.
   209	    /// @custom:reverts TransferFailed When ETH or stETH transfer fails
   210	    function handleFinalSweep() external {
   211	        uint256 goTime = _goRead(GO_TIME_SHIFT, GO_TIME_MASK);
   212	        if (goTime == 0) return; // Game not over yet
   213	        if (block.timestamp < goTime + 30 days) return; // Too early
   214	        if (_goRead(GO_SWEPT_SHIFT, GO_SWEPT_MASK) != 0) return; // Already swept
   215	
   216	        _goWrite(GO_SWEPT_SHIFT, GO_SWEPT_MASK, 1);
   217	        charityGameOver.onFinalSweep(); // stamp GNRUS with the sweep time (anchors its recovery gates)
   218	
   219	        uint256 owedV  = _claimableOf(ContractAddresses.VAULT);
   220	        uint256 owedSD = _claimableOf(ContractAddresses.SDGNRS);
   221	        uint256 owedG  = _claimableOf(ContractAddresses.GNRUS);
   222	        _debitClaimable(ContractAddresses.VAULT, owedV);
   223	        _debitClaimable(ContractAddresses.SDGNRS, owedSD);
   224	        _debitClaimable(ContractAddresses.GNRUS, owedG);
   225	        if (owedV  != 0) emit ClaimableSpent(ContractAddresses.VAULT,  owedV,  0, MintPaymentKind.Internal, owedV);
   226	        if (owedSD != 0) emit ClaimableSpent(ContractAddresses.SDGNRS, owedSD, 0, MintPaymentKind.Internal, owedSD);
   227	        if (owedG  != 0) emit ClaimableSpent(ContractAddresses.GNRUS,  owedG,  0, MintPaymentKind.Internal, owedG);
   228	        claimablePool = 0;
   229	
   230	        // Shutdown VRF subscription (fire-and-forget; failure must not block sweep)
   231	        try admin.shutdownVrf() {} catch {}
   232	
   233	        uint256 ethBal = address(this).balance;
   234	        uint256 stBal = steth.balanceOf(address(this));
   235	        uint256 totalFunds = ethBal + stBal;
   236	
   237	        emit FinalSwept(totalFunds);
   238	
   239	        if (totalFunds == 0) return;
   240	
   241	        // Invariant claimablePool >= sum(claimableWinnings[*]) and balance >=
   242	        // claimablePool guarantee totalFunds >= owedV+owedSD+owedG; if the
   243	        // invariant ever fails, _sendStethFirst reverts (hard-revert policy).
   244	        uint256 remainder  = totalFunds - (owedV + owedSD + owedG);
   245	        uint256 thirdShare = remainder / 3;
   246	        uint256 gnrusExtra = remainder - thirdShare - thirdShare;
   247	
   248	        stBal = _sendStethFirst(ContractAddresses.VAULT,  owedV  + thirdShare, stBal);
   249	        stBal = _sendStethFirst(ContractAddresses.SDGNRS, owedSD + thirdShare, stBal);
   250	        _sendStethFirst(ContractAddresses.GNRUS,          owedG  + gnrusExtra, stBal);
   251	    }
   252	
   253	    /// @dev Send stETH first to a recipient, then ETH for the remainder. Returns updated stETH balance.
   254	    ///      IMPORTANT: Hard-reverts on stETH/ETH transfer failure. Because game-over
   255	    ///      sets terminal state flags that roll back on revert, a stuck stETH transfer
   256	    ///      would block game-over processing until the transfer succeeds.
   257	    /// @param to Recipient address.
   258	    /// @param amount Total amount to send (stETH preferred, ETH as fallback).
   259	    /// @param stethBal Remaining stETH balance available for transfers.
   260	    /// @return Updated stETH balance after transfer.
   261	    function _sendStethFirst(address to, uint256 amount, uint256 stethBal) private returns (uint256) {
   262	        if (amount == 0) return stethBal;
   263	        if (amount <= stethBal) {
   264	            if (!steth.transfer(to, amount)) revert TransferFailed();
   265	            return stethBal - amount;
   266	        }
   267	        if (stethBal != 0) {
   268	            if (!steth.transfer(to, stethBal)) revert TransferFailed();
   269	        }
   270	        uint256 ethAmount = amount - stethBal;
   271	        if (ethAmount != 0) {
   272	            (bool ok, ) = payable(to).call{value: ethAmount}("");
   273	            if (!ok) revert TransferFailed();
   274	        }
   275	        return 0;
   276	    }
   277	}
     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only
     2	pragma solidity 0.8.34;
     3	
     4	import {ContractAddresses} from "../ContractAddresses.sol";
     5	import {IVRFCoordinator} from "../interfaces/IVRFCoordinator.sol";
     6	import {IsDGNRS} from "../interfaces/IsDGNRS.sol";
     7	import {IDegenerusAffiliate} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusAffiliate.sol";
     8	import {IDegenerusCoin} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusCoin.sol";
     9	import {ICoinflip} from "../interfaces/ICoinflip.sol";
    10	import {IDegenerusQuests} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusQuests.sol";
    11	import {BitPackingLib} from "../libraries/BitPackingLib.sol";
    12	import {GameTimeLib} from "../libraries/GameTimeLib.sol";
    13	import {ActivityCurveLib} from "../libraries/ActivityCurveLib.sol";
    14	import {MintPaymentKind} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusGame.sol";
    15	
    16	/**
    17	 * @title DegenerusGameStorage
    18	 * @author Burnie Degenerus
    19	 * @notice Shared storage layout between DegenerusGame and its delegatecall modules.
    20	 *
    21	 * @dev ARCHITECTURE OVERVIEW
    22	 * -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    23	 * This contract defines the canonical storage layout for the Degenerus game ecosystem.
    24	 * It is inherited by:
    25	 *   - DegenerusGame (main contract, holds actual state)
    26	 *   - DegenerusGameAdvanceModule (delegatecall module)
    27	 *   - DegenerusGameJackpotModule (delegatecall module)
    28	 *   - DegenerusGameMintModule (delegatecall module)
    29	 *   - DegenerusGameLootboxModule (delegatecall module)
    30	 *   - DegenerusGameWhaleModule (delegatecall module)
    31	 *   - DegenerusGameBoonModule (delegatecall module)
    32	 *   - DegenerusGameDecimatorModule (delegatecall module)
    33	 *   - DegenerusGameDegeneretteModule (delegatecall module)
    34	 *   - DegenerusGameGameOverModule (delegatecall module)
    35	 *
    36	 * DELEGATECALL PATTERN:
    37	 * When DegenerusGame calls `module.delegatecall(...)`, the module's code executes
    38	 * in the context of DegenerusGame's storage. This means:
    39	 *   1. Storage slots MUST match exactly between the main contract and all modules.
    40	 *   2. This contract ensures slot alignment by providing a single source of truth.
    41	 *   3. Never add storage variables to module contracts — they would collide with game storage.
    42	 *
    43	 * STORAGE SLOT LAYOUT (EVM assigns slots sequentially):
    44	 * -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    45	 *
    46	 * +-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
    47	 * | EVM SLOT 0 (32 bytes) -- Timing, FSM, Counters, Flags, Buffer, Freeze       |
    48	 * +-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
    49	 * | [0:3]   purchaseStartDay         uint24   Day index when purchase/deploy began|
    50	 * | [3:6]   dailyIdx                 uint24   Monotonic day counter             |
    51	 * | [6:12]  rngRequestTime           uint48   When last VRF request was fired   |
    52	 * | [12:15] level                    uint24   Current jackpot level (starts at 0)|
    53	 * | [15:16] jackpotPhaseFlag         bool     Phase: false=PURCHASE, true=JACKPOT|
    54	 * | [16:17] jackpotCounter           uint8    Jackpots processed this level      |
    55	 * | [17:18] lastPurchaseDay          bool     Prize target met flag              |
    56	 * | [18:19] decWindowOpen            bool     Decimator window latch             |
    57	 * | [19:20] rngLockedFlag            bool     Daily RNG lock (jackpot window)    |
    58	 * | [20:21] phaseTransitionActive    bool     Level transition in progress       |
    59	 * | [21:22] gameOver                 bool     Terminal state flag                |
    60	 * | [22:23] dailyJackpotCoinTicketsPending bool Split jackpot pending flag       |
    61	 * | [23:24] compressedJackpotFlag    uint8    0=normal, 1=compressed, 2=turbo    |
    62	 * | [24:25] ticketsFullyProcessed    bool     Read slot fully drained flag       |
    63	 * | [25:26] ticketWriteSlot          bool     Double-buffer write toggle         |
    64	 * | [26:27] prizePoolFrozen          bool     Prize pool freeze active flag      |
    65	 * | [27:28] presaleOver              bool     Coin-presale-box terminal latch    |
    66	 * | [28:29] subsFullyProcessed       bool     Afking STAGE drain-complete flag    |
    67	 * | [29:30] presaleDrained           bool     All presale boxes opened (sweep)    |
    68	 * | [30:31] ticketRedemptionOpen         bool     FLIP ticket purchase window latch |
    69	 * +-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
    70	 *   Total: 31 bytes used (1 byte padding)
    71	 *
    72	 * +-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
    73	 * | EVM SLOT 1 (32 bytes) -- Prize Pools                                        |
    74	 * +-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
    75	 * | [0:16]  currentPrizePool         uint128  Active prize pool for current level|
    76	 * | [16:32] claimablePool            uint128  Aggregate ETH liability for claims |
    77	 * +-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
    78	 *   Total: 32 bytes used (0 bytes padding -- FULL)
    79	 *
    80	 * SLOTS 2+ -- Full-width variables, arrays, and mappings
    81	 * -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    82	 * Each uint256, array length, or mapping root occupies its own slot.
    83	 * Dynamic arrays: length at slot N, data at keccak256(N).
    84	 * Mappings: value at keccak256(key . slot).
    85	 *
    86	 * SECURITY CONSIDERATIONS
    87	 * -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    88	 * 1. SLOT STABILITY: Never reorder, remove, or change types of existing variables.
    89	 *    Append-only additions are safe for non-upgradeable contracts.
    90	 *
    91	 * 2. DELEGATECALL SAFETY: All modules inherit this exact layout. If a module
    92	 *    declared its own storage variables, they would occupy the same slots as
    93	 *    game data, causing catastrophic corruption.
    94	 *
    95	 * 3. ACCESS CONTROL: All variables are `internal`, preventing external reads.
    96	 *    Public getters in DegenerusGame expose only what's needed.
    97	 *
    98	 * 4. INITIALIZATION: Default values are set inline. For critical variables:
    99	 *    - purchaseStartDay = deploy day index (set in constructor via GameTimeLib.currentDayIndex())
   100	 *    - jackpotPhaseFlag = false (purchase phase)
   101	 *    - decWindowOpen = false (opens at level 4 jackpot phase start)
   102	 *    - levelPrizePool uses BOOTSTRAP_PRIZE_POOL (50 ether) as fallback for level 0
   103	 *
   104	 * 5. OVERFLOW PROTECTION: Solidity 0.8+ provides automatic overflow checks.
   105	 *    `unchecked` blocks in modules are intentional optimizations for safe ops.
   106	 *
   107	 * 6. MAPPING COLLISION: Mappings use keccak256(key . slot), making collisions
   108	 *    computationally infeasible. The lvlTraitEntry nested mapping uses
   109	 *    keccak256(traitId . keccak256(level . slot)) for data location.
   110	 *
   111	 * UPGRADE NOTES
   112	 * -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
   113	 * This contract is NOT upgradeable (no proxy pattern).
   114	 *
   115	 * VARIABLE DOCUMENTATION
   116	 * -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
   117	 * See inline comments for each variable group below.
   118	 */
   119	
   120	abstract contract DegenerusGameStorage {
   121	    // =========================================================================
   122	    // CONSTANTS
   123	    // =========================================================================
   124	
   125	    IDegenerusCoin internal constant coin =
   126	        IDegenerusCoin(ContractAddresses.COIN);
   127	    ICoinflip internal constant coinflip =
   128	        ICoinflip(ContractAddresses.COINFLIP);
   129	    IDegenerusQuests internal constant quests =
   130	        IDegenerusQuests(ContractAddresses.QUESTS);
   131	    IDegenerusAffiliate internal constant affiliate =
   132	        IDegenerusAffiliate(ContractAddresses.AFFILIATE);
   133	    IsDGNRS internal constant dgnrs =
   134	        IsDGNRS(ContractAddresses.SDGNRS);
   135	
   136	    /// @dev Deity pass activity bonus (+80 points).
   137	    uint16 internal constant DEITY_PASS_ACTIVITY_BONUS_POINTS = 80;
   138	
   139	    /// @dev Hard ceiling on the total activity score (points). Quest completions are
   140	    ///      uncapped, so this bounds the sum. Set one below uint16 max because the
   141	    ///      sDGNRS redemption snapshot stores uint16(score) + 1 (a 0 = unset sentinel),
   142	    ///      which would overflow at 65,535.
   143	    uint16 internal constant ACTIVITY_SCORE_HARD_CAP_POINTS = 65_534;
   144	
   145	    /// @dev Floor streak points for active pass holders (50 points).
   146	    uint16 internal constant PASS_STREAK_FLOOR_POINTS = 50;
   147	
   148	    /// @dev Floor mint count points for active pass holders (25 points).
   149	    uint16 internal constant PASS_MINT_COUNT_FLOOR_POINTS = 25;
   150	
   151	    /// @dev Conversion factor for FLIP token amounts.
   152	    ///      FLIP uses 18 decimals, so 1000 FLIP = 1e21 base units.
   153	    ///      Used in price calculations: price / PRICE_COIN_UNIT = FLIP per mint.
   154	    uint256 internal constant PRICE_COIN_UNIT = 1000 ether;
   155	
   156	    /// @dev Scale factor for fractional ticket calculations (2 decimal places).
   157	    ///      100 means 1 ticket = 100 scaled units.
   158	    uint256 internal constant QTY_SCALE = 100;
   159	
   160	    /// @dev ETH threshold for whale pass claim eligibility from lootbox wins.
   161	    uint256 internal constant LOOTBOX_CLAIM_THRESHOLD = 5 ether;
   162	
   163	    /// @dev Bootstrap value for prize pool target at level 1 (before any level completes).
   164	    ///      levelPrizePool[0] is initialized to this value conceptually.
   165	    uint256 internal constant BOOTSTRAP_PRIZE_POOL = 50 ether;
   166	
   167	    /// @dev Current-pool daily jackpot percentage is rolled in JackpotModule.
   168	    ///      Days 1-4 use a random 6%-14% slice of remaining currentPrizePool.
   169	    ///      Day 5 pays 100% of the remaining currentPrizePool.
   170	
   171	    /// @dev Bit mask for ticket queue double-buffer key encoding.
   172	    ///      Set bit 23 of the uint24 level key to distinguish write/read slots.
   173	    ///      Max real level: 2^22 - 1 = 4,194,303 (game would take millennia).
   174	    uint24 internal constant TICKET_SLOT_BIT = 1 << 23;
   175	
   176	    /// @dev Bit mask for far-future ticket key encoding.
   177	    ///      Set bit 22 of the uint24 level key to create a third key space
   178	    ///      disjoint from both double-buffer slots (bit 23).
   179	    ///      Far-future = tickets targeting > currentLevel + 5.
   180	    ///      Three key spaces: Slot0 [0x000000-0x3FFFFF], FF [0x400000-0x7FFFFF],
   181	    ///      Slot1 [0x800000-0xBFFFFF]. Disjoint for all lvl < 2^22.
   182	    uint24 internal constant TICKET_FAR_FUTURE_BIT = 1 << 22;
   183	
   184	    /// @dev Deploy idle timeout in days (mirrors DegenerusGame / AdvanceModule).
   185	    uint32 internal constant _DEPLOY_IDLE_TIMEOUT_DAYS = 365;
   186	
   187	    /// @dev VRF stall duration that flips liveness from "grace" to "VRF-dead game-over".
   188	    ///      Below this, liveness is suppressed so players can propose a coordinator rotation.
   189	    ///      At or above, liveness fires so the game-over fallback path engages.
   190	    uint48 internal constant _VRF_GRACE_PERIOD = 14 days;
   191	
   192	    /// @dev RNG-stall length (in sealed days) past which the VRF-death deadman fires regardless
   193	    ///      of phase. dailyIdx only advances on a successful day-seal, so currentDay - dailyIdx
   194	    ///      counts days since the last good word; it freezes during ANY stall (dead coordinator,
   195	    ///      unfilled LINK, request-from-zero revert) and clears only after game-over latches.
   196	    ///      Far above the in-phase clocks, so it never fires on a healthy game.
   197	    uint24 internal constant _VRF_DEADMAN_DAYS = 120;
   198	
   199	    // =========================================================================
   200	    // Errors
   201	    // =========================================================================
   202	
   203	    /// @dev Gas-minimal revert signal. Matches codebase convention (DegenerusGame, modules).
   204	    error E();
   205	
   206	    /// @dev Reverts when a permissionless far-future ticket write is attempted during VRF commitment window.
   207	    error RngLocked();
   208	
   209	    // Shared named reverts (inherited by every Game module). Each carries no data — the name
   210	    // alone identifies the failing guard for off-chain decoding. Domain-specific reverts stay
   211	    // declared locally in the module that owns them.
   212	    error OnlyDelegatecall();   // nested-dispatch guard: address(this) != GAME
   213	    error OnlySelf();           // caller must be the contract itself
   214	    error OnlyAdmin();          // admin-only entrypoint
   215	    error OnlyVault();          // vault / vault-owner entrypoint
   216	    error OnlySDGNRS();         // sDGNRS-contract-only entrypoint
   217	    error OnlyCoordinator();    // VRF-coordinator-only callback
   218	    error Unauthorized();       // generic access-control failure
   219	    error GameOver();           // the game has ended (or the liveness-timeout game-over trigger is active)
   220	    error NotStarted();         // the game / phase has not started
   221	    error EmptyRevert();        // a delegatecall reverted with empty returndata
   222	    error EmptyReturn();        // a delegatecall returned empty data where a value was required
   223	    error TransferFailed();     // a native / token transfer failed
   224	    error Insolvent();          // a balance / pool draw would underflow the backing
   225	    error Invariant();          // an internal invariant was violated
   226	    error ZeroAddress();        // a required address argument was the zero address
   227	    error ZeroValue();          // a required value argument was zero
   228	    error NothingToClaim();     // no balance available to claim
   229	    error AlreadySwept();       // the target was already swept / finalized
   230	    error LengthMismatch();     // array-length arguments disagree
   231	
   232	    // =========================================================================
   233	    // SLOT 0: Timing, FSM, Counters, Flags, Buffer, Freeze
   234	    // =========================================================================
   235	    // These variables pack into a single 32-byte storage slot for gas efficiency.
   236	    // Order matters: EVM packs from low to high within a slot.
   237	    // 31/32 bytes used (1 byte padding).
   238	
   239	    /// @dev Game day index when the purchase phase (or deploy) began.
   240	    ///      Initialized to GameTimeLib.currentDayIndex() in the constructor.
   241	    ///      Used for death clock, distress mode, future take curve, and gap extension.
   242	    ///
   243	    ///      SECURITY: uint24 holds day indices up to ~16.7 million — effectively unlimited
   244	    ///      for day-granularity counters.
   245	    uint24 internal purchaseStartDay;
   246	
   247	    /// @dev Monotonically increasing "day" counter derived from block timestamps.
   248	    ///      Incremented during game progression; used to key RNG words and track
   249	    ///      daily jackpot eligibility. NOT tied to calendar days — it's game-relative.
   250	    ///
   251	    ///      SECURITY: uint24 holds day indices up to ~16.7 million — effectively unlimited
   252	    ///      for day-granularity counters.
   253	    uint24 internal dailyIdx;
   254	
   255	    /// @dev Timestamp when the last VRF (Chainlink) request was submitted.
   256	    ///      Used for timeout detection: rngRequestTime != 0 means a VRF request
   257	    ///      is in-flight or awaiting processing.
   258	    ///
   259	    ///      SECURITY: Timeout mechanism prevents permanent lockup if VRF fails.
   260	    ///      Note: rngLockedFlag (separate bool) controls the daily RNG lock state.
   261	    uint48 internal rngRequestTime;
   262	
   263	    /// @notice Current jackpot level (starts at 0). Purchase phase targets level + 1.
   264	    ///
   265	    ///      SECURITY: uint24 supports ~16M levels — game would take millennia
   266	    ///      to overflow at realistic progression rates.
   267	    uint24 public level = 0;
   268	
   269	    /// @notice Current game phase flag.
   270	    ///      false = purchase phase
   271	    ///      true  = jackpot phase
   272	    ///
   273	    ///      SECURITY: Phase transitions are guarded by advanceGame flow.
   274	    bool internal jackpotPhaseFlag;
   275	
   276	    // =========================================================================
   277	    // EVM SLOT 0 (continued): Counters and Flags
   278	    // =========================================================================
   279	
   280	    /// @dev Count of jackpots processed within the current level.
   281	    ///      Capped at 5 (JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP in JackpotModule); triggers level
   282	    ///      advancement when reached. Reset at level start.
   283	    ///
   284	    ///      SECURITY: uint8 is sufficient (max 255, only need 0-5).
   285	    uint8 internal jackpotCounter;
   286	
   287	    /// @dev True once the prize target is met for current level.
   288	    ///      When true, next tick skips normal daily/jackpot prep and proceeds
   289	    ///      to jackpot window. Allows early level completion on high activity.
   290	    bool internal lastPurchaseDay;
   291	
   292	    /// @dev Latch to hold decimator window open until RNG is requested.
   293	    ///      Opens at jackpot phase start for levels 4, 14, 24... (not 94) or 99, 199...
   294	    ///      Closes when RNG requested during lastPurchaseDay at resolution levels.
   295	    bool internal decWindowOpen;
   296	
   297	    /// @dev True when daily RNG is locked (jackpot resolution in progress).
   298	    ///      Set when daily VRF is requested, cleared when daily processing completes.
   299	    ///      Mid-day lootbox RNG does NOT set this flag.
   300	    ///      Used to block burns/opens during jackpot resolution window.
   301	    bool internal rngLockedFlag;
   302	
   303	    /// @dev True while jackpot→purchase transition housekeeping is in progress.
   304	    bool internal phaseTransitionActive;
   305	
   306	    /// @dev True once gameover has been triggered (terminal state).
   307	    bool public gameOver;
   308	
   309	    /// @dev True when daily jackpot ETH phase completed but coin+tickets phase pending.
   310	    ///      Gas optimization: splits daily jackpot into multiple advanceGame calls to
