    26	    function pickCharity(uint24 level) external;
    27	}
    28	
    29	/// @notice Delegate-called module for advanceGame and VRF lifecycle handling.
    30	contract DegenerusGameAdvanceModule is DegenerusGameStorage {
    31	    /*+======================================================================+
    32	      |                              ERRORS                                  |
    33	      +======================================================================+*/
    34	
    35	    // error E() — inherited from DegenerusGameStorage
    36	    error MidDayActive(); // A mid-day ticket-swap VRF request is already in flight; cannot start another lootbox RNG request.
    37	    error PreResetWindow(); // Request blocked: within the 15-minute pre-reset window before the daily boundary to avoid competing with daily jackpot RNG.
    38	    error InsufficientLink(); // VRF subscription LINK balance is below the minimum required for a lootbox RNG request.
    39	    error NoPendingLootbox(); // No pending lootbox ETH or FLIP value; nothing to trigger a mid-day RNG request for.
    40	    error BelowThreshold(); // Pending lootbox ETH-equivalent value is below the configured threshold required to trigger mid-day RNG.
    41	    error RngInFlight(); // A VRF request is already in flight (rngRequestTime != 0); cannot start another.
    42	    error NotTimeYet();
    43	    error RngNotReady();
    44	    // error RngLocked() — inherited from DegenerusGameStorage
    45	
    46	    /*+======================================================================+
    47	      |                              EVENTS                                  |
    48	      +======================================================================+*/
    49	
    50	    event Advance(uint8 stage, uint24 lvl);
    51	    event RewardJackpotsSettled(
    52	        uint24 indexed lvl,
    53	        uint256 futurePool,
    54	        uint256 claimableDelta
    55	    );
    56	
    57	    // Advance stage constants (sequential, matching advanceGame flow)
    58	    uint8 private constant STAGE_GAMEOVER = 0;
    59	    uint8 private constant STAGE_RNG_REQUESTED = 1;
    60	    uint8 private constant STAGE_TRANSITION_WORKING = 2;
    61	    uint8 private constant STAGE_TRANSITION_DONE = 3;
    62	    uint8 private constant STAGE_FUTURE_TICKETS_WORKING = 4;
    63	    uint8 private constant STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING = 5;
    64	    uint8 private constant STAGE_PURCHASE_DAILY = 6;
    65	    uint8 private constant STAGE_ENTERED_JACKPOT = 7;
    66	    uint8 private constant STAGE_JACKPOT_COIN_TICKETS = 8;
    67	    uint8 private constant STAGE_JACKPOT_PHASE_ENDED = 9;
    68	    uint8 private constant STAGE_JACKPOT_DAILY_STARTED = 10;
    69	    /// @dev Partial-drain status for the afking process STAGE (mirrors
    70	    ///      STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING): the subscriber set has not yet fully stamped
    71	    ///      this cycle, so advance broke before rngGate and returns mult.
    72	    uint8 private constant STAGE_SUBS_WORKING = 11;
    73	    /// @dev A multi-day VRF-stall gap backfill ran this advance; the day's jackpot
    74	    ///      distribution is deferred to the next advance so the backfill + jackpot never
    75	    ///      share one tx (each stays under the per-tx gas ceiling). rngGate is idempotent on
    76	    ///      re-entry (gapDays == 0 next call), dailyIdx is not yet advanced, so advanceDue()
    77	    ///      stays true and the next advance pays the jackpot with the same frozen word.
    78	    uint8 private constant STAGE_GAP_BACKFILLED = 12;
    79	    /// @dev The funded subscriber set drained to its end this advance AND a multi-day VRF-stall
    80	    ///      gap backfill is pending. rngGate (and its backfill) is deferred to the next advance so
    81	    ///      the heavy completing subscriber chunk and the up-to-120-day backfill never share one tx
    82	    ///      (the upstream mirror of STAGE_GAP_BACKFILLED). subsFullyProcessed is already set and
    83	    ///      dailyIdx is not advanced, so advanceDue() stays true: the next advance runs the backfill
    84	    ///      alone, then defers the jackpot via STAGE_GAP_BACKFILLED.
    85	    uint8 private constant STAGE_SUBS_BACKFILL_DEFERRED = 13;
    86	    event DailyRngApplied(
    87	        uint24 day,
    88	        uint256 rawWord,
    89	        uint256 nudges,
    90	        uint256 finalWord
    91	    );
    92	    event LootboxRngApplied(uint48 index, uint256 word, uint256 requestId);
    93	    event VrfCoordinatorUpdated(
    94	        address indexed previous,
    95	        address indexed current
    96	    );
    97	    event StEthStakeFailed(uint256 amount);
    98	
    99	    /// @notice Emitted when DGNRS is rewarded to the top affiliate.
   100	    /// @param affiliate Address of the top affiliate.
   101	    /// @param level Level for which they were top affiliate.
   102	    /// @param dgnrsAmount Amount of DGNRS paid from the affiliate pool.
   103	    event AffiliateDgnrsReward(
   104	        address indexed affiliate,
   105	        uint24 indexed level,
   106	        uint256 dgnrsAmount
   107	    );
   108	
   109	    /*+=======================================================================+
   110	      |                   PRECOMPUTED ADDRESSES (CONSTANT)                    |
   111	      +=======================================================================+*/
   112	
   113	    IStETH internal constant steth = IStETH(ContractAddresses.STETH_TOKEN);
   114	    /// @notice GNRUS contract for governance resolution at level transitions
   115	    IGNRUSResolve private constant charityResolve =
   116	        IGNRUSResolve(ContractAddresses.GNRUS);
   117	    /// @notice Jackpots contract — direct handle for skip-marker on losing flip days.
   118	    IDegenerusJackpots private constant jackpots =
   119	        IDegenerusJackpots(ContractAddresses.JACKPOTS);
   120	    /*+======================================================================+
   121	      |                           CONSTANTS                                  |
   122	      +======================================================================+*/
   123	
   124	    uint48 private constant GAMEOVER_RNG_FALLBACK_DELAY = 14 days;
   125	    uint8 private constant JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP = 5;
   126	    uint32 private constant VRF_CALLBACK_GAS_LIMIT = 300_000;
   127	
   128	    uint16 private constant VRF_REQUEST_CONFIRMATIONS = 10;
   129	    uint16 private constant VRF_MIDDAY_CONFIRMATIONS = 4;
   130	
   131	    uint32 private constant VAULT_PERPETUAL_ENTRIES = 16;
   132	    uint16 private constant NEXT_TO_FUTURE_BPS_FAST = 3000;
   133	    uint16 private constant NEXT_TO_FUTURE_BPS_MIN = 1300;
   134	    uint16 private constant NEXT_TO_FUTURE_BPS_DAY_STEP = 14;
   135	    uint16 private constant NEXT_TO_FUTURE_BPS_X9_BONUS = 200;
   136	    uint16 private constant NEXT_SKIM_VARIANCE_BPS = 2500;
   137	    uint16 private constant NEXT_SKIM_VARIANCE_MIN_BPS = 1000;
   138	    uint16 private constant INSURANCE_SKIM_BPS = 100; // 1% of nextPool -> yieldAccumulator
   139	    uint16 private constant OVERSHOOT_THRESHOLD_BPS = 12500; // R > 1.25x triggers surcharge
   140	    uint16 private constant OVERSHOOT_CAP_BPS = 3500; // 35% max surcharge
   141	    uint16 private constant OVERSHOOT_COEFF = 4000; // numerator coefficient (0.40 in bps)
   142	    uint16 private constant NEXT_TO_FUTURE_BPS_MAX = 8000; // 80% total skim hard cap
   143	    uint16 private constant ADDITIVE_RANDOM_BPS = 1000; // 0–10% additive random on bps
   144	    bytes32 private constant FUTURE_KEEP_TAG = keccak256("future-keep");
   145	    bytes32 private constant BONUS_TRAITS_TAG = keccak256("BONUS_TRAITS");
   146	    uint96 private constant MIN_LINK_FOR_LOOTBOX_RNG = 40 ether;
   147	    uint48 private constant MIDDAY_RNG_STALL_TIMEOUT = 4 hours;
   148	
   149	    /// @dev Per-call afking process-STAGE gas-weight budget. Every day is uniform: the streak is
   150	    ///      computed on read from the Sub slot (no per-buy `playerQuestStates` STATICCALL, no
   151	    ///      settle day), so there is a SINGLE budget. The STAGE consumes a gas-weight per
   152	    ///      iteration — buys and finalizes are weighted by true marginal cost (a lootbox buy
   153	    ///      ≈34k = `SUB_STAGE_LOOTBOX_WEIGHT` (10), a ticket buy ≈73k = `SUB_STAGE_TICKET_WEIGHT`
   154	    ///      (21), a cross-contract sub-ending finalize / pass-evict / funding-kill ≈27k =
   155	    ///      `SUB_STAGE_EVICT_WEIGHT` (7)) — and ends the chunk on accumulated weight, not raw
   156	    ///      count, so EVERY composition (including a saturated all-evict swap-pop chunk) stays on
   157	    ///      the <10M target with deep headroom to the 16.7M advance-chain ceiling. The lootbox and
   158	    ///      ticket per-chunk counts are unchanged from the prior calibration; only the evict chunk
   159	    ///      shrinks (≈500 → ≈357 finalizes) so a saturated all-evict crank lands ≈9.5M, not ≈13.6M.
   160	    ///      A large set drains across several advanceGame calls.
   161	    uint256 private constant SUB_STAGE_WEIGHT_BUDGET = 2500;
   162	
   163	    /// @notice DGNRS reward for top affiliate: 1% of remaining affiliate pool.
   164	    uint16 private constant AFFILIATE_POOL_REWARD_BPS = 100;
   165	
   166	    /// @notice Max share of affiliate DGNRS pool segregated per level for claims (5%).
   167	    uint16 private constant AFFILIATE_DGNRS_LEVEL_BPS = 500;
   168	
   169	    /// @notice Advance game state. Called daily to process jackpots, mints, and phase transitions.
   170	    ///         Returns mult: the day-epoch stall multiplier (1 base / 2 / 4 / 6 by stall; 0 on
   171	    ///         the gameover path = no bounty). Standalone callers earn nothing — the unified
   172	    ///         afking router pays the re-homed bounty (2x * mult) only when mult > 0.
   173	    function advanceGame() external returns (uint8 mult) {
   174	        mult = 1;
   175	        uint48 ts = uint48(block.timestamp);
   176	        uint24 day = _simulatedDayIndexAt(ts);
   177	        // dailyIdx and rngLockedFlag are stable across every read below: their
   178	        // only writers (_unlockRng, _finalizeRngRequest) execute after the last
   179	        // use of these locals, or on paths that return before reaching it.
   180	        uint24 dIdx = dailyIdx;
   181	        bool locked = rngLockedFlag;
   182	        // RNGREUSE guard: never resolve a NEW wall-day with a prior day's still-unsealed
   183	        // VRF word. If the in-progress day (dailyIdx+1) already recorded its word but was
   184	        // not yet sealed (_unlockRng deferred behind chunked drains / a pending daily
   185	        // jackpot / a phase transition) and the wall-clock has moved past it, clamp this
   186	        // advance to that day so its OWN word resolves it: rngGate returns the cached word,
   187	        // the deferred jackpot half stays on its Phase-1 word, and the afking box keeps a
   188	        // real word. The next advance picks up the wall-day with a fresh VRF request.
   189	        // Distinct from a VRF gap stall (rngWordByDay[dailyIdx+1] == 0 → backfill path).
   190	        if (day > dIdx + 1 && rngWordByDay[dIdx + 1] != 0) {
   191	            day = dIdx + 1;
   192	        }
   193	        bool inJackpot = jackpotPhaseFlag;
   194	        uint24 lvl = level;
   195	        uint24 psd = purchaseStartDay;
   196	        // Turbo: if target already met on day ≤1, flag now so the upcoming
   197	        // _requestRng does the level pre-increment (matching normal
   198	        // lastPurchaseDay flow). Skipped when rngLockedFlag is set because
   199	        // rngGate will take the fresh-word path instead of _requestRng, so
   200	        // the level pre-increment would be missed and the (lastPurchase &&
   201	        // rngLockedFlag) ternary below would compute purchaseLevel = 0.
   202	        if (!inJackpot && !lastPurchaseDay && !locked) {
   203	            uint32 purchaseDays = day - psd;
   204	            if (
   205	                purchaseDays <= 1 && _getNextPrizePool() >= levelPrizePool[lvl]
   206	            ) {
   207	                lastPurchaseDay = true;
   208	                compressedJackpotFlag = 2;
   209	            }
   210	        }
   211	        bool lastPurchase = (!inJackpot) && lastPurchaseDay;
   212	        // Level already incremented at RNG request when lastPurchase=true
   213	        uint24 purchaseLevel = (lastPurchase && locked) ? lvl : lvl + 1;
   214	        // The VRF-death deadman also enters here during jackpot / last-purchase, where the
   215	        // normal !inJackpot && !lastPurchase gate would otherwise skip the game-over path.
   216	        if ((!inJackpot && !lastPurchase) || _vrfDeadmanFired()) {
   217	            (bool goReturn, uint8 goStage) = _handleGameOverPath(day, lvl);
   218	            if (goReturn) {
   219	                // Gameover path: advance ran but earns NO router bounty (the flip-credit
   220	                // coin is worthless at gameover) — return mult = 0 so mintFlip pays nothing.
   221	                emit Advance(goStage, lvl);
   222	                return 0;
   223	            }
   224	        }
   225	
   226	        // --- Mid-day path: same-day queue draining ---
   227	        if (day == dIdx) {
   228	            // Step 1: Finish draining the read slot if not yet fully processed
   229	            if (!ticketsFullyProcessed) {
   230	                // If mid-day ticket swap is pending, wait for VRF word before
   231	                // processing. One packed read covers both the flag and the index.
   232	                uint256 lrPacked = lootboxRngPacked;
   233	                if (((lrPacked >> LR_MID_DAY_SHIFT) & LR_MID_DAY_MASK) != 0) {
   234	                    uint256 word = lootboxRngWordByIndex[
   235	                        uint48((lrPacked >> LR_INDEX_SHIFT) & LR_INDEX_MASK) - 1
   236	                    ];
   237	                    if (word == 0) revert RngNotReady();
   238	                }
   239	
   240	                uint24 rk = _tqReadKey(purchaseLevel);
   241	                // The draw is gated on BOTH the normal queue AND the foil drain: keep
   242	                // draining while the normal queue OR a sealed-but-un-drained foil bucket
   243	                // (resolved on leftover budget) remains, else foil's boosted entries
   244	                // silently under-resolve into the jackpot.
   245	                if (
   246	                    ticketQueue[rk].length > 0 ||
   247	                    _foilDrainPending()
   248	                ) {
   249	                    (
   250	                        bool ticketWorked,
   251	                        bool ticketsFinished
   252	                    ) = _runProcessTicketBatch(purchaseLevel);
   253	                    if (ticketWorked || !ticketsFinished) {
   254	                        if (ticketsFinished) {
   255	                            ticketsFullyProcessed = true;
   256	                            _lrWrite(LR_MID_DAY_SHIFT, LR_MID_DAY_MASK, 0);
   257	                        }
   258	                        emit Advance(STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING, lvl);
   259	                        // Mid-day partial-drain: mult = 1 (no escalation).
   260	                        return mult;
   390	                        stage = STAGE_SUBS_WORKING;
   391	                        break;
   392	                    }
   393	                    // The set drained to its end THIS tx — a heavy completing chunk (up to the
   394	                    // weight budget, or a saturated all-evict swap-pop chunk that empties the set
   395	                    // in one pass). If a multi-day VRF-stall gap backfill is ALSO pending, defer
   396	                    // rngGate to the next advance so the completing subscriber chunk and the
   397	                    // up-to-120-day backfill never share one tx and blow the per-tx gas ceiling.
   398	                    // Upstream mirror of the STAGE_GAP_BACKFILLED decouple: same gate rngGate uses
   399	                    // to enter _backfillGapDays. dailyIdx is unadvanced and rngWordByDay[day] is
   400	                    // unset, so advanceDue() stays true and the next advance runs the (idempotent)
   401	                    // rngGate — it backfills, then defers the jackpot via STAGE_GAP_BACKFILLED.
   402	                    subsFullyProcessed = true;
   403	                    if (
   404	                        rngWordCurrent != 0 &&
   405	                        rngRequestTime != 0 &&
   406	                        day > dIdx + 1 &&
   407	                        rngWordByDay[dIdx + 1] == 0
   408	                    ) {
   409	                        stage = STAGE_SUBS_BACKFILL_DEFERRED;
   410	                        break;
   411	                    }
   412	                } else {
   413	                    // Empty set — nothing was stamped, no heavy chunk to segregate. Fall through
   414	                    // to rngGate (a lone backfill stays under the per-tx ceiling).
   415	                    subsFullyProcessed = true;
   416	                }
   417	            }
   418	
   419	            // RNG: use existing word or request new one. Precompute the day's coinflip reward
   420	            // bonus from the frozen level: +2 on a bonus day (level 0 or a level's first jackpot
   421	            // day), +6 on a post-BAF x0-level first-jackpot-day (levels 10, 20, 30, …; level 0
   422	            // is excluded — no BAF precedes it), 0 otherwise. Sized so a recycling (auto-rebuy)
   423	            // player nets ~99.9% / ~101.9% RTP once the 0.75% recycle bonus compounds in.
   424	            bool bonusDay = (inJackpot && jackpotCounter == 0) || lvl == 0;
   425	            uint8 coinflipBonus = bonusDay
   426	                ? (lvl != 0 && lvl % 10 == 0 ? 6 : 2)
   427	                : 0;
   428	            (uint256 rngWord, uint32 gapDays) = rngGate(
   429	                ts,
   430	                day,
   431	                purchaseLevel,
   432	                lastPurchase,
   433	                coinflipBonus
   434	            );
   435	            psd += uint24(gapDays);
   436	            if (rngWord == 1) {
   437	                _swapAndFreeze();
   438	                stage = STAGE_RNG_REQUESTED;
   439	                break;
   440	            }
   441	
   442	            // Decouple a multi-day VRF-stall gap backfill from the day's jackpot distribution:
   443	            // if rngGate just backfilled a gap (gapDays != 0), defer everything downstream (the
   444	            // phase transition + the up-to-305-winner daily jackpot) to the next advance so the
   445	            // backfill and the jackpot never execute in one tx (each stays under the per-tx gas
   446	            // ceiling). rngGate is idempotent (rngWordByDay[day] is now set -> gapDays == 0 next
   447	            // call) and dailyIdx is not yet advanced (no _unlockRng reached), so advanceDue() stays
   448	            // true and the next advance pays the jackpot with the same frozen word. The break
   449	            // returns mult so the keeper is paid for the backfill work (mirrors the partial drains).
   450	            if (gapDays != 0) {
   451	                stage = STAGE_GAP_BACKFILLED;
   452	                break;
   453	            }
   454	
   455	            // Phase transition housekeeping + FF promotion
   456	            if (phaseTransitionActive) {
   457	                // Drain the one FF level that entered near-future at this level transition.
   458	                // At new level L, the boundary moved from >L+4 to >L+5, making L+5 near-future.
   459	                // No new FF entries can arrive at L+5 (tickets targeting it now route to write key).
   460	                // purchaseLevel = level + 1, so the FF level is purchaseLevel + 4 = level + 5.
   461	                uint24 ffLevel = purchaseLevel + 4;
   462	                bool resumingFF = (ticketLevel ==
   463	                    (ffLevel | TICKET_FAR_FUTURE_BIT));
   464	                if (!resumingFF) {
   465	                    _processPhaseTransition(purchaseLevel);
   466	                    // Set up FF drain — ticketLevel signals we've completed transition housekeeping
   467	                    ticketLevel = ffLevel | TICKET_FAR_FUTURE_BIT;
   468	                    ticketCursor = 0;
   469	                }
   470	                (bool ffWorked, bool ffFinished, ) = _processFutureTicketBatch(
   471	                    ffLevel,
   472	                    rngWord
   473	                );
   474	                if (ffWorked || !ffFinished) {
   475	                    stage = STAGE_TRANSITION_WORKING;
   476	                    break;
   477	                }
   478	                phaseTransitionActive = false;
   479	                _unlockRng(day);
   480	                purchaseStartDay = day;
   481	                jackpotPhaseFlag = false;
   482	                stage = STAGE_TRANSITION_DONE;
   483	                break;
   484	            }
   485	
   486	            // Process near-future ticket queues before daily draws
   487	            // to include fresh lootbox-driven tickets
   488	            if (!dailyJackpotCoinTicketsPending) {
   489	                if (
   490	                    !_prepareFutureTickets(
   491	                        inJackpot ? lvl : purchaseLevel,
   492	                        rngWord
   493	                    )
   494	                ) {
   495	                    stage = STAGE_FUTURE_TICKETS_WORKING;
   496	                    break;
   497	                }
   498	            }
   499	
   500	            // Process current level tickets:
   501	            // Purchase phase processes purchaseLevel (= level+1) where new tickets route.
   502	            // Jackpot phase processes level where jackpot-phase tickets route.
   503	            (bool ticketWorked, bool ticketsFinished) = _runProcessTicketBatch(
   504	                inJackpot ? lvl : purchaseLevel
   505	            );
   506	            if (ticketWorked || !ticketsFinished) {
   507	                stage = STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING;
   508	                break;
   509	            }
   510	            ticketsFullyProcessed = true; // set before jackpot/phase logic
   511	
   512	            // === PURCHASE PHASE ===
   513	            if (!inJackpot) {
   514	                // Pre-target: daily jackpots while building prize pool.
   515	                // lastPurchase equals lastPurchaseDay here (read after the turbo
   516	                // write, inside !inJackpot, with no writer on the path between).
   517	                if (!lastPurchase) {
   518	                    if (purchaseLevel == 1) {
   519	                        // Self-call into GAME (which delegatecalls the jackpot
   520	                        // module) so msg.sender == address(this) passes the
   521	                        // module's OnlyGame check.
   522	                        IDegenerusGame(address(this)).emitDailyWinningTraits(
   523	                            1,
   524	                            rngWord,
   525	                            1
   526	                        );
   527	                        _payDailyCoinJackpot(1, rngWord, 1, 1);
   528	                        uint256 saltedRng = uint256(
   529	                            keccak256(
   530	                                abi.encodePacked(rngWord, BONUS_TRAITS_TAG)
   531	                            )
   532	                        );
   533	                        _payDailyCoinJackpot(1, saltedRng, 2, 5);
   534	                    } else {
   535	                        payDailyJackpot(false, purchaseLevel, rngWord);
   536	                        _payDailyCoinJackpot(
   537	                            purchaseLevel,
   538	                            rngWord,
   539	                            purchaseLevel + 1,
   540	                            purchaseLevel + 4
   541	                        );
   542	                    }
   543	                    bool targetMet = _getNextPrizePool() >=
   544	                        levelPrizePool[purchaseLevel - 1];
   545	                    if (targetMet) {
   546	                        lastPurchaseDay = true;
   547	                        if (day - psd <= 3) {
   548	                            compressedJackpotFlag = 1;
   549	                        }
   550	                    }
   551	                    _unlockRng(day);
   552	                    stage = STAGE_PURCHASE_DAILY;
   553	                    break;
   554	                }
   555	
   556	                // Activate next-level tickets before jackpot phase
   557	                {
   558	                    uint24 nextLevel = purchaseLevel + 1;
   559	                    (
   560	                        bool futureWorked,
   561	                        bool futureFinished,
   562	
   563	                    ) = _processFutureTicketBatch(nextLevel, rngWord);
   564	                    if (futureWorked || !futureFinished) {
   565	                        stage = STAGE_FUTURE_TICKETS_WORKING;
   566	                        break;
   567	                    }
   568	                }
   569	
   570	                // Consolidate prize pools for level transition
   571	                levelPrizePool[purchaseLevel] = _getNextPrizePool();
   572	                _distributeYieldSurplus(rngWord);
   573	                _consolidatePoolsAndRewardJackpots(
   574	                    lvl,
   575	                    purchaseLevel,
   576	                    day,
   577	                    rngWord,
   578	                    psd
   579	                );
   580	
   581	                if (lvl >= 3 && _psRead(PS_ACTIVE_SHIFT, PS_ACTIVE_MASK) != 0) {
   582	                    _psWrite(PS_ACTIVE_SHIFT, PS_ACTIVE_MASK, 0);
   583	                }
   584	
   585	                // Transition to jackpot phase
   586	                jackpotPhaseFlag = true;
   587	
   588	                lastPurchaseDay = false;
   589	
   590	                // Roll level quest at level transition so it's active during jackpot phase
   591	                quests.rollLevelQuest(rngWord);
   592	
   593	                // Do not unlock here: allows day-1 jackpot processing to run on
   594	                // the same day as the transition day.
   595	                stage = STAGE_ENTERED_JACKPOT;
   596	                break;
   597	            }
   598	
   599	            // === JACKPOT PHASE ===
   600	
   601	            // Complete coin+ticket distribution
   602	            if (dailyJackpotCoinTicketsPending) {
   603	                payDailyJackpotCoinAndTickets(rngWord);
   604	                if (jackpotCounter >= JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP) {
   605	                    _endPhase(lvl);
   606	                    stage = STAGE_JACKPOT_PHASE_ENDED;
   607	                    break;
   608	                }
   609	                _unlockRng(day);
   610	                stage = STAGE_JACKPOT_COIN_TICKETS;
   611	                break;
   612	            }
   613	
   614	            // Fresh daily jackpot
   615	            payDailyJackpot(true, lvl, rngWord);
   616	            stage = STAGE_JACKPOT_DAILY_STARTED;
   617	        } while (false);
   618	
   619	        // New-day advance leg: `mult` already holds the day-epoch stall ladder (1/2/4/6)
   620	        // the router scales the re-homed bounty by.
   621	        emit Advance(stage, lvl);
   622	    }
   623	
   624	    /*+========================================================================================+
   625	      |                    ADMIN VRF FUNCTIONS                                                 |
   626	      +========================================================================================+
   627	      |  Deploy-only VRF setup called from the ContractAddresses.ADMIN constructor.            |
   628	      |  Post-deploy VRF changes use updateVrfCoordinatorAndSub (emergency rotation).          |
   629	      +========================================================================================+*/
   630	
   631	    /// @notice Wire VRF config, called once from the ADMIN constructor during deployment.
   632	    /// @dev Access: ContractAddresses.ADMIN only. No post-deploy caller exists on ADMIN;
   633	    ///      emergency VRF rotation uses updateVrfCoordinatorAndSub instead.
   634	    /// @param coordinator_ Chainlink VRF V2.5 coordinator address.
   635	    /// @param subId VRF subscription ID for LINK billing.
   636	    /// @param keyHash_ VRF key hash for gas lane selection.
   637	    function wireVrf(
   638	        address coordinator_,
   639	        uint256 subId,
   640	        bytes32 keyHash_
   641	    ) external {
   642	        if (msg.sender != ContractAddresses.ADMIN) revert OnlyAdmin();
   643	
   644	        address current = address(vrfCoordinator);
   645	        _setVrfConfig(coordinator_, subId, keyHash_);
   646	        lastVrfProcessedTimestamp = uint48(block.timestamp);
   647	        emit VrfCoordinatorUpdated(current, coordinator_);
   648	    }
   649	
   650	    /*+======================================================================+
   651	      |                    GAMEOVER / LIVENESS GUARDS                        |
   652	      +======================================================================+*/
   653	
   654	    /// @dev Handles gameover state and liveness guard checks.
   655	    ///      Returns (shouldReturn, stage). shouldReturn=true means advanceGame
   656	    ///      should emit `stage` and exit. Stages used:
   657	    ///         STAGE_GAMEOVER -- normal game-over completion or final sweep
   658	    ///         STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING -- partial best-effort drain; caller retries
   659	    function _handleGameOverPath(
   660	        uint24 day,
   661	        uint24 lvl
   662	    ) private returns (bool shouldReturn, uint8 stage) {
   663	        // Liveness guard: prevent permanent lockup if game is abandoned.
   664	        // Uses the shared _livenessTriggered() helper so purchase paths (in
   665	        // DegenerusGameMintModule) can reuse the same predicate to block new
   666	        // purchases during the multi-tx game-over drain sequence.
   667	        bool ok;
   668	        bytes memory data;
   669	
   670	        // gameOver check precedes liveness so the post-gameover final-sweep path
   671	        // stays reachable after the VRF-dead path latches gameOver with day-math
   672	        // still below the 120/365 threshold (e.g., VRF breaks on day 14).
   673	        if (gameOver) {
   674	            // Post-gameover: check for final sweep (1 month after gameover)
   675	            (ok, data) = ContractAddresses.GAME_GAMEOVER_MODULE.delegatecall(
   676	                abi.encodeWithSelector(
   677	                    IDegenerusGameGameOverModule.handleFinalSweep.selector
   678	                )
   679	            );
   680	            if (!ok) _revertDelegate(data);
   681	            return (true, STAGE_GAMEOVER);
   682	        }
   683	
   684	        // _livenessTriggered now folds in the VRF-death deadman, so it returns true here even
   685	        // during jackpot / last-purchase when the game has been stalled past the deadman.
   686	        if (!_livenessTriggered()) return (false, 0);
   687	
   688	        // Safety: don't activate game over if nextPool requirement is already met — but the
   689	        // VRF-death deadman overrides it: a permanently-stalled game must drain even if its pool
   690	        // target reads as met.
   691	        if (
   692	            lvl != 0 &&
   693	            _getNextPrizePool() >= levelPrizePool[lvl] &&
   694	            !_vrfDeadmanFired()
   695	        ) {
   696	            return (false, 0);
   697	        }
   698	
   699	        // Pre-gameover: acquire RNG, drain, then unlock
   700	        if (rngWordByDay[day] == 0) {
   701	            uint256 rngWord = _gameOverEntropy(
   702	                uint48(block.timestamp),
   703	                day,
   704	                lvl,
   705	                lastPurchaseDay
   706	            );
   707	            if (rngWord == 1 || rngWord == 0) return (true, STAGE_GAMEOVER);
   708	        }
   709	
   710	        // Best-effort drain of queued tickets so every purchased ticket is
   711	        // eligible for the terminal jackpot trait-bucket share. Both ticket
   712	        // slots drain ONE batch per tx (mirroring the normal daily ticket
   713	        // drain): after any batch does work the path breaks with
   714	        // STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING, so a finishing batch never composes with a
   715	        // second ticket batch -- or with handleGameOverDrain's terminal
   716	        // jackpot -- inside one transaction. That composition would push a
   717	        // single advanceGame tx past the EIP-7825 per-tx gas ceiling and
   718	        // permanently brick the game-over heartbeat. handleGameOverDrain runs
   719	        // only in its OWN tx, entered with ticketsFullyProcessed already set.
   720	        //
   721	        // FUND-RELEASE FALLBACK: a catastrophic delegatecall revert (e.g., an
   722	        // unforeseen error in ticket processing) is swallowed so game-over
   723	        // continues straight to handleGameOverDrain -- undrained tickets forfeit
   724	        // trait-bucket eligibility, but terminal fund release is never blocked.
   725	        if (!ticketsFullyProcessed) {
   726	            (bool dOk, bytes memory dData) = ContractAddresses
   727	                .GAME_MINT_MODULE
   728	                .delegatecall(
   729	                    abi.encodeWithSelector(
   730	                        IDegenerusGameMintModule.processTicketBatch.selector,
   731	                        lvl + 1
   732	                    )
   733	                );
   734	            if (dOk && dData.length >= 64) {
   735	                (bool finished, ) = abi.decode(dData, (bool, bool));
   736	                if (!finished) {
   737	                    // Read slot has more entries -- retry next tx.
   738	                    return (true, STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING);
   739	                }
   740	                // Read slot drained: swap the write slot into the read position
   741	                // (safe because the read queue is now empty) so its tickets
   742	                // drain on the next tx. When the swapped-in slot is already
   743	                // empty, both slots are drained -- mark fully processed. Either
   744	                // way break, so the terminal jackpot runs in its own tx.
   745	                _swapTicketSlot();
   746	                if (ticketQueue[_tqReadKey(lvl + 1)].length == 0) {
   747	                    ticketsFullyProcessed = true;
   748	                }
   749	                return (true, STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING);
   750	            }
   751	            // dOk=false -> swallow, fall through to handleGameOverDrain.
   752	        }
   753	
   754	        (ok, data) = ContractAddresses.GAME_GAMEOVER_MODULE.delegatecall(
   755	            abi.encodeWithSelector(
   756	                IDegenerusGameGameOverModule.handleGameOverDrain.selector,
   757	                day
   758	            )
   759	        );
   760	        if (!ok) _revertDelegate(data);
   761	        _unlockRng(day);
   762	        return (true, STAGE_GAMEOVER);
   763	    }
   764	
   765	    /*+======================================================================+
   766	      |                           LEVEL END                                 |
   767	      +======================================================================+*/
   768	    function _endPhase(uint24 lvl) private {
   769	        phaseTransitionActive = true;
   770	        if (lvl % 100 == 0) {
   771	            levelPrizePool[lvl] = _getFuturePrizePool() / 3;
   772	        }
   773	        jackpotCounter = 0;
   774	        compressedJackpotFlag = 0;
   775	    }
   776	
   777	    /*+================================================================================================================+
   778	      |                    DELEGATE MODULE HELPERS                                                                     |
   779	      +================================================================================================================+
   780	      |  Internal functions that delegatecall into specialized modules.                                                |
   781	      |  All modules MUST inherit DegenerusGameStorage for slot alignment.                                             |
   782	      |                                                                                                                |
   783	      |  Modules:                                                                                                      |
   784	      |  • ContractAddresses.GAME_DECIMATOR_MODULE - Decimator claim credits and lootbox payouts                       |
   785	      |  • ContractAddresses.GAME_MINT_MODULE     - Mint data recording, airdrop multipliers                           |
   786	      |  • ContractAddresses.GAME_WHALE_MODULE    - Whale pass purchases and whale pass claims                       |
   787	      |  • ContractAddresses.GAME_JACKPOT_MODULE  - Jackpot calculations and payouts                                   |
   788	      |                                                                                                                |
   789	      |  SECURITY: delegatecall executes module code in this contract's                                                |
   790	      |  context, with access to all storage. Modules are constant.                                                    |
   791	      +================================================================================================================+*/
   792	
   793	    /// @dev Reward the top affiliate for a level and segregate per-level DGNRS allocation.
   794	    ///      After the 1% top-affiliate draw, snapshots 5% of the remaining affiliate
   795	    ///      pool into the allocation half of levelDgnrsPacked[lvl]. Affiliate scores
   796	    ///      always route to level + 1 during gameplay, so at transition time (when level
   797	    ///      becomes lvl), all scores at index lvl are frozen — new scores go to lvl + 1.
   798	    ///      Claims read the allocation half of levelDgnrsPacked[currLevel] directly.
   799	    ///      Unclaimed tokens are never physically moved — they remain in the pool
   800	    ///      and naturally roll into the next level's snapshot.
   801	    function _rewardTopAffiliate(uint24 lvl) private {
   802	        (address top, ) = affiliate.affiliateTop(lvl);
   803	
   804	        uint256 poolBalance = dgnrs.poolBalance(
   805	            IsDGNRS.Pool.Affiliate
   806	        );
   807	        if (top != address(0)) {
   808	            uint256 dgnrsReward = (poolBalance * AFFILIATE_POOL_REWARD_BPS) /
   809	                10_000;
   810	            uint256 paid = dgnrs.transferFromPool(
   811	                IsDGNRS.Pool.Affiliate,
   812	                top,
   813	                dgnrsReward
   814	            );
   815	            emit AffiliateDgnrsReward(top, lvl, paid);
   816	            // transferFromPool returns the exact pool decrement (clamped to the
   817	            // available balance, zero on the empty-pool path), so the remaining
   818	            // pool is derivable without a second external read.
   819	            poolBalance -= paid;
   820	        }
  1760	    }
  1761	
  1762	    /// @dev Swap queue buffer AND activate the prize pool freeze (daily RNG path only).
  1763	    function _swapAndFreeze() internal {
  1764	        _swapTicketSlot();
  1765	        _freezePool();
  1766	    }
  1767	
  1768	    /// @dev Apply pending accumulators to live pools and clear freeze.
  1769	    ///      No-op if not currently frozen.
  1770	    function _unfreezePool() internal {
  1771	        if (!prizePoolFrozen) return;
  1772	        (uint128 pNext, uint128 pFuture) = _getPendingPools();
  1773	        (uint128 next, uint128 future) = _getPrizePools();
  1774	        _setPrizePools(next + pNext, future + pFuture);
  1775	        prizePoolPendingPacked = 0;
  1776	        prizePoolFrozen = false;
  1777	    }
  1778	
  1779	    function _finalizeRngRequest(
  1780	        bool isTicketJackpotDay,
  1781	        uint24 lvl,
  1782	        uint256 requestId
  1783	    ) private {
  1784	        // isRetry: some VRF request already reserved the lootbox index (a daily retry OR an
  1785	        // in-flight mid-day lootbox request) — so the index must not be advanced again.
  1786	        bool isRetry = vrfRequestId != 0 &&
  1787	            rngRequestTime != 0 &&
  1788	            rngWordCurrent == 0;
  1789	        // isDailyRetry: a genuine retry of the *daily* request. A daily request holds the lock
  1790	        // (rngLockedFlag set true by the first daily request); a mid-day lootbox request leaves
  1791	        // rngLockedFlag false. Distinguishing them stops an in-flight lootbox request from
  1792	        // making this fresh daily request look like a retry and skip the level increment below.
  1793	        bool isDailyRetry = isRetry && rngLockedFlag;
  1794	        if (!isRetry) {
  1795	            // Fresh request: advance lootbox index so new purchases target the NEXT RNG.
  1796	            _lrAdvanceIndexClearPending();
  1797	        }
  1798	        // Retry: index already advanced from the original request. No action needed —
  1799	        // lootboxRngIndex - 1 still points to the pending index regardless of request ID.
  1800	
  1801	        vrfRequestId = requestId;
  1802	        rngWordCurrent = 0;
  1803	        rngRequestTime = uint48(block.timestamp);
  1804	        rngLockedFlag = true;
  1805	
  1806	        // Close the FLIP purchase window at the final jackpot day's RNG request — the boundary where
  1807	        // new tickets begin routing to the next level (mirrors the route-to-level+1 step in the mint
  1808	        // module). jackpotCounter + step catches the final daily jackpot; the isTicketJackpotDay
  1809	        // (level-transition) request catches the single-day turbo jackpot, where jackpotPhaseFlag is
  1810	        // not yet set here.
  1811	        if (ticketRedemptionOpen && (jackpotPhaseFlag || isTicketJackpotDay)) {
  1812	            uint8 jpStep = 1;
  1813	            if (compressedJackpotFlag == 2 && jackpotCounter == 0) {
  1814	                jpStep = JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP;
  1815	            } else if (
  1816	                compressedJackpotFlag == 1 &&
  1817	                jackpotCounter > 0 &&
  1818	                jackpotCounter < JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP - 1
  1819	            ) {
  1820	                jpStep = 2;
  1821	            }
  1822	            if (jackpotCounter + jpStep >= JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP) {
  1823	                ticketRedemptionOpen = false;
  1824	            }
  1825	        }
  1826	
  1827	        // Increment level at RNG request time when lastPurchaseDay = true.
  1828	        // lvl is already purchaseLevel (= level + 1), so set directly.
  1829	        // Only on a fresh daily request - a daily retry would double-increment, and an
  1830	        // in-flight mid-day lootbox request must not suppress this increment.
  1831	        if (isTicketJackpotDay && !isDailyRetry) {
  1832	            // Snapshot affiliate reward before level increment.
  1833	            // Scores routed to lvl (= level + 1) during the purchase phase just ended.
  1834	            _rewardTopAffiliate(lvl);
  1835	            level = lvl;
  1836	
  1837	            // Decimator window: open at x4/x99, close at x5/x00
  1838	            uint24 mod100 = lvl % 100;
  1839	            uint24 mod10 = lvl % 10;
  1840	            if ((mod10 == 4 && mod100 != 94) || mod100 == 99) {
  1841	                decWindowOpen = true;
  1842	            } else if (
  1843	                decWindowOpen && ((mod10 == 5 && mod100 != 95) || mod100 == 0)
  1844	            ) {
  1845	                decWindowOpen = false;
  1846	            }
  1847	
  1848	            // Resolve charity governance for the completed level.
  1849	            // lvl is the NEW level (old level + 1). CHARITY.currentLevel tracks
  1850	            // the CURRENT governance level (starts at 0, incremented by pickCharity).
  1851	            // The game's level 0->1 transition means level 0 gameplay is complete,
  1852	            // so we resolve governance for level 0 = lvl - 1.
  1853	            charityResolve.pickCharity(lvl - 1);
  1854	        }
  1855	    }
  1856	
  1857	    /// @notice Emergency VRF coordinator rotation (governance-gated).
  1858	    /// @dev Access: ContractAddresses.ADMIN only. The Admin contract enforces
  1859	    ///      stall duration via sDGNRS-holder governance (propose/vote/execute).
  1860	    /// @param newCoordinator New VRF coordinator address.
  1861	    /// @param newSubId New subscription ID.
  1862	    /// @param newKeyHash New key hash for the gas lane.
  1863	    function updateVrfCoordinatorAndSub(
  1864	        address newCoordinator,
  1865	        uint256 newSubId,
  1866	        bytes32 newKeyHash
  1867	    ) external {
  1868	        if (msg.sender != ContractAddresses.ADMIN) revert OnlyAdmin();
  1869	
  1870	        address current = address(vrfCoordinator);
  1871	        _setVrfConfig(newCoordinator, newSubId, newKeyHash);
  1872	
  1873	        // Detect what is in flight and re-issue on the new coordinator.
  1874	        // The request is accepted before the new subscription is LINK-funded; DegenerusAdmin
  1875	        // funds it in the same _executeSwap transaction (transferAndCall), and the VRF node
  1876	        // fulfills once funded. If the new coordinator also stalls, the daily advance abandons a
  1877	        // mid-day request and promotes it to the daily word after MIDDAY_RNG_STALL_TIMEOUT.
  1878	        if (_lrRead(LR_MID_DAY_SHIFT, LR_MID_DAY_MASK) != 0) {
  1879	            // Mid-day in flight: KEEP LR_MID_DAY=1; LR_INDEX preserved so the new word lands
  1880	            // in the same reserved slot [N] via the mid-day fulfillment branch (:1772).
  1881	            vrfRequestId = _requestVrfWord(VRF_MIDDAY_CONFIRMATIONS);
  1882	            rngRequestTime = uint48(block.timestamp);
  1883	        } else if (rngLockedFlag) {
  1884	            // Daily in flight: KEEP rngLockedFlag=true.
  1885	            if (rngWordCurrent == 0) {
  1886	                // Daily word not yet delivered: re-request on the new coordinator (-> :1768).
  1887	                vrfRequestId = _requestVrfWord(VRF_REQUEST_CONFIRMATIONS);
  1888	                rngRequestTime = uint48(block.timestamp);
  1889	            }
  1890	            // else: daily word already delivered and valid -> preserve it; no re-issue
  1891	            // (a fresh callback would be rejected by the :1761 rngWordCurrent!=0 guard).
  1892	        }
  1893	        // else: nothing in flight -> config repoint only; no re-issue, no flag change.
  1894	
  1895	        // Intentional: totalFlipReversals is NOT reset here. Nudges were purchased
  1896	        // with irreversible FLIP burns before or during the stall. They carry over
  1897	        // and apply to the first post-swap VRF word via _applyDailyRng. Resetting
  1898	        // would steal user value (burned FLIP for zero effect).
  1899	
  1900	        emit VrfCoordinatorUpdated(current, newCoordinator);
  1901	    }
  1902	
  1903	    /// @dev Unlock RNG after processing is complete for the day.
  1904	    ///      Resets VRF state and re-enables RNG usage.

   358	            // --- Afking process STAGE: stamp the funded subscriber set BEFORE the day
   359	            // requests its RNG. Inserted on the new-day path only, after the daily
   360	            // ticket-drain gate and strictly before rngGate. The mid-day same-day path
   361	            // returns earlier, so the STAGE never runs mid-day. Chunked by SUB_STAGE_BATCH across advance calls
   362	            // (BUY_BATCH-style) so a large set stays under the 16.7M advance-chain
   363	            // ceiling — mirrors the ticketsFullyProcessed partial-drain discipline:
   364	            // break + return mult while !subsFullyProcessed; set true only at cursor
   365	            // end; then fall through to rngGate.
   366	            //
   367	            // The STAGE runs strictly pre-RNG (before rngGate writes the day's word), so
   368	            // rngWordByDay[processDay] is uncommitted when a sub is stamped — the
   369	            // load-bearing freeze property. The box reads the LIVE level +
   370	            // rngWordByDay[lastAutoBoughtDay] at open.
   371	            //
   372	            // Forward-looking per-day reset: the first time the advance enters a new `day`,
   373	            // flip the drain gate + cursor BEFORE that day's STAGE runs. subsFullyProcessed
   374	            // stays true after a day's STAGE completes (it means "afking done for that day")
   375	            // until the next day flips it here. Stamped to `day` at the reset, so it fires
   376	            // exactly once per day and never re-fires within the day (independent of when
   377	            // dailyIdx catches up in _unlockRng).
   378	            if (_afkingResetDay != day) {
   379	                _afkingResetDay = day;
   380	                subsFullyProcessed = false;
   381	                _subCursor = 0;
   382	            }
   383	            if (!subsFullyProcessed) {
   384	                if (_subscribers.length != 0) {
   385	                    _runSubscriberStage(day);
   386	                    if (_subCursor < _subscribers.length) {
   387	                        // Partial drain: more subs remain this cycle — break before
   388	                        // rngGate and return mult (no RNG request yet). subsFullyProcessed
   389	                        // stays false; the next advance call resumes the cursor.
   390	                        stage = STAGE_SUBS_WORKING;
   391	                        break;
   392	                    }
   393	                    // The set drained to its end THIS tx — a heavy completing chunk (up to the
   394	                    // weight budget, or a saturated all-evict swap-pop chunk that empties the set
   395	                    // in one pass). If a multi-day VRF-stall gap backfill is ALSO pending, defer
   396	                    // rngGate to the next advance so the completing subscriber chunk and the
   397	                    // up-to-120-day backfill never share one tx and blow the per-tx gas ceiling.
   398	                    // Upstream mirror of the STAGE_GAP_BACKFILLED decouple: same gate rngGate uses
   399	                    // to enter _backfillGapDays. dailyIdx is unadvanced and rngWordByDay[day] is
   400	                    // unset, so advanceDue() stays true and the next advance runs the (idempotent)
   401	                    // rngGate — it backfills, then defers the jackpot via STAGE_GAP_BACKFILLED.
   402	                    subsFullyProcessed = true;
   403	                    if (
   404	                        rngWordCurrent != 0 &&
   405	                        rngRequestTime != 0 &&
   406	                        day > dIdx + 1 &&
   407	                        rngWordByDay[dIdx + 1] == 0
   408	                    ) {
   409	                        stage = STAGE_SUBS_BACKFILL_DEFERRED;
   410	                        break;
   411	                    }
   412	                } else {
   413	                    // Empty set — nothing was stamped, no heavy chunk to segregate. Fall through
   414	                    // to rngGate (a lone backfill stays under the per-tx ceiling).
   415	                    subsFullyProcessed = true;
   416	                }
   417	            }
   418	
   419	            // RNG: use existing word or request new one. Precompute the day's coinflip reward
   420	            // bonus from the frozen level: +2 on a bonus day (level 0 or a level's first jackpot
   421	            // day), +6 on a post-BAF x0-level first-jackpot-day (levels 10, 20, 30, …; level 0
   422	            // is excluded — no BAF precedes it), 0 otherwise. Sized so a recycling (auto-rebuy)
   423	            // player nets ~99.9% / ~101.9% RTP once the 0.75% recycle bonus compounds in.
   424	            bool bonusDay = (inJackpot && jackpotCounter == 0) || lvl == 0;
   425	            uint8 coinflipBonus = bonusDay
   426	                ? (lvl != 0 && lvl % 10 == 0 ? 6 : 2)
   427	                : 0;
   428	            (uint256 rngWord, uint32 gapDays) = rngGate(
   429	                ts,
   430	                day,
   431	                purchaseLevel,
   432	                lastPurchase,
   433	                coinflipBonus
   434	            );
   435	            psd += uint24(gapDays);
   436	            if (rngWord == 1) {
   437	                _swapAndFreeze();
   438	                stage = STAGE_RNG_REQUESTED;
   439	                break;
   440	            }
   441	
   442	            // Decouple a multi-day VRF-stall gap backfill from the day's jackpot distribution:
   443	            // if rngGate just backfilled a gap (gapDays != 0), defer everything downstream (the
   444	            // phase transition + the up-to-305-winner daily jackpot) to the next advance so the
   445	            // backfill and the jackpot never execute in one tx (each stays under the per-tx gas
   446	            // ceiling). rngGate is idempotent (rngWordByDay[day] is now set -> gapDays == 0 next
   447	            // call) and dailyIdx is not yet advanced (no _unlockRng reached), so advanceDue() stays
   448	            // true and the next advance pays the jackpot with the same frozen word. The break
   449	            // returns mult so the keeper is paid for the backfill work (mirrors the partial drains).
   450	            if (gapDays != 0) {
   451	                stage = STAGE_GAP_BACKFILLED;
   452	                break;
   453	            }
   454	
   455	            // Phase transition housekeeping + FF promotion
   456	            if (phaseTransitionActive) {
   457	                // Drain the one FF level that entered near-future at this level transition.
   458	                // At new level L, the boundary moved from >L+4 to >L+5, making L+5 near-future.
   459	                // No new FF entries can arrive at L+5 (tickets targeting it now route to write key).
   460	                // purchaseLevel = level + 1, so the FF level is purchaseLevel + 4 = level + 5.
   461	                uint24 ffLevel = purchaseLevel + 4;
   462	                bool resumingFF = (ticketLevel ==
   463	                    (ffLevel | TICKET_FAR_FUTURE_BIT));
   464	                if (!resumingFF) {
   465	                    _processPhaseTransition(purchaseLevel);
   466	                    // Set up FF drain — ticketLevel signals we've completed transition housekeeping
   467	                    ticketLevel = ffLevel | TICKET_FAR_FUTURE_BIT;
   468	                    ticketCursor = 0;
   469	                }
   470	                (bool ffWorked, bool ffFinished, ) = _processFutureTicketBatch(
   471	                    ffLevel,
   472	                    rngWord
   473	                );
   474	                if (ffWorked || !ffFinished) {
   475	                    stage = STAGE_TRANSITION_WORKING;
   476	                    break;
   477	                }
   478	                phaseTransitionActive = false;
   479	                _unlockRng(day);
   480	                purchaseStartDay = day;
   481	                jackpotPhaseFlag = false;
   482	                stage = STAGE_TRANSITION_DONE;
   483	                break;
   484	            }
   485	
   486	            // Process near-future ticket queues before daily draws
   487	            // to include fresh lootbox-driven tickets
   488	            if (!dailyJackpotCoinTicketsPending) {
   489	                if (
   490	                    !_prepareFutureTickets(
   491	                        inJackpot ? lvl : purchaseLevel,
   492	                        rngWord
   493	                    )
   494	                ) {
   495	                    stage = STAGE_FUTURE_TICKETS_WORKING;
   496	                    break;
   497	                }
   498	            }
   499	
   500	            // Process current level tickets:
   501	            // Purchase phase processes purchaseLevel (= level+1) where new tickets route.
   502	            // Jackpot phase processes level where jackpot-phase tickets route.
   503	            (bool ticketWorked, bool ticketsFinished) = _runProcessTicketBatch(
   504	                inJackpot ? lvl : purchaseLevel
   505	            );
   506	            if (ticketWorked || !ticketsFinished) {
   507	                stage = STAGE_TICKETS_WORKING;
   508	                break;
   509	            }
   510	            ticketsFullyProcessed = true; // set before jackpot/phase logic
   511	
   512	            // === PURCHASE PHASE ===
   513	            if (!inJackpot) {
   514	                // Pre-target: daily jackpots while building prize pool.
   515	                // lastPurchase equals lastPurchaseDay here (read after the turbo
   516	                // write, inside !inJackpot, with no writer on the path between).
   517	                if (!lastPurchase) {
   518	                    if (purchaseLevel == 1) {
   519	                        // Self-call into GAME (which delegatecalls the jackpot
   520	                        // module) so msg.sender == address(this) passes the
   521	                        // module's OnlyGame check.
   522	                        IDegenerusGame(address(this)).emitDailyWinningTraits(
   523	                            1,
   524	                            rngWord,
   525	                            1
   526	                        );
   527	                        _payDailyCoinJackpot(1, rngWord, 1, 1);
   528	                        uint256 saltedRng = uint256(
   529	                            keccak256(
   530	                                abi.encodePacked(rngWord, BONUS_TRAITS_TAG)
   531	                            )
   532	                        );
   533	                        _payDailyCoinJackpot(1, saltedRng, 2, 5);
   534	                    } else {
   535	                        payDailyJackpot(false, purchaseLevel, rngWord);
   536	                        _payDailyCoinJackpot(
   537	                            purchaseLevel,
   538	                            rngWord,
   539	                            purchaseLevel + 1,
   540	                            purchaseLevel + 4
   541	                        );
   542	                    }
   543	                    bool targetMet = _getNextPrizePool() >=
   544	                        levelPrizePool[purchaseLevel - 1];
   545	                    if (targetMet) {
   546	                        lastPurchaseDay = true;
   547	                        if (day - psd <= 3) {
   548	                            compressedJackpotFlag = 1;
   549	                        }
   550	                    }
   551	                    _unlockRng(day);
   552	                    stage = STAGE_PURCHASE_DAILY;
   553	                    break;
   554	                }
   555	
   556	                // Activate next-level tickets before jackpot phase
   557	                {
   558	                    uint24 nextLevel = purchaseLevel + 1;
   559	                    (
   560	                        bool futureWorked,
   561	                        bool futureFinished,
   562	
   563	                    ) = _processFutureTicketBatch(nextLevel, rngWord);
   564	                    if (futureWorked || !futureFinished) {
   565	                        stage = STAGE_FUTURE_TICKETS_WORKING;
   566	                        break;
   567	                    }
   568	                }
   569	
   570	                // Consolidate prize pools for level transition
   571	                levelPrizePool[purchaseLevel] = _getNextPrizePool();
   572	                _distributeYieldSurplus(rngWord);
   573	                _consolidatePoolsAndRewardJackpots(
   574	                    lvl,
   575	                    purchaseLevel,
   576	                    day,
   577	                    rngWord,
   578	                    psd
   579	                );
   580	
   581	                if (lvl >= 3 && _psRead(PS_ACTIVE_SHIFT, PS_ACTIVE_MASK) != 0) {
   582	                    _psWrite(PS_ACTIVE_SHIFT, PS_ACTIVE_MASK, 0);
   583	                }
   584	
   585	                // Transition to jackpot phase
   586	                jackpotPhaseFlag = true;
   587	
   588	                lastPurchaseDay = false;
   589	
   590	                // Roll level quest at level transition so it's active during jackpot phase
  1320	            }
  1321	            revert RngNotReady();
  1322	        }
  1323	
  1324	        // Need fresh RNG
  1325	        _requestRng(isTicketJackpotDay, lvl);
  1326	        return (1, 0);
  1327	    }
  1328	
  1329	    function _finalizeLootboxRng(uint256 rngWord) private {
  1330	        uint48 index = uint48(_lrRead(LR_INDEX_SHIFT, LR_INDEX_MASK)) - 1;
  1331	        if (lootboxRngWordByIndex[index] != 0) return;
  1332	        lootboxRngWordByIndex[index] = rngWord;
  1333	        emit LootboxRngApplied(index, rngWord, vrfRequestId);
  1334	    }
  1335	
  1336	    /// @dev Game-over RNG gate with fallback for stalled VRF.
  1337	    ///      After the 14-day GAMEOVER_RNG_FALLBACK_DELAY, uses earliest historical VRF word as
  1338	    ///      fallback (more secure than blockhash since it's already verified on-chain and
  1339	    ///      cannot be manipulated).
  1340	    ///      Also resolves any pending gambling burn redemptions (mirrors rngGate behavior, CP-06 fix).
  1341	    /// @return word RNG word, 1 if request sent, or 0 if waiting on fallback.
  1342	    function _gameOverEntropy(
  1343	        uint48 ts,
  1344	        uint24 day,
  1345	        uint24 lvl,
  1346	        bool isTicketJackpotDay
  1347	    ) private returns (uint256 word) {
  1348	        if (rngWordByDay[day] != 0) return rngWordByDay[day];
  1349	
  1350	        uint256 currentWord = rngWordCurrent;
  1351	        if (currentWord != 0 && rngRequestTime != 0) {
  1352	            currentWord = _applyDailyRng(day, currentWord);
  1353	            if (lvl != 0) {
  1354	                // Gameover settles the final day's flips but never grants a bonus (0).
  1355	                coinflip.processCoinflipPayouts(0, currentWord, day);
  1356	            }
  1357	            // Resolve the sentinel-stamped gambling-burn pool if any. Same shape as the
  1358	            // rngGate redemption resolution path — sentinel-keyed so multi-day stalls resolve
  1359	            // by construction.
  1360	            {
  1361	                IsDGNRS sdgnrs = IsDGNRS(
  1362	                    ContractAddresses.SDGNRS
  1363	                );
  1364	                uint24 toResolve = sdgnrs.pendingResolveDay();
  1365	                if (toResolve != 0) {
  1366	                    uint16 redemptionRoll = uint16(
  1367	                        ((currentWord >> 8) % 151) + 25
  1368	                    );
  1369	                    sdgnrs.resolveRedemptionPeriod(redemptionRoll, toResolve);
  1370	                }
  1371	            }
  1372	            _finalizeLootboxRng(currentWord);
  1373	            return currentWord;
  1374	        }
  1375	
  1376	        // VRF-death deadman: in a suppressed phase (jackpot / last-purchase) where no day has
  1377	        // sealed for _VRF_DEADMAN_DAYS, commit the historical fallback immediately — regardless
  1378	        // of whether a request is outstanding or how long it has been pending — so a
  1379	        // permanently-dead VRF there reaches terminal fund release without the
  1380	        // GAMEOVER_RNG_FALLBACK_DELAY wait. Gated to the suppressed phases so the normal
  1381	        // purchase-phase / genesis game-over keeps its two-step real-VRF request path. Outside
  1382	        // the deadman, honor the normal grace: an outstanding request waits the fallback delay,
  1383	        // otherwise a fresh request is issued.
  1384	        bool deadman = (jackpotPhaseFlag || lastPurchaseDay) && _vrfDeadmanFired();
  1385	        if (rngRequestTime != 0 || deadman) {
  1386	            if (!deadman && ts - rngRequestTime < GAMEOVER_RNG_FALLBACK_DELAY) {
  1387	                revert RngNotReady();
  1388	            }
  1389	            // Use earliest historical VRF word as fallback (more secure than blockhash)
  1390	            uint256 fallbackWord = _getHistoricalRngFallback(day);
  1391	            // Cancel any reverseFlip nudge from the fallback word: the VRF-dead fallback
  1392	            // never set rngLockedFlag, so reverseFlip stayed open and a committer could
  1393	            // otherwise steer the terminal distribution. Pre-subtracting cancels the +=
  1394	            // inside _applyDailyRng (and consumes the nudges), leaving the pure
  1395	            // historical+prevrandao word.
  1396	            unchecked { fallbackWord -= totalFlipReversals; }
  1397	            fallbackWord = _applyDailyRng(day, fallbackWord);
  1398	            if (lvl != 0) {
  1399	                // Gameover settles the final day's flips but never grants a bonus (0).
  1400	                coinflip.processCoinflipPayouts(0, fallbackWord, day);
  1401	            }
  1402	            // Resolve the sentinel-stamped gambling-burn pool if any. Fallback path
  1403	            // uses fallbackWord for the roll; sentinel still names the stuck day so resolves
  1404	            // are correct even after a GAMEOVER_RNG_FALLBACK_DELAY (14-day) stall.
  1405	            {
  1406	                IsDGNRS sdgnrs = IsDGNRS(
  1407	                    ContractAddresses.SDGNRS
  1408	                );
  1409	                uint24 toResolve = sdgnrs.pendingResolveDay();
  1410	                if (toResolve != 0) {
  1411	                    uint16 redemptionRoll = uint16(
  1412	                        ((fallbackWord >> 8) % 151) + 25
  1413	                    );
  1414	                    sdgnrs.resolveRedemptionPeriod(redemptionRoll, toResolve);
  1415	                }
  1580	            }
  1581	        }
  1582	        return true;
  1583	    }
  1584	
  1585	    /*+======================================================================+
  1586	      |                    TICKET / TOKEN AIRDROP BATCHING                         |
  1587	      +======================================================================+
  1588	      |  Ticket entries are processed in batches to prevent gas exhaustion.  |
  1589	      |  Large purchases are queued and processed across multiple txs.       |
  1590	      +======================================================================+*/
  1591	
  1592	    /// @dev Process a batch of current level tickets via mint module delegatecall.
  1593	    /// @param lvl Current level.
  1594	    /// @return worked True if the batch materialized at least one ticket or foil entry.
  1595	    ///         Reported directly by the mint module rather than inferred from a cursor
  1596	    ///         delta, so a batch that both starts and finishes in one call (cursor returns
  1597	    ///         to 0) still reports its work and the chain breaks before BAF/jackpot.
  1598	    /// @return finished True if all tickets for this level have been fully processed.
  1599	    function _runProcessTicketBatch(
  1600	        uint24 lvl
  1601	    ) private returns (bool worked, bool finished) {
  1602	        (bool ok, bytes memory data) = ContractAddresses
  1603	            .GAME_MINT_MODULE
  1604	            .delegatecall(
  1605	                abi.encodeWithSelector(
  1606	                    IDegenerusGameMintModule.processTicketBatch.selector,
  1607	                    lvl
  1608	                )
  1609	            );
  1610	        if (!ok) _revertDelegate(data);
  1611	        if (data.length < 64) revert EmptyReturn();
  1612	        (finished, worked) = abi.decode(data, (bool, bool));
  1613	    }
  1614	
  1615	    /// @dev Process jackpot→purchase transition housekeeping (vault perpetual tickets + auto-stake).
  1616	    ///      Vault addresses (SDGNRS, VAULT) get generic queued tickets.
  1617	    /// @param purchaseLevel Current purchase level (level + 1).
  1618	    function _processPhaseTransition(uint24 purchaseLevel) private {
  1619	        // Vault perpetual tickets: 16 generic tickets per level for DGNRS and VAULT
  1620	        uint24 targetLevel = purchaseLevel + 99;
  1621	        _queueEntries(
  1622	            ContractAddresses.SDGNRS,
  1623	            targetLevel,
  1624	            VAULT_PERPETUAL_ENTRIES,
  1625	            true
  1626	        );
  1627	        _queueEntries(
  1628	            ContractAddresses.VAULT,
  1629	            targetLevel,
  1630	            VAULT_PERPETUAL_ENTRIES,
  1631	            true
  1632	        );
  1633	
  1634	        // Auto-stake all non-claimable ETH into stETH for yield generation.
  1635	        // Non-blocking: if stETH contract fails, game continues normally.
  1636	        _autoStakeExcessEth();
  1637	    }
  1638	
  1639	    /// @dev Stake all ETH above claimablePool into stETH via Lido.
  1640	    ///      Uses try/catch so stETH is never a hard dependency — game
  1641	    ///      continues even if Lido is paused or the call reverts.
  1642	    function _autoStakeExcessEth() private {
  1643	        uint256 ethBal = address(this).balance;
  1644	        uint256 reserve = claimablePool;
  1645	        if (ethBal <= reserve) return;
  1646	        uint256 stakeable = ethBal - reserve;
  1647	        try steth.submit{value: stakeable}(address(0)) returns (
  1648	            uint256
  1649	        ) {} catch {
  1650	            emit StEthStakeFailed(stakeable);
  1651	        }
  1652	    }
  1653	
  1654	    /// @dev Request new VRF random word from Chainlink.
  1655	    ///      Sets RNG lock to prevent manipulation during pending window.
  1656	    /// @param isTicketJackpotDay True if this is the last purchase day.
  1657	    /// @param lvl Current level.
  1658	    function _requestRng(bool isTicketJackpotDay, uint24 lvl) private {
  1659	        // Hard revert if Chainlink request fails; this intentionally halts game progress until VRF funding/config is fixed.
  1660	        _finalizeRngRequest(
  1661	            isTicketJackpotDay,
  1662	            lvl,
  1663	            _requestVrfWord(VRF_REQUEST_CONFIRMATIONS)
  1664	        );
  1665	    }
  1666	
  1667	    function _tryRequestRng(
  1668	        bool isTicketJackpotDay,
  1669	        uint24 lvl
  1670	    ) private returns (bool requested) {
  1671	        try
  1672	            vrfCoordinator.requestRandomWords(
  1673	                VRFRandomWordsRequest({
  1674	                    keyHash: vrfKeyHash,
  1675	                    subId: vrfSubscriptionId,
  1676	                    requestConfirmations: VRF_REQUEST_CONFIRMATIONS,
  1677	                    callbackGasLimit: VRF_CALLBACK_GAS_LIMIT,
  1678	                    numWords: 1,
  1679	                    extraArgs: hex"" // Empty for LINK payment (default)
  1680	                })
  1681	            )
  1682	        returns (uint256 id) {
  1683	            _finalizeRngRequest(isTicketJackpotDay, lvl, id);
  1684	            requested = true;
  1685	        } catch {}
  1686	    }
  1687	
  1688	    /// @dev Submit a single-word VRF request on the current coordinator.
  1689	    /// @param confirmations Block confirmations for this request's gas lane.
  1690	    /// @return id The Chainlink request ID.
  1691	    function _requestVrfWord(uint16 confirmations) private returns (uint256 id) {
  1692	        id = vrfCoordinator.requestRandomWords(
  1693	            VRFRandomWordsRequest({
  1694	                keyHash: vrfKeyHash,
  1695	                subId: vrfSubscriptionId,
  1696	                requestConfirmations: confirmations,
  1697	                callbackGasLimit: VRF_CALLBACK_GAS_LIMIT,
  1698	                numWords: 1,
  1699	                extraArgs: hex""
  1700	            })
  1701	        );
  1702	    }
  1703	
  1704	    /// @dev Write the VRF coordinator, subscription, and key hash together.
  1705	    /// @param coord VRF coordinator address.
  1706	    /// @param sub VRF subscription ID for LINK billing.
  1707	    /// @param key VRF key hash for gas lane selection.
  1708	    function _setVrfConfig(address coord, uint256 sub, bytes32 key) internal {
  1709	        vrfCoordinator = IVRFCoordinator(coord);
  1710	        vrfSubscriptionId = sub;
  1711	        vrfKeyHash = key;
  1712	    }
  1713	
  1714	    /// @dev Advance the lootbox RNG index and zero both pending accumulators in a
  1715	    ///      single read-modify-write of the packed slot: new purchases target the
  1716	    ///      NEXT RNG index and the pending ETH/FLIP totals restart at zero.
  1717	    function _lrAdvanceIndexClearPending() private {
  1718	        uint256 packed = lootboxRngPacked;
  1719	        uint256 nextIndex = ((packed >> LR_INDEX_SHIFT) & LR_INDEX_MASK) + 1;
  1720	        packed &= ~((LR_INDEX_MASK << LR_INDEX_SHIFT) |
  1721	            (LR_PENDING_ETH_MASK << LR_PENDING_ETH_SHIFT) |
  1722	            (LR_PENDING_FLIP_MASK << LR_PENDING_FLIP_SHIFT));
  1723	        lootboxRngPacked =
  1724	            packed |
  1725	            ((nextIndex & LR_INDEX_MASK) << LR_INDEX_SHIFT);
  1726	    }
  1727	
  1728	    // =========================================================================
  1729	    // Queue Swap and Prize Pool Freeze
  1730	    // =========================================================================
  1731	
  1732	    /// @dev Toggle the active ticket queue buffer and reset the read-slot drained flag.
  1733	    ///      Fail-open by design: every caller swaps only after the read slot is drained
  1734	    ///      (gated on ticketsFullyProcessed / a finished drain), so a non-empty read slot is
  1735	    ///      unreachable here. This runs inside the advance heartbeat, where a revert would
  1736	    ///      brick the game; in the impossible non-empty case the toggle merely defers those
  1737	    ///      entries one cycle (they stay queued, never lost) rather than reverting.
  1738	    function _swapTicketSlot() internal {
  1739	        ticketWriteSlot = !ticketWriteSlot;
  1740	        ticketsFullyProcessed = false;
  1741	    }
  1742	
  1743	    /// @dev Activate the prize pool freeze. If not already frozen, pre-seeds the pending
  1744	    ///      future-pool buffer with 1% of futurePrizePool so Degenerette ETH wins can resolve
  1745	    ///      during freeze without waiting for bet inflow. Unconsumed remainder rolls back to
  1746	    ///      futurePool via _unfreezePool. If already frozen (jackpot phase), accumulators keep
  1747	    ///      growing.
  1748	    function _freezePool() internal {
  1749	        if (!prizePoolFrozen) {
  1750	            prizePoolFrozen = true;
  1751	            uint256 futureBal = _getFuturePrizePool();
  1752	            uint256 seed = futureBal / 100;
  1753	            if (seed != 0) {
  1754	                _setFuturePrizePool(futureBal - seed);
  1755	                _setPendingPools(0, uint128(seed));
  1756	            } else {
  1757	                prizePoolPendingPacked = 0;
  1758	            }
  1759	        }
  1760	    }
  1761	
  1762	    /// @dev Swap queue buffer AND activate the prize pool freeze (daily RNG path only).
  1763	    function _swapAndFreeze() internal {
  1764	        _swapTicketSlot();
  1765	        _freezePool();
  1900	        emit VrfCoordinatorUpdated(current, newCoordinator);
  1901	    }

  1903	    /// @dev Unlock RNG after processing is complete for the day.
  1904	    ///      Resets VRF state and re-enables RNG usage.
  1905	    /// @param day Current day index to record.
  1906	    function _unlockRng(uint24 day) private {
  1907	        dailyIdx = day;
  1908	        rngLockedFlag = false;
  1909	        rngWordCurrent = 0;
  1910	        vrfRequestId = 0;
  1911	        rngRequestTime = 0;
  1912	        _unfreezePool();
  1913	        // The day-seal is the one chokepoint every completed game-day passes through (purchase
  1914	        // daily, jackpot coin+tickets, phase transition). Emit the daily pool snapshot here, after
  1915	        // _unfreezePool folds the pending accumulators back into the live pools, so the indexer
  1916	        // mirrors the settled end-of-day pools and a solvency total (ETH + stETH) from logs alone.
  1917	        // Game-over also seals here but emits its own terminal snapshot in the drain, so skip it.
  1918	        if (!gameOver) {
  1919	            emit PrizePoolDailySnapshot(
  1920	                _getNextPrizePool(),
  1921	                _getFuturePrizePool(),
  1922	                _getCurrentPrizePool(),
  1923	                claimablePool,
  1924	                address(this).balance + steth.balanceOf(address(this)),
  1925	                yieldAccumulator
  1926	            );
  1927	        }
  1928	    }
