  1585	    /*+======================================================================+
  1586	      |                    TICKET / TOKEN AIRDROP BATCHING                         |
  1587	      +======================================================================+
  1588	      |  Ticket entries are processed in batches to prevent gas exhaustion.  |
  1589	      |  Large purchases are queued and processed across multiple txs.       |
  1590	      +======================================================================+*/
  1591	
  1592	    /// @dev Process a batch of current level tickets via mint module delegatecall.
  1593	    /// @param lvl Current level.
  1594	    /// @return worked True if the batch materialized at least one ticket or foil entry.
  1595	    ///         Reported directly by the mint module rather than inferred from a cursor
  1596	    ///         delta, so a batch that both starts and finishes in one call (cursor returns
  1597	    ///         to 0) still reports its work and the chain breaks before BAF/jackpot.
  1598	    /// @return finished True if all tickets for this level have been fully processed.
  1599	    function _runProcessTicketBatch(
  1600	        uint24 lvl
  1601	    ) private returns (bool worked, bool finished) {
  1602	        (bool ok, bytes memory data) = ContractAddresses
  1603	            .GAME_MINT_MODULE
  1604	            .delegatecall(
  1605	                abi.encodeWithSelector(
  1606	                    IDegenerusGameMintModule.processTicketBatch.selector,
  1607	                    lvl
  1608	                )
  1609	            );
  1610	        if (!ok) _revertDelegate(data);
  1611	        if (data.length < 64) revert EmptyReturn();
  1612	        (finished, worked) = abi.decode(data, (bool, bool));
  1613	    }
  1614	
  1615	    /// @dev Process jackpot→purchase transition housekeeping (vault perpetual tickets + auto-stake).
  1616	    ///      Vault addresses (SDGNRS, VAULT) get generic queued tickets.
  1617	    /// @param purchaseLevel Current purchase level (level + 1).
  1618	    function _processPhaseTransition(uint24 purchaseLevel) private {
  1619	        // Vault perpetual tickets: 16 generic tickets per level for DGNRS and VAULT
  1620	        uint24 targetLevel = purchaseLevel + 99;
  1621	        _queueEntries(
  1622	            ContractAddresses.SDGNRS,
  1623	            targetLevel,
  1624	            VAULT_PERPETUAL_ENTRIES,
  1625	            true
  1626	        );
  1627	        _queueEntries(
  1628	            ContractAddresses.VAULT,
  1629	            targetLevel,
  1630	            VAULT_PERPETUAL_ENTRIES,
  1631	            true
  1632	        );
  1633	
  1634	        // Auto-stake all non-claimable ETH into stETH for yield generation.
  1635	        // Non-blocking: if stETH contract fails, game continues normally.
  1636	        _autoStakeExcessEth();
  1637	    }
  1638	
  1639	    /// @dev Stake all ETH above claimablePool into stETH via Lido.
  1640	    ///      Uses try/catch so stETH is never a hard dependency — game
  1641	    ///      continues even if Lido is paused or the call reverts.
  1642	    function _autoStakeExcessEth() private {
  1643	        uint256 ethBal = address(this).balance;
  1644	        uint256 reserve = claimablePool;
  1645	        if (ethBal <= reserve) return;
  1646	        uint256 stakeable = ethBal - reserve;
  1647	        try steth.submit{value: stakeable}(address(0)) returns (
  1648	            uint256
  1649	        ) {} catch {
  1650	            emit StEthStakeFailed(stakeable);
  1651	        }
  1652	    }
  1653	
  1654	    /// @dev Request new VRF random word from Chainlink.
  1655	    ///      Sets RNG lock to prevent manipulation during pending window.
  1656	    /// @param isTicketJackpotDay True if this is the last purchase day.
  1657	    /// @param lvl Current level.
  1658	    function _requestRng(bool isTicketJackpotDay, uint24 lvl) private {
  1659	        // Hard revert if Chainlink request fails; this intentionally halts game progress until VRF funding/config is fixed.
  1660	        _finalizeRngRequest(
  1661	            isTicketJackpotDay,
  1662	            lvl,
  1663	            _requestVrfWord(VRF_REQUEST_CONFIRMATIONS)
  1664	        );
  1665	    }
  1666	
  1667	    function _tryRequestRng(
  1668	        bool isTicketJackpotDay,
  1669	        uint24 lvl
  1670	    ) private returns (bool requested) {
  1671	        try
  1672	            vrfCoordinator.requestRandomWords(
  1673	                VRFRandomWordsRequest({
  1674	                    keyHash: vrfKeyHash,
  1675	                    subId: vrfSubscriptionId,
  1676	                    requestConfirmations: VRF_REQUEST_CONFIRMATIONS,
  1677	                    callbackGasLimit: VRF_CALLBACK_GAS_LIMIT,
  1678	                    numWords: 1,
  1679	                    extraArgs: hex"" // Empty for LINK payment (default)
  1680	                })
  1681	            )
  1682	        returns (uint256 id) {
  1683	            _finalizeRngRequest(isTicketJackpotDay, lvl, id);
  1684	            requested = true;
  1685	        } catch {}
  1686	    }
  1687	
  1688	    /// @dev Submit a single-word VRF request on the current coordinator.
  1689	    /// @param confirmations Block confirmations for this request's gas lane.
  1690	    /// @return id The Chainlink request ID.
  1691	    function _requestVrfWord(uint16 confirmations) private returns (uint256 id) {
  1692	        id = vrfCoordinator.requestRandomWords(
  1693	            VRFRandomWordsRequest({
  1694	                keyHash: vrfKeyHash,
  1695	                subId: vrfSubscriptionId,
  1696	                requestConfirmations: confirmations,
  1697	                callbackGasLimit: VRF_CALLBACK_GAS_LIMIT,
  1698	                numWords: 1,
  1699	                extraArgs: hex""
  1700	            })
  1701	        );
  1702	    }
  1703	
  1704	    /// @dev Write the VRF coordinator, subscription, and key hash together.
  1705	    /// @param coord VRF coordinator address.
  1706	    /// @param sub VRF subscription ID for LINK billing.
  1707	    /// @param key VRF key hash for gas lane selection.
  1708	    function _setVrfConfig(address coord, uint256 sub, bytes32 key) internal {
  1709	        vrfCoordinator = IVRFCoordinator(coord);
  1710	        vrfSubscriptionId = sub;
  1711	        vrfKeyHash = key;
  1712	    }
  1713	
  1714	    /// @dev Advance the lootbox RNG index and zero both pending accumulators in a
  1715	    ///      single read-modify-write of the packed slot: new purchases target the
  1716	    ///      NEXT RNG index and the pending ETH/FLIP totals restart at zero.
  1717	    function _lrAdvanceIndexClearPending() private {
  1718	        uint256 packed = lootboxRngPacked;
  1719	        uint256 nextIndex = ((packed >> LR_INDEX_SHIFT) & LR_INDEX_MASK) + 1;
  1720	        packed &= ~((LR_INDEX_MASK << LR_INDEX_SHIFT) |
  1721	            (LR_PENDING_ETH_MASK << LR_PENDING_ETH_SHIFT) |
  1722	            (LR_PENDING_FLIP_MASK << LR_PENDING_FLIP_SHIFT));
  1723	        lootboxRngPacked =
  1724	            packed |
  1725	            ((nextIndex & LR_INDEX_MASK) << LR_INDEX_SHIFT);
  1726	    }
  1727	
  1728	    // =========================================================================
  1729	    // Queue Swap and Prize Pool Freeze
  1730	    // =========================================================================
  1731	
  1732	    /// @dev Toggle the active ticket queue buffer and reset the read-slot drained flag.
  1733	    ///      Fail-open by design: every caller swaps only after the read slot is drained
  1734	    ///      (gated on ticketsFullyProcessed / a finished drain), so a non-empty read slot is
  1735	    ///      unreachable here. This runs inside the advance heartbeat, where a revert would
  1736	    ///      brick the game; in the impossible non-empty case the toggle merely defers those
  1737	    ///      entries one cycle (they stay queued, never lost) rather than reverting.
  1738	    function _swapTicketSlot() internal {
  1739	        ticketWriteSlot = !ticketWriteSlot;
  1740	        ticketsFullyProcessed = false;
  1741	    }
  1742	
  1743	    /// @dev Activate the prize pool freeze. If not already frozen, pre-seeds the pending
  1744	    ///      future-pool buffer with 1% of futurePrizePool so Degenerette ETH wins can resolve
  1745	    ///      during freeze without waiting for bet inflow. Unconsumed remainder rolls back to
  1746	    ///      futurePool via _unfreezePool. If already frozen (jackpot phase), accumulators keep
  1747	    ///      growing.
  1748	    function _freezePool() internal {
  1749	        if (!prizePoolFrozen) {
  1750	            prizePoolFrozen = true;
  1751	            uint256 futureBal = _getFuturePrizePool();
  1752	            uint256 seed = futureBal / 100;
  1753	            if (seed != 0) {
  1754	                _setFuturePrizePool(futureBal - seed);
  1755	                _setPendingPools(0, uint128(seed));
  1756	            } else {
  1757	                prizePoolPendingPacked = 0;
  1758	            }
  1759	        }
  1760	    }
  1761	
  1762	    /// @dev Swap queue buffer AND activate the prize pool freeze (daily RNG path only).
  1763	    function _swapAndFreeze() internal {
  1764	        _swapTicketSlot();
  1765	        _freezePool();
  1766	    }
  1767	
  1768	    /// @dev Apply pending accumulators to live pools and clear freeze.
  1769	    ///      No-op if not currently frozen.
  1770	    function _unfreezePool() internal {
  1771	        if (!prizePoolFrozen) return;
  1772	        (uint128 pNext, uint128 pFuture) = _getPendingPools();
  1773	        (uint128 next, uint128 future) = _getPrizePools();
  1774	        _setPrizePools(next + pNext, future + pFuture);
  1775	        prizePoolPendingPacked = 0;
  1776	        prizePoolFrozen = false;
  1777	    }
  1778	
  1779	    function _finalizeRngRequest(
  1780	        bool isTicketJackpotDay,
  1781	        uint24 lvl,
  1782	        uint256 requestId
  1783	    ) private {
  1784	        // isRetry: some VRF request already reserved the lootbox index (a daily retry OR an
  1785	        // in-flight mid-day lootbox request) — so the index must not be advanced again.

exec
/usr/bin/bash -lc "git show a79a9809:contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol | nl -ba | sed -n '1775,2037p'" in /home/zak/Dev/PurgeGame/degenerus-audit
 succeeded in 0ms:
  1775	        prizePoolPendingPacked = 0;
  1776	        prizePoolFrozen = false;
  1777	    }
  1778	
  1779	    function _finalizeRngRequest(
  1780	        bool isTicketJackpotDay,
  1781	        uint24 lvl,
  1782	        uint256 requestId
  1783	    ) private {
  1784	        // isRetry: some VRF request already reserved the lootbox index (a daily retry OR an
  1785	        // in-flight mid-day lootbox request) — so the index must not be advanced again.
  1786	        bool isRetry = vrfRequestId != 0 &&
  1787	            rngRequestTime != 0 &&
  1788	            rngWordCurrent == 0;
  1789	        // isDailyRetry: a genuine retry of the *daily* request. A daily request holds the lock
  1790	        // (rngLockedFlag set true by the first daily request); a mid-day lootbox request leaves
  1791	        // rngLockedFlag false. Distinguishing them stops an in-flight lootbox request from
  1792	        // making this fresh daily request look like a retry and skip the level increment below.
  1793	        bool isDailyRetry = isRetry && rngLockedFlag;
  1794	        if (!isRetry) {
  1795	            // Fresh request: advance lootbox index so new purchases target the NEXT RNG.
  1796	            _lrAdvanceIndexClearPending();
  1797	        }
  1798	        // Retry: index already advanced from the original request. No action needed —
  1799	        // lootboxRngIndex - 1 still points to the pending index regardless of request ID.
  1800	
  1801	        vrfRequestId = requestId;
  1802	        rngWordCurrent = 0;
  1803	        rngRequestTime = uint48(block.timestamp);
  1804	        rngLockedFlag = true;
  1805	
  1806	        // Close the FLIP purchase window at the final jackpot day's RNG request — the boundary where
  1807	        // new tickets begin routing to the next level (mirrors the route-to-level+1 step in the mint
  1808	        // module). jackpotCounter + step catches the final daily jackpot; the isTicketJackpotDay
  1809	        // (level-transition) request catches the single-day turbo jackpot, where jackpotPhaseFlag is
  1810	        // not yet set here.
  1811	        if (ticketRedemptionOpen && (jackpotPhaseFlag || isTicketJackpotDay)) {
  1812	            uint8 jpStep = 1;
  1813	            if (compressedJackpotFlag == 2 && jackpotCounter == 0) {
  1814	                jpStep = JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP;
  1815	            } else if (
  1816	                compressedJackpotFlag == 1 &&
  1817	                jackpotCounter > 0 &&
  1818	                jackpotCounter < JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP - 1
  1819	            ) {
  1820	                jpStep = 2;
  1821	            }
  1822	            if (jackpotCounter + jpStep >= JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP) {
  1823	                ticketRedemptionOpen = false;
  1824	            }
  1825	        }
  1826	
  1827	        // Increment level at RNG request time when lastPurchaseDay = true.
  1828	        // lvl is already purchaseLevel (= level + 1), so set directly.
  1829	        // Only on a fresh daily request - a daily retry would double-increment, and an
  1830	        // in-flight mid-day lootbox request must not suppress this increment.
  1831	        if (isTicketJackpotDay && !isDailyRetry) {
  1832	            // Snapshot affiliate reward before level increment.
  1833	            // Scores routed to lvl (= level + 1) during the purchase phase just ended.
  1834	            _rewardTopAffiliate(lvl);
  1835	            level = lvl;
  1836	
  1837	            // Decimator window: open at x4/x99, close at x5/x00
  1838	            uint24 mod100 = lvl % 100;
  1839	            uint24 mod10 = lvl % 10;
  1840	            if ((mod10 == 4 && mod100 != 94) || mod100 == 99) {
  1841	                decWindowOpen = true;
  1842	            } else if (
  1843	                decWindowOpen && ((mod10 == 5 && mod100 != 95) || mod100 == 0)
  1844	            ) {
  1845	                decWindowOpen = false;
  1846	            }
  1847	
  1848	            // Resolve charity governance for the completed level.
  1849	            // lvl is the NEW level (old level + 1). CHARITY.currentLevel tracks
  1850	            // the CURRENT governance level (starts at 0, incremented by pickCharity).
  1851	            // The game's level 0->1 transition means level 0 gameplay is complete,
  1852	            // so we resolve governance for level 0 = lvl - 1.
  1853	            charityResolve.pickCharity(lvl - 1);
  1854	        }
  1855	    }
  1856	
  1857	    /// @notice Emergency VRF coordinator rotation (governance-gated).
  1858	    /// @dev Access: ContractAddresses.ADMIN only. The Admin contract enforces
  1859	    ///      stall duration via sDGNRS-holder governance (propose/vote/execute).
  1860	    /// @param newCoordinator New VRF coordinator address.
  1861	    /// @param newSubId New subscription ID.
  1862	    /// @param newKeyHash New key hash for the gas lane.
  1863	    function updateVrfCoordinatorAndSub(
  1864	        address newCoordinator,
  1865	        uint256 newSubId,
  1866	        bytes32 newKeyHash
  1867	    ) external {
  1868	        if (msg.sender != ContractAddresses.ADMIN) revert OnlyAdmin();
  1869	
  1870	        address current = address(vrfCoordinator);
  1871	        _setVrfConfig(newCoordinator, newSubId, newKeyHash);
  1872	
  1873	        // Detect what is in flight and re-issue on the new coordinator.
  1874	        // The request is accepted before the new subscription is LINK-funded; DegenerusAdmin
  1875	        // funds it in the same _executeSwap transaction (transferAndCall), and the VRF node
  1876	        // fulfills once funded. If the new coordinator also stalls, the daily advance abandons a
  1877	        // mid-day request and promotes it to the daily word after MIDDAY_RNG_STALL_TIMEOUT.
  1878	        if (_lrRead(LR_MID_DAY_SHIFT, LR_MID_DAY_MASK) != 0) {
  1879	            // Mid-day in flight: KEEP LR_MID_DAY=1; LR_INDEX preserved so the new word lands
  1880	            // in the same reserved slot [N] via the mid-day fulfillment branch (:1772).
  1881	            vrfRequestId = _requestVrfWord(VRF_MIDDAY_CONFIRMATIONS);
  1882	            rngRequestTime = uint48(block.timestamp);
  1883	        } else if (rngLockedFlag) {
  1884	            // Daily in flight: KEEP rngLockedFlag=true.
  1885	            if (rngWordCurrent == 0) {
  1886	                // Daily word not yet delivered: re-request on the new coordinator (-> :1768).
  1887	                vrfRequestId = _requestVrfWord(VRF_REQUEST_CONFIRMATIONS);
  1888	                rngRequestTime = uint48(block.timestamp);
  1889	            }
  1890	            // else: daily word already delivered and valid -> preserve it; no re-issue
  1891	            // (a fresh callback would be rejected by the :1761 rngWordCurrent!=0 guard).
  1892	        }
  1893	        // else: nothing in flight -> config repoint only; no re-issue, no flag change.
  1894	
  1895	        // Intentional: totalFlipReversals is NOT reset here. Nudges were purchased
  1896	        // with irreversible FLIP burns before or during the stall. They carry over
  1897	        // and apply to the first post-swap VRF word via _applyDailyRng. Resetting
  1898	        // would steal user value (burned FLIP for zero effect).
  1899	
  1900	        emit VrfCoordinatorUpdated(current, newCoordinator);
  1901	    }
  1902	
  1903	    /// @dev Unlock RNG after processing is complete for the day.
  1904	    ///      Resets VRF state and re-enables RNG usage.
  1905	    /// @param day Current day index to record.
  1906	    function _unlockRng(uint24 day) private {
  1907	        dailyIdx = day;
  1908	        rngLockedFlag = false;
  1909	        rngWordCurrent = 0;
  1910	        vrfRequestId = 0;
  1911	        rngRequestTime = 0;
  1912	        _unfreezePool();
  1913	        // The day-seal is the one chokepoint every completed game-day passes through (purchase
  1914	        // daily, jackpot coin+tickets, phase transition). Emit the daily pool snapshot here, after
  1915	        // _unfreezePool folds the pending accumulators back into the live pools, so the indexer
  1916	        // mirrors the settled end-of-day pools and a solvency total (ETH + stETH) from logs alone.
  1917	        // Game-over also seals here but emits its own terminal snapshot in the drain, so skip it.
  1918	        if (!gameOver) {
  1919	            emit PrizePoolDailySnapshot(
  1920	                _getNextPrizePool(),
  1921	                _getFuturePrizePool(),
  1922	                _getCurrentPrizePool(),
  1923	                claimablePool,
  1924	                address(this).balance + steth.balanceOf(address(this)),
  1925	                yieldAccumulator
  1926	            );
  1927	        }
  1928	    }
  1929	
  1930	    /// @notice Chainlink VRF callback for random word fulfillment.
  1931	    /// @dev Access: VRF coordinator only.
  1932	    ///      Daily RNG: stores word for advanceGame processing (nudges applied there).
  1933	    ///      Mid-day RNG: directly finalizes lootbox RNG, no advanceGame needed.
  1934	    ///      SECURITY: Validates requestId and coordinator address.
  1935	    /// @param requestId The request ID to match.
  1936	    /// @param randomWords Array containing the random word (length 1).
  1937	    function rawFulfillRandomWords(
  1938	        uint256 requestId,
  1939	        uint256[] calldata randomWords
  1940	    ) external {
  1941	        if (msg.sender != address(vrfCoordinator)) revert OnlyCoordinator();
  1942	        if (requestId != vrfRequestId || rngWordCurrent != 0) return;
  1943	
  1944	        uint256 word = randomWords[0];
  1945	        if (word == 0) word = 1;
  1946	
  1947	        if (rngLockedFlag) {
  1948	            // Daily RNG: store for advanceGame processing (nudges applied there)
  1949	            rngWordCurrent = word;
  1950	        } else {
  1951	            // Mid-day RNG: directly finalize lootbox and clear state
  1952	            uint48 index = uint48(_lrRead(LR_INDEX_SHIFT, LR_INDEX_MASK)) - 1;
  1953	            lootboxRngWordByIndex[index] = word;
  1954	            emit LootboxRngApplied(index, word, requestId);
  1955	            vrfRequestId = 0;
  1956	            rngRequestTime = 0;
  1957	        }
  1958	    }
  1959	
  1960	    /// @dev Backfill rngWordByDay and process coinflip payouts for gap days
  1961	    ///      caused by VRF stall. Derives deterministic words from the first
  1962	    ///      post-gap VRF word via keccak256(vrfWord, gapDay).
  1963	    ///      NOTE: Gap days get zero nudges (totalFlipReversals not consumed).
  1964	    ///      NOTE: resolveRedemptionPeriod is NOT called for backfilled gap days —
  1965	    ///      the redemption timer continued ticking in real time during the stall;
  1966	    ///      it resolves only on the current day via the normal rngGate path.
  1967	    /// @param vrfWord The first post-gap VRF random word.
  1968	    /// @param startDay First gap day (dailyIdx + 1).
  1969	    /// @param endDay Current day (exclusive — not backfilled, handled by normal path).
  1970	    function _backfillGapDays(
  1971	        uint256 vrfWord,
  1972	        uint24 startDay,
  1973	        uint24 endDay
  1974	    ) private {
  1975	        // Cap at 120 gap days to stay within block gas limit (~9M gas).
  1976	        // Backfills oldest days first (most likely to have active coinflips).
  1977	        if (endDay - startDay > 120) endDay = startDay + 120;
  1978	        for (uint24 gapDay = startDay; gapDay < endDay; ) {
  1979	            uint256 derivedWord = uint256(
  1980	                keccak256(abi.encodePacked(vrfWord, gapDay))
  1981	            );
  1982	            if (derivedWord == 0) derivedWord = 1;
  1983	            rngWordByDay[gapDay] = derivedWord;
  1984	            // Gap days are calendar days that elapsed during the stall (no advance ran on
  1985	            // them), so none is a level-0 or first-jackpot day — always non-bonus (0).
  1986	            coinflip.processCoinflipPayouts(0, derivedWord, gapDay);
  1987	            emit DailyRngApplied(gapDay, derivedWord, 0, derivedWord);
  1988	            unchecked {
  1989	                ++gapDay;
  1990	            }
  1991	        }
  1992	    }
  1993	
  1994	    /// @dev Backfill any lootbox RNG indices that never received a VRF word.
  1995	    ///      Scans backwards from lootboxRngIndex - 1 until hitting a filled index.
  1996	    ///      Uses VRF-derived entropy so lootbox outcomes cannot be front-run.
  1997	    /// @param vrfWord Fresh VRF word from the post-gap callback.
  1998	    function _backfillOrphanedLootboxIndices(uint256 vrfWord) private {
  1999	        uint48 idx = uint48(_lrRead(LR_INDEX_SHIFT, LR_INDEX_MASK));
  2000	        if (idx <= 1) return; // nothing reserved yet
  2001	
  2002	        // Scan backwards from the most recent reserved index
  2003	        for (uint48 i = idx - 1; i >= 1; ) {
  2004	            if (lootboxRngWordByIndex[i] != 0) break; // hit a filled index, done
  2005	
  2006	            uint256 fallbackWord = uint256(
  2007	                keccak256(abi.encodePacked(vrfWord, i))
  2008	            );
  2009	            if (fallbackWord == 0) fallbackWord = 1;
  2010	            lootboxRngWordByIndex[i] = fallbackWord;
  2011	            emit LootboxRngApplied(i, fallbackWord, 0);
  2012	
  2013	            unchecked {
  2014	                --i;
  2015	            }
  2016	        }
  2017	    }
  2018	
  2019	    /// @dev Apply daily RNG nudges, record the word, and emit the finalized word.
  2020	    function _applyDailyRng(
  2021	        uint24 day,
  2022	        uint256 rawWord
  2023	    ) private returns (uint256 finalWord) {
  2024	        uint256 nudges = totalFlipReversals;
  2025	        finalWord = rawWord;
  2026	        if (nudges != 0) {
  2027	            unchecked {
  2028	                finalWord += nudges;
  2029	            }
  2030	            totalFlipReversals = 0;
  2031	        }
  2032	        rngWordCurrent = finalWord;
  2033	        rngWordByDay[day] = finalWord;
  2034	        lastVrfProcessedTimestamp = uint48(block.timestamp);
  2035	        emit DailyRngApplied(day, rawWord, nudges, finalWord);
  2036	    }
  2037	}

  1915	    /// @dev Execute ticket purchase: payment, boost, affiliate routing, quest unit accumulation.
  1916	    ///      x00 century bonus and ticket queuing are handled by _purchaseFor after score computation.
  1917	    /// @return bonusCredit Bulk/recycle bonus flip credit (affiliate kickback is added by the caller)
  1918	    /// @return adjustedQty32 Adjusted ticket quantity (with boost, without x00 bonus)
  1919	    /// @return targetLevel The level tickets are queued to
  1920	    /// @return flipMintUnits FLIP-paid mint quest units
  1921	    /// @return ticketFreshFlip Ticket fresh-rate FLIP basis for the caller's combined affiliate call
  1922	    /// @return ticketRecycledFlip Ticket recycled-rate FLIP basis for the caller's combined affiliate call
  1923	    function _callTicketPurchase(
  1924	        address buyer,
  1925	        uint256 quantity,
  1926	        MintPaymentKind payKind,
  1927	        bool payInCoin,
  1928	        bytes32 affiliateCode,
  1929	        uint256 value,
  1930	        uint24 cachedLevel,
  1931	        bool cachedJpFlag
  1932	    )
  1933	        private
  1934	        returns (
  1935	            uint256 bonusCredit,
  1936	            uint32 adjustedQty32,
  1937	            uint24 targetLevel,
  1938	            uint32 flipMintUnits,
  1939	            uint256 ticketFreshFlip,
  1940	            uint256 ticketRecycledFlip,
  1941	            uint256 ticketNextShare,
  1942	            uint256 ticketFutureShare,
  1943	            uint256 ticketClaimableDraw
  1944	        )
  1945	    {
  1946	        if (quantity == 0) revert E();
  1947	        // Liveness is gated by both callers (_purchaseForWithCached / _redeemFlipFor)
  1948	        // before any state is touched, so it is not re-evaluated here.
  1949	        // compressedJackpotFlag / jackpotCounter are consumed only on jackpot-phase
  1950	        // buys (every use below is short-circuit-gated on cachedJpFlag), so the
  1951	        // slot-0 reads are skipped during the purchase phase. nextStep mirrors the
  1952	        // JackpotModule step size for the level's remaining daily jackpots.
  1953	        uint8 cachedComp;
  1954	        uint8 cachedCnt;
  1955	        uint8 nextStep = 1;
  1956	        if (cachedJpFlag) {
  1957	            cachedComp = compressedJackpotFlag;
  1958	            cachedCnt = jackpotCounter;
  1959	            if (
  1960	                cachedComp == 1 &&
  1961	                cachedCnt > 0 &&
  1962	                cachedCnt < JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP - 1
  1963	            ) {
  1964	                nextStep = 2;
  1965	            }
  1966	        }
  1967	        targetLevel = cachedJpFlag ? cachedLevel : cachedLevel + 1;
  1968	        // Last jackpot day fix: route to level+1 to prevent stranded tickets
  1969	        // (_endPhase breaks before _unlockRng, so no future daily draw at this level)
  1970	        if (cachedJpFlag && rngLockedFlag) {
  1971	            uint8 step = cachedComp == 2 ? JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP : nextStep;
  1972	            if (cachedCnt + step >= JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP)
  1973	                targetLevel = cachedLevel + 1;
  1974	        }
  1975	        uint256 priceWei = PriceLookupLib.priceForLevel(targetLevel);
  1976	        uint256 costWei = (priceWei * quantity) / (4 * QTY_SCALE);
  1977	        if (costWei == 0) revert E();
  1978	        if (costWei < TICKET_MIN_BUYIN_WEI) revert E();
  1979	
  1980	        uint256 adjustedQuantity = quantity;
  1981	        if (!payInCoin) {
  1982	            // Nested delegatecall straight into the boon module (this frame already
  1983	            // runs in the Game's storage context), skipping the external self-call
  1984	            // round trip through the Game dispatcher.
  1985	            (bool boostOk, bytes memory boostData) = ContractAddresses
  1986	                .GAME_BOON_MODULE
  1987	                .delegatecall(
  1988	                    abi.encodeWithSelector(
  1989	                        IDegenerusGameBoonModule.consumePurchaseBoost.selector,
  1990	                        buyer
  1991	                    )
  1992	                );
  1993	            if (!boostOk) _revertDelegate(boostData);
  1994	            uint16 boostBps = abi.decode(boostData, (uint16));
  1995	            if (boostBps != 0) {
  1996	                uint256 cappedValue = costWei > LOOTBOX_BOOST_MAX_VALUE
  1997	                    ? LOOTBOX_BOOST_MAX_VALUE
  1998	                    : costWei;
  1999	                uint256 cappedQty = priceWei == 0
  2000	                    ? 0
  2001	                    : ((cappedValue * 4 * QTY_SCALE) / priceWei);
  2002	                adjustedQuantity += (cappedQty * boostBps) / 10_000;
  2003	            }
  2004	        }
  2005	        adjustedQty32 = uint32(adjustedQuantity);
  2006	
  2007	        if (payInCoin) {
  2008	            uint256 coinCost = (quantity * (PRICE_COIN_UNIT / 4)) /
  2009	                QTY_SCALE;
  2010	            _coinReceive(buyer, coinCost);
  2011	
  2012	            // MINT_FLIP quest units (the reward is credited by the caller).
  2013	            uint32 questQty = uint32(quantity / (4 * QTY_SCALE));
  2014	            if (questQty != 0) {
  2015	                flipMintUnits += questQty;
  2016	            }
  2017	        } else {
  2018	            uint32 mintUnits = adjustedQty32;
  2019	
  2020	            uint256 claimableBefore = _claimableOf(buyer);
  2021	            // Direct internal payment processing — `value` is the exact ETH this leg carries
  2022	            // (what the former value-bearing self-call re-scoped into its msg.value). The
  2023	            // prize-pool shares are returned, not written, so the caller folds the ticket and
  2024	            // lootbox legs into one pool RMW.
  2025	            (
  2026	                ticketNextShare,
  2027	                ticketFutureShare,
  2028	                ticketClaimableDraw
  2029	            ) = _recordMintPayment(buyer, costWei, payKind, value);
  2030	            // Mint-data recording runs after the payment processing, before the freshEth
  2031	            // read (it touches neither claimable nor pool state either way).
  2032	            _recordMintData(buyer, targetLevel, mintUnits);
  2033	
  2034	            // Fresh ETH for the affiliate split = ticket cost minus the recycled claimable
  2035	            // portion the payment just drew; the afking-drawn portion counts as fresh (own
  2036	            // principal -> fresh-rate affiliate, including the lootbox activity score). Pay-kind
  2037	            // validation already ran inside the payment processing.
  2038	            uint256 freshEth = costWei - (claimableBefore - _claimableOf(buyer));
  2039	
  2040	            // Day before final jackpot draw (not turbo): +100 FLIP per ticket for affiliates
  2041	            // Basis inflated by 7/5 (lvl 0-3, 25% rate) or 3/2 (lvl 4+, 20% rate) to yield +100 after scaling
  2042	            uint256 freshFlip = freshEth != 0
  2043	                ? _ethToFlipValue(freshEth, priceWei)
  2044	                : 0;
  2045	            if (freshFlip != 0 && cachedJpFlag && cachedComp != 2) {
  2046	                if (cachedCnt + nextStep >= JACKPOT_LEVEL_CAP) {
  2047	                    freshFlip = targetLevel <= 3
  2048	                        ? (freshFlip * 7) / 5
  2049	                        : (freshFlip * 3) / 2;
  2050	                }
  2051	            }
  2052	
  2053	            // Affiliate is settled ONCE for the whole buy by the caller (payAffiliateCombined),
  2054	            // which needs this leg's fresh + recycled FLIP components. Fresh = the fresh-rate
  2055	            // basis (afking-drawn principal counts as fresh, already folded into freshFlip);
  2056	            // recycled = the claimable portion (costWei - freshEth) at the recycled rate. The
  2057	            // per-payKind split collapses to (freshFlip, recycledEth): DirectEth has no recycled
  2058	            // (recycledEth == 0); Combined/Claimable carry the claimable draw.
  2059	            uint256 recycledEth = costWei - freshEth;
  2060	            ticketFreshFlip = freshFlip;
  2061	            ticketRecycledFlip = recycledEth != 0
  2062	                ? _ethToFlipValue(recycledEth, priceWei)
  2063	                : 0;
  2064	
  2065	            uint256 coinCost = (quantity * (PRICE_COIN_UNIT / 4)) /
  2066	                QTY_SCALE;
  2067	            bonusCredit = coinCost / 10;
  2068	            if (quantity >= 10 * 4 * QTY_SCALE) {
  2069	                bonusCredit +=
  2070	                    (quantity * PRICE_COIN_UNIT) /
  2071	                    (80 * QTY_SCALE);
  2072	            }
  2073	        }
  2074	    }
  2075	
  2076	    function _coinReceive(address payer, uint256 amount) private {
  2077	        coin.burnCoin(payer, amount);
  2078	    }
  2079	
  2080	    /// @dev Convert ETH-denominated spend to FLIP base units at current ticket price.
  2081	    function _ethToFlipValue(
  2082	        uint256 amountWei,
  2083	        uint256 priceWei
  2084	    ) private pure returns (uint256) {
  2085	        if (amountWei == 0 || priceWei == 0) return 0;
  2086	        return (amountWei * PRICE_COIN_UNIT) / priceWei;
  2087	    }
  2088	
  2089	    /// @dev Calculate boost amount given base amount and bonus bps
  2090	    function _calculateBoost(
  2091	        uint256 amount,
  2092	        uint16 bonusBps
  2093	    ) private pure returns (uint256) {
  2094	        uint256 cappedAmount = amount > LOOTBOX_BOOST_MAX_VALUE
  2095	            ? LOOTBOX_BOOST_MAX_VALUE
  2096	            : amount;
  2097	        unchecked {
  2098	            return (cappedAmount * bonusBps) / 10_000;
  2099	        }
  2100	    }
  2101	
  2102	    function _applyLootboxBoostOnPurchase(
  2103	        address player,
  2104	        uint256 amount
  2105	    ) private returns (uint256 boostedAmount) {
  2106	        boostedAmount = amount;
  2107	        BoonPacked storage bp = boonPacked[player];
  2108	        uint256 s0 = bp.slot0;
  2109	        uint8 tier = uint8(s0 >> BP_LOOTBOX_TIER_SHIFT);
  2110	        if (tier == 0) return boostedAmount;
  2111	
  2112	        // The purchase day (== the buy is happening now) — read here, only on the boost path.
  2113	        uint24 day = _simulatedDayIndex();
  2114	        // Deity-granted boosts are valid only on the grant day.
  2115	        uint24 deityDay = uint24(s0 >> BP_DEITY_LOOTBOX_DAY_SHIFT);
  2116	        if (deityDay != 0 && deityDay != day) {
  2117	            bp.slot0 = s0 & BP_LOOTBOX_CLEAR;
  2118	            return boostedAmount;
  2119	        }
  2120	        // Check expiry
  2121	        uint24 stampDay = uint24(s0 >> BP_LOOTBOX_DAY_SHIFT);
  2122	        if (
  2123	            stampDay != 0 && day > stampDay + LOOTBOX_BOOST_EXPIRY_DAYS
  2124	        ) {
  2125	            // Expired: clear lootbox fields
  2126	            bp.slot0 = s0 & BP_LOOTBOX_CLEAR;
  2127	            return boostedAmount;
  2128	        }
  2129	
  2130	        // Apply boost
  2131	        uint16 boostBps = _lootboxTierToBps(tier);
  2132	        boostedAmount += _calculateBoost(amount, boostBps);
  2133	
  2134	        // Clear lootbox fields (consumed)
  2135	        bp.slot0 = s0 & BP_LOOTBOX_CLEAR;
  2136	
  2137	        emit BoostUsed(player, day, amount, boostedAmount, boostBps);
  2138	    }
  2139	}

187-    /// @dev VRF stall duration that flips liveness from "grace" to "VRF-dead game-over".
188-    ///      Below this, liveness is suppressed so players can propose a coordinator rotation.

190-    uint48 internal constant _VRF_GRACE_PERIOD = 14 days;
191-
192-    /// @dev RNG-stall length (in sealed days) past which the VRF-death deadman fires regardless
193:    ///      of phase. dailyIdx only advances on a successful day-seal, so currentDay - dailyIdx
194-    ///      counts days since the last good word; it freezes during ANY stall (dead coordinator,
195-    ///      unfilled LINK, request-from-zero revert) and clears only after game-over latches.
196-    ///      Far above the in-phase clocks, so it never fires on a healthy game.
197-    uint24 internal constant _VRF_DEADMAN_DAYS = 120;

686-    /// @dev Converts a post-Bernoulli whole-ticket count into the entries unit the

     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only
     2	pragma solidity 0.8.34;
     3	
     4	import {IDegenerusGame, MintPaymentKind} from "../interfaces/IDegenerusGame.sol";
     5	import {DegenerusGameStorage} from "../storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol";
     6	import {ContractAddresses} from "../ContractAddresses.sol";
     7	
     8	/// @dev Minimal stETH interface (ERC20 subset)
     9	interface IStETH {
    10	    /// @param account Address to query balance of.
    11	    function balanceOf(address account) external view returns (uint256);
    12	    /// @param to Recipient address.
    13	    /// @param amount Transfer amount in wei.
    14	    function transfer(address to, uint256 amount) external returns (bool);
    15	}
    16	
    17	/// @dev Admin interface for VRF shutdown during final sweep.
    18	interface IDegenerusAdminShutdown {
    19	    function shutdownVrf() external;
    20	}
    21	
    22	/// @dev GNRUS interface for gameover GNRUS cleanup.
    23	interface IGNRUSGameOver {
    24	    function burnAtGameOver() external;
    25	    function onFinalSweep() external;
    26	}
    27	
    28	interface IFlipTombstone {
    29	    function tombstoneAtGameOver() external;
    30	}
    31	
    32	/**
    33	 * @title DegenerusGameGameOverModule
    34	 * @notice Handles game over logic including jackpot distribution and final sweeps.
    35	 * @dev Executed via delegatecall from DegenerusGame. Inherits storage layout.
    36	 */
    37	contract DegenerusGameGameOverModule is DegenerusGameStorage {
    38	    /// @notice stETH token contract for liquid staking rewards
    39	    IStETH private constant steth = IStETH(ContractAddresses.STETH_TOKEN);
    40	
    41	    /// @notice Admin contract for VRF shutdown
    42	    IDegenerusAdminShutdown private constant admin =
    43	        IDegenerusAdminShutdown(ContractAddresses.ADMIN);
    44	
    45	    /// @notice GNRUS contract for gameover cleanup
    46	    IGNRUSGameOver private constant charityGameOver =
    47	        IGNRUSGameOver(ContractAddresses.GNRUS);
    48	
    49	    /// @notice FLIP coin contract for the gameover worthless-token tombstone flood
    50	    IFlipTombstone private constant flip =
    51	        IFlipTombstone(ContractAddresses.COIN);
    52	
    53	    /// @notice Fixed refund amount per deity pass for early game over (levels 0-9)
    54	    uint256 private constant DEITY_PASS_EARLY_GAMEOVER_REFUND =
    55	        20 ether;
    56	
    57	    // error E() — inherited from DegenerusGameStorage
    58	
    59	    /// @notice Process game over by distributing remaining funds via jackpots.
    60	    /// @dev Called when liveness guards trigger (1yr deploy timeout or 120-day inactivity).
    61	    ///      Sets terminal gameOver flag.
    62	    ///
    63	    ///      Distribution logic:
    64	    ///      - If game ended early (levels 0-9): Fixed 20 ETH refund per deity pass purchased,
    65	    ///        FIFO by purchase order, budget-capped to available funds minus claimablePool
    66	    ///      - Remaining funds: 10% to Decimator, 90% to next-level ticketholders
    67	    ///      - Decimator refunds flow to terminal jackpot pool
    68	    ///      - Any uncredited remainder swept to vault and sDGNRS
    69	    ///
    70	    ///      Reads rngWordByDay[day] for entropy; reverts if funds exist but word is not yet available.
    71	    ///      VRF fallback logic (historical word, stall timeout) is in AdvanceModule._gameOverEntropy.
    72	    /// @param day Day index for RNG word lookup from rngWordByDay mapping.
    73	    /// @custom:reverts Invariant When distributable funds exist but the RNG word is unavailable (defense-in-depth).
    74	    /// @custom:reverts TransferFailed When an stETH or ETH transfer fails.
    75	    function handleGameOverDrain(uint24 day) external {
    76	        if (_goRead(GO_JACKPOT_PAID_SHIFT, GO_JACKPOT_PAID_MASK) != 0) return; // Already processed
    77	
    78	        uint24 lvl = level;
    79	
    80	        uint256 totalFunds = address(this).balance + steth.balanceOf(address(this));
    81	
    82	        // Compute available funds FIRST (before any side effects)
    83	        // Deity pass refunds have not happened yet, so claimablePool is pre-refund.
    84	        // sDGNRS redemption ETH is segregated out of the game at submit (pullRedemptionReserve
    85	        // transfers it to the sDGNRS contract), so it is no longer part of totalFunds here —
    86	        // subtracting pendingRedemptionEthValue would double-count it.
    87	        uint256 reserved = uint256(claimablePool);
    88	        uint256 preRefundAvailable = totalFunds > reserved ? totalFunds - reserved : 0;
    89	
    90	        // RNG gate: when distributable funds exist, require RNG word.
    91	        // Defense-in-depth -- caller (_handleGameOverPath) already guarantees
    92	        // rngWordByDay[day] != 0 before calling, so this revert should never fire.
    93	        uint256 rngWord;
    94	        if (preRefundAvailable != 0) {
    95	            rngWord = rngWordByDay[day];
    96	            if (rngWord == 0) revert Invariant();
    97	        }
    98	
    99	        // === All side effects below this line (RNG confirmed or no funds to distribute) ===
   100	
   101	        // Deity pass refunds (levels 0-9): refund each owner what they paid, capped at the flat
   102	        // DEITY_PASS_EARLY_GAMEOVER_REFUND so a boon-discounted deity (paid < 20 ETH) never refunds
   103	        // more than it paid, then clamped to the remaining distributable budget (FIFO).
   104	        if (lvl < 10) {
   105	            uint256 ownerCount = deityPassOwners.length;
   106	            uint256 budget = preRefundAvailable;
   107	            uint256 totalRefunded;
   108	            for (uint256 i; i < ownerCount; ) {
   109	                address owner = deityPassOwners[i];
   110	                uint256 refund = deityPassPricePaid[owner];
   111	                if (refund != 0) {
   112	                    if (refund > DEITY_PASS_EARLY_GAMEOVER_REFUND) {
   113	                        refund = DEITY_PASS_EARLY_GAMEOVER_REFUND;
   114	                    }
   115	                    if (refund > budget) {
   116	                        refund = budget;
   117	                    }
   118	                    if (refund != 0) {
   119	                        _creditClaimable(owner, refund);
   120	                        unchecked {
   121	                            totalRefunded += refund;
   122	                            budget -= refund;
   123	                        }
   124	                    }
   125	                    if (budget == 0) break;
   126	                }
   127	                unchecked {
   128	                    ++i;
   129	                }
   130	            }
   131	            if (totalRefunded != 0) {
   132	                claimablePool += uint128(totalRefunded); // Safe: totalRefunded bounded by preRefundAvailable which fits uint128
   133	            }
   134	        }
   135	
   136	        // Latch terminal state
   137	        gameOver = true;
   138	        _goWrite(GO_TIME_SHIFT, GO_TIME_MASK, uint48(block.timestamp));
   139	
   140	        // Burn unallocated tokens
   141	        charityGameOver.burnAtGameOver();
   142	        dgnrs.burnAtGameOver();
   143	        // Flood FLIP's VAULT mint allowance as a one-shot worthless-token tombstone
   144	        flip.tombstoneAtGameOver();
   145	
   146	        _goWrite(GO_JACKPOT_PAID_SHIFT, GO_JACKPOT_PAID_MASK, 1);
   147	        _setNextPrizePool(0);
   148	        _setFuturePrizePool(0);
   149	        _setCurrentPrizePool(0);
   150	        yieldAccumulator = 0;
   151	        // Terminal state also clears the freeze: with the live pools drained, _unlockRng's
   152	        // _unfreezePool must not resurrect the pending pool back into them, and no
   153	        // post-gameOver box/Degenerette resolution may draw ETH from a phantom pending pool.
   154	        prizePoolPendingPacked = 0;
   155	        prizePoolFrozen = false;
   156	        // All three pools are drained to zero at game over. Emit the terminal snapshot here —
   157	        // before the available==0 early return below — so every game-over path logs it once. The
   158	        // daily snapshot in _unlockRng skips game-over (gameOver is set above) to avoid a duplicate.
   159	        emit PrizePoolDailySnapshot(
   160	            0,
   161	            0,
   162	            0,
   163	            claimablePool,
   164	            address(this).balance + steth.balanceOf(address(this)),
   165	            yieldAccumulator
   166	        );
   167	
   168	        // Recalculate available after refunds (claimablePool may have grown).
   169	        // sDGNRS redemption ETH was already segregated out of the game at submit, so it is not
   170	        // part of totalFunds here — only claimablePool is reserved.
   171	        uint256 postRefundReserved = uint256(claimablePool);
   172	        uint256 available = totalFunds > postRefundReserved ? totalFunds - postRefundReserved : 0;
   173	
   174	        if (available == 0) return;
   175	
   176	        emit GameOverDrained(lvl, available, claimablePool);
   177	
   178	        // remaining tracks unallocated funds.
   179	        uint256 remaining = available;
   180	
   181	        // 10% Terminal Decimator (death bet) -- refunds flow back to remaining for terminal jackpot
   182	        uint256 decPool = remaining / 10;
   183	        if (decPool != 0) {
   184	            uint256 decRefund = IDegenerusGame(address(this)).runTerminalDecimatorJackpot(decPool, lvl, rngWord);
   185	            uint256 decSpend = decPool - decRefund;
   186	            if (decSpend != 0) {
   187	                claimablePool += uint128(decSpend); // Safe: decSpend bounded by decPool which is a fraction of available
   188	            }
   189	            remaining -= decPool;
   190	            remaining += decRefund;
   191	        }
   192	
   193	        // 90% (+ decimator refund) to next-level ticketholders (Day-5-style bucket distribution).
   194	        // gameOver=true prevents auto-rebuy inside _addClaimableEth (tickets worthless post-game).
   195	        // Any leftover from empty trait buckets stays in the contract until handleFinalSweep
   196	        // (30 days later) folds it into the three-way split to vault / sDGNRS / GNRUS.
   197	        if (remaining != 0) {
   198	            IDegenerusGame(address(this)).runTerminalJackpot(remaining, lvl + 1, rngWord);
   199	        }
   200	    }
   201	
   202	    /// @notice Final sweep of all remaining funds after 30 days post-gameover.
   203	    /// @dev Pays each sink (vault, sDGNRS, GNRUS) the claimable balance still
   204	    ///      owed to it, then splits the remainder ~1/3 each (GNRUS absorbs the
   205	    ///      rounding wei). All other unclaimed player balances are forfeited.
   206	    ///      After GO_SWEPT=1, claimWinnings() reverts, so this is the last
   207	    ///      chance for the three sinks to receive what they earned in-game.
   208	    ///      Also shuts down the VRF subscription and sweeps LINK to vault.
   209	    /// @custom:reverts TransferFailed When ETH or stETH transfer fails
   210	    function handleFinalSweep() external {
   211	        uint256 goTime = _goRead(GO_TIME_SHIFT, GO_TIME_MASK);
   212	        if (goTime == 0) return; // Game not over yet
   213	        if (block.timestamp < goTime + 30 days) return; // Too early
   214	        if (_goRead(GO_SWEPT_SHIFT, GO_SWEPT_MASK) != 0) return; // Already swept
   215	
   216	        _goWrite(GO_SWEPT_SHIFT, GO_SWEPT_MASK, 1);
   217	        charityGameOver.onFinalSweep(); // stamp GNRUS with the sweep time (anchors its recovery gates)
   218	
   219	        uint256 owedV  = _claimableOf(ContractAddresses.VAULT);
   220	        uint256 owedSD = _claimableOf(ContractAddresses.SDGNRS);
   221	        uint256 owedG  = _claimableOf(ContractAddresses.GNRUS);
   222	        _debitClaimable(ContractAddresses.VAULT, owedV);
   223	        _debitClaimable(ContractAddresses.SDGNRS, owedSD);
   224	        _debitClaimable(ContractAddresses.GNRUS, owedG);
   225	        if (owedV  != 0) emit ClaimableSpent(ContractAddresses.VAULT,  owedV,  0, MintPaymentKind.Internal, owedV);
   226	        if (owedSD != 0) emit ClaimableSpent(ContractAddresses.SDGNRS, owedSD, 0, MintPaymentKind.Internal, owedSD);
   227	        if (owedG  != 0) emit ClaimableSpent(ContractAddresses.GNRUS,  owedG,  0, MintPaymentKind.Internal, owedG);
   228	        claimablePool = 0;
   229	
   230	        // Shutdown VRF subscription (fire-and-forget; failure must not block sweep)
   231	        try admin.shutdownVrf() {} catch {}
   232	
   233	        uint256 ethBal = address(this).balance;
   234	        uint256 stBal = steth.balanceOf(address(this));
   235	        uint256 totalFunds = ethBal + stBal;
   236	
   237	        emit FinalSwept(totalFunds);
   238	
   239	        if (totalFunds == 0) return;
   240	
   241	        // Invariant claimablePool >= sum(claimableWinnings[*]) and balance >=
   242	        // claimablePool guarantee totalFunds >= owedV+owedSD+owedG; if the
   243	        // invariant ever fails, _sendStethFirst reverts (hard-revert policy).
   244	        uint256 remainder  = totalFunds - (owedV + owedSD + owedG);
   245	        uint256 thirdShare = remainder / 3;
   246	        uint256 gnrusExtra = remainder - thirdShare - thirdShare;
   247	
   248	        stBal = _sendStethFirst(ContractAddresses.VAULT,  owedV  + thirdShare, stBal);
   249	        stBal = _sendStethFirst(ContractAddresses.SDGNRS, owedSD + thirdShare, stBal);
   250	        _sendStethFirst(ContractAddresses.GNRUS,          owedG  + gnrusExtra, stBal);
   251	    }
   252	
   253	    /// @dev Send stETH first to a recipient, then ETH for the remainder. Returns updated stETH balance.
   254	    ///      IMPORTANT: Hard-reverts on stETH/ETH transfer failure. Because game-over
   255	    ///      sets terminal state flags that roll back on revert, a stuck stETH transfer
   256	    ///      would block game-over processing until the transfer succeeds.
   257	    /// @param to Recipient address.
   258	    /// @param amount Total amount to send (stETH preferred, ETH as fallback).
   259	    /// @param stethBal Remaining stETH balance available for transfers.
   260	    /// @return Updated stETH balance after transfer.
   261	    function _sendStethFirst(address to, uint256 amount, uint256 stethBal) private returns (uint256) {
   262	        if (amount == 0) return stethBal;
   263	        if (amount <= stethBal) {
   264	            if (!steth.transfer(to, amount)) revert TransferFailed();
   265	            return stethBal - amount;
   266	        }
   267	        if (stethBal != 0) {
   268	            if (!steth.transfer(to, stethBal)) revert TransferFailed();
   269	        }
   270	        uint256 ethAmount = amount - stethBal;
   271	        if (ethAmount != 0) {
   272	            (bool ok, ) = payable(to).call{value: ethAmount}("");
   273	            if (!ok) revert TransferFailed();
   274	        }
   275	        return 0;
   276	    }
   277	}

codex
The committed code confirms the critical shape so far: game-over obtains entropy without calling the queue-swap helper, while ticket purchases write through the opposite-slot key. I’m now checking the terminal-jackpot implementation to rule out any indirect materialization of that write queue.

  1011	    /// @dev Splices the solo-quadrant selection into the low 2 bits of `entropy`
  1012	    ///      so `JackpotBucketLib.soloBucketIndex` lands on the picked quadrant.
  1013	    function _soloAdjustedEntropy(
  1014	        uint8[4] memory traitIds,
  1015	        uint256 entropy
  1016	    ) private pure returns (uint256) {
  1017	        uint8 soloQuadrant = _pickSoloQuadrant(traitIds, entropy);
  1018	        return (entropy & ~uint256(3)) | uint256((3 - soloQuadrant) & 3);

  1021	    // =========================================================================
  1022	    // Daily Jackpot ETH — Distribution
  1023	    // =========================================================================
  1024	
  1025	    /// @dev Unified ETH distribution across trait buckets. All buckets are paid
  1026	    ///      in a single call (the full DAILY_ETH_MAX_WINNERS ceiling).
  1027	    ///
  1028	    ///      JACKPOT PHASE vs PURCHASE/TERMINAL:
  1029	    ///      - Jackpot phase (isJackpotPhase=true): Solo bucket gets whale pass + DGNRS on final day.
  1030	    ///      - Purchase/terminal (isJackpotPhase=false): All buckets paid uniformly.
  1031	    ///
  1032	    /// @param lvl The level whose winners are being paid.
  1033	    /// @param ethPool Total ETH to distribute.
  1034	    /// @param entropy VRF-derived random word for winner selection.
  1035	    /// @param traitIds The 4 winning trait IDs.
  1036	    /// @param shareBps Basis-point share for each of the 4 buckets.
  1037	    /// @param bucketCounts Number of holders in each trait bucket.
  1038	    /// @param isJackpotPhase True during jackpot phase (solo bucket gets whale pass).
  1039	    /// @return paidEth Total ETH actually paid out in this call.
  1040	    function _processDailyEth(
  1041	        uint24 lvl,
  1042	        uint256 ethPool,
  1043	        uint256 entropy,
  1044	        uint8[4] memory traitIds,
  1045	        uint16[4] memory shareBps,
  1046	        uint16[4] memory bucketCounts,
  1047	        bool isJackpotPhase
  1048	    ) private returns (uint256 paidEth) {
  1049	        if (ethPool == 0) {
  1050	            return 0;
  1051	        }
  1052	
  1053	        uint256 unit = PriceLookupLib.priceForLevel(lvl + 1) >> 2;
  1054	        uint8 remainderIdx = JackpotBucketLib.soloBucketIndex(entropy);
  1055	        uint256[4] memory shares = JackpotBucketLib.bucketShares(
  1056	            ethPool, shareBps, bucketCounts, remainderIdx, unit
  1057	        );
  1058	
  1059	        uint8[4] memory order = JackpotBucketLib.bucketOrderLargestFirst(
  1060	            bucketCounts
  1061	        );
  1062	
  1063	        uint256 entropyState = entropy;
  1064	        uint256 liabilityDelta;
  1065	
  1066	        for (uint8 j; j < 4; ) {
  1067	            uint8 traitIdx = order[j];
  1068	
  1069	            uint16 count = bucketCounts[traitIdx];
  1070	            uint256 share = shares[traitIdx];
  1071	            if (count == 0 || share == 0) {
  1072	                unchecked {
  1073	                    ++j;
  1074	                }
  1075	                continue;
  1076	            }
  1077	
  1078	            entropyState = uint256(
  1079	                keccak256(abi.encode(entropyState, traitIdx, share))
  1080	            );
  1081	
  1082	            uint256 paidDelta;
  1083	            uint256 claimDelta;
  1084	            (paidDelta, claimDelta, entropyState) = _processBucket(
  1085	                lvl,
  1086	                traitIds[traitIdx],
  1087	                traitIdx,
  1088	                count,
  1089	                share,
  1090	                entropyState,
  1091	                isJackpotPhase && traitIdx == remainderIdx
  1092	            );
  1093	            paidEth += paidDelta;
  1094	            liabilityDelta += claimDelta;
  1095	            unchecked {
  1096	                ++j;
  1097	            }
  1098	        }
  1099	
  1100	        if (liabilityDelta != 0) {
  1101	            claimablePool += uint128(liabilityDelta);
  1102	        }
  1103	    }
  1104	
  1105	    /// @dev Resolves and pays one trait bucket. Selects up to MAX_BUCKET_WINNERS
  1106	    ///      ticket holders for the bucket and credits each winner. The solo path
  1107	    ///      (isSolo, jackpot phase only) routes the single winner through the
  1108	    ///      whale-pass + final-day DGNRS handler; every other bucket pays 100% ETH.
  1109	    /// @return paidDelta ETH value paid out for this bucket.
  1110	    /// @return claimDelta Claimable-liability added for this bucket.
  1111	    /// @return newEntropy Updated entropy after winner selection.
  1112	    function _processBucket(
  1113	        uint24 lvl,
  1114	        uint8 traitId,
  1115	        uint8 traitIdx,
  1116	        uint16 count,
  1117	        uint256 share,
  1118	        uint256 entropy,
  1119	        bool isSolo
  1120	    ) private returns (uint256 paidDelta, uint256 claimDelta, uint256 newEntropy) {
  1121	        newEntropy = entropy;
  1122	
  1123	        uint16 totalCount = count;
  1124	        if (totalCount > MAX_BUCKET_WINNERS) totalCount = MAX_BUCKET_WINNERS;
  1125	
  1126	        (
  1127	            address[] memory winners,
  1128	            uint256[] memory ticketIndexes
  1129	        ) = _randTraitTicket(
  1130	                lvlTraitEntry[lvl],
  1131	                newEntropy,
  1132	                traitId,
  1133	                uint8(totalCount),
  1134	                uint8(200 + traitIdx)
  1135	            );
  1136	        if (winners.length == 0) return (0, 0, newEntropy);
  1137	
  1138	        uint256 perWinner = share / totalCount;
  1139	        if (perWinner == 0) return (0, 0, newEntropy);
  1140	
  1141	        if (isSolo) {
  1142	            // Solo bucket (jackpot phase): whale pass + DGNRS on final day
  1143	            address w = winners[0];
  1144	            if (w != address(0)) {
  1145	                (claimDelta, paidDelta, newEntropy) = _handleSoloBucketWinner(
  1146	                    w, lvl, traitId, ticketIndexes[0],
  1147	                    perWinner, newEntropy
  1148	                );
  1149	            }
  1150	        } else {
  1151	            // Normal bucket: 100% ETH
  1152	            (paidDelta, claimDelta) = _payNormalBucket(
  1153	                winners, ticketIndexes, perWinner, lvl, traitId
  1154	            );
  1155	        }
  1156	    }

   601	        // outward, leaving upper player-address bits invisible to the roll
   602	        // outcome; keccak gives full low-bit diffusion of the high-bit input.
   603	        uint256 rollEntropy = EntropyLib.hash2(entropy, rollSalt);

   606	
   607	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   608	    // External Entry Point — Current-Level Ticket Batch Processing
   609	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   610	
   611	    /// @notice Processes a batch of current-level tickets with gas-bounded iteration.
   612	    /// @dev Called iteratively until all tickets for the level are processed. Uses a writes budget
   613	    ///      to stay within block gas limits. The first batch in a new level round is
   614	    ///      scaled down by 35% to account for cold storage access costs.
   615	    /// @param lvl Level whose tickets should be processed.
   616	    /// @return finished True if all tickets for this level have been fully processed.
   617	    /// @return didWork True if this call materialized at least one ticket entry or foil
   618	    ///         buyer. Lets the advance chain break out before composing a finishing batch
   619	    ///         with a same-tx BAF/jackpot, even when the batch both starts and finishes in
   620	    ///         one call (cursor returns to 0, so a cursor-delta probe would read no work).
   621	    function processTicketBatch(uint24 lvl)
   622	        external
   623	        returns (bool finished, bool didWork)
   624	    {
   625	        uint24 rk = _tqReadKey(lvl);
   626	        mapping(address => uint40) storage owedMap = entriesOwedPacked[rk];
   627	        address[] storage queue = ticketQueue[rk];
   628	        uint256 total = queue.length;
   629	
   630	        if (ticketLevel != lvl) {
   631	            ticketLevel = lvl;
   632	            ticketCursor = 0;
   633	        }
   634	
   635	        uint256 idx = ticketCursor;
   636	        uint32 writesBudget = WRITES_BUDGET_SAFE;
   637	        if (idx == 0) {
   638	            writesBudget -= (writesBudget * 35) / 100; // 65% scaling for cold storage
   639	        }
   640	
   641	        if (idx >= total) {
   642	            // Normal queue already drained (empty this level, or finished on a prior
   643	            // tx). Still drain the per-buy-day foil buckets on the full budget before
   644	            // declaring the level finished — the readiness gate depends on it. Returns
   645	            // false (resume next tx) only if a budget-short foil pack defers. _drainFoil
   646	            // short-circuits on _foilDrainPending, so a no-foil call is a single SLOAD.
   647	            if (total != 0) {
   648	                delete ticketQueue[rk];
   649	            }

   655	            }
   656	            return (false, foilDrainedEmpty);
   657	        }

   701	            // (16) boosted entries atomically; foilDrainDay/foilCursor make a
   702	            // budget-short deferral resumable. Only when BOTH the queue and the foil
   703	            // drain are caught up is the level finished, so the readiness gate cannot
   704	            // let the jackpot draw early.

   710	            // to the next tx) rather than underflowing the subtraction.

   714	            // resolved — the signal the advance chain reads to refuse same-tx composition.

   727	        // its own terminal cursor/level pair, so the shared packed slot is stored
   728	        // exactly once per path.

   730	        return (false, used > 0);

   733	    /// @dev Hand the per-buy-day foil buckets to the foil module on the leftover write
   734	    ///      budget after the normal queue is exhausted. The drain itself lives in
   735	    ///      DegenerusGameFoilPackModule (this near-full module would otherwise exceed
   736	    ///      the EIP-170 runtime limit); the delegatecall runs there in the Game's
   737	    ///      storage context, so it walks foilDrainDay/foilCursor and writes the same
   738	    ///      lvlTraitEntry buckets this module would have. When no foil drain is
   739	    ///      pending (none ever bought, or every sealed bucket already drained) the foil
   740	    ///      module is not invoked at all — the common advance carries no foil-module
   741	    ///      dependency, gas, or brick surface.
   742	    /// @return done True iff the foil drain has caught up (no sealed bucket remains).
   743	    /// @return drained True if this call resolved at least one foil buyer.
   744	    function _drainFoil(uint32 room) private returns (bool done, bool drained) {
   745	        if (!_foilDrainPending()) return (true, false);
   746	        // A foil buyer costs a fixed FOIL_PACK_ENTRIES*2 + 3 budget units; if the
   747	        // normal queue already consumed the budget there is no room for even one, so
   748	        // defer to the next tx WITHOUT the delegatecall (pending foil is never "done"
   749	        // here — the readiness gate keeps the draw blocked until it drains).
   750	        if (room < (FOIL_PACK_ENTRIES * 2) + 3) return (false, false);
   751	        (bool ok, bytes memory data) = ContractAddresses
   752	            .GAME_FOILPACK_MODULE
   753	            .delegatecall(
   754	                abi.encodeWithSelector(
   755	                    IDegenerusGameFoilPackModule.processFoilDrain.selector,
   756	                    room
   757	                )
   758	            );
   759	        if (!ok) {
   760	            if (data.length == 0) revert E();
   761	            assembly ("memory-safe") {
   762	                revert(add(32, data), mload(data))
   763	            }
   764	        }
   765	        return abi.decode(data, (bool, bool));
   766	    }

   769	    function _resolveZeroOwedRemainder(

   774	        uint256 baseKey

   781	            return (0, true);

   790	        newPacked = uint40(1) << 8;
   791	        if (newPacked != packed) {
   792	            owedMap[player] = newPacked;
   793	        }
   794	        return (newPacked, false);
   795	    }

   797	    /// @dev Processes a single ticket entry, returning writes used and whether to advance.
   798	    function _processOneTicketEntry(
   799	        address player,
   800	        uint24 lvl,
   801	        mapping(address => uint40) storage owedMap,
   802	        uint32 room,
   803	        uint32 processed,
   804	        uint256 entropy,
   805	        uint256 queueIdx,
   806	        uint32[256] memory counts,
   807	        uint8[256] memory touchedTraits
   808	    ) private returns (uint32 writesUsed, uint32 take, bool advance) {
   809	        uint40 packed = owedMap[player];
   810	        uint32 owed = uint32(packed >> 8);
   811	        uint256 baseKey = (uint256(lvl) << 224) |
   812	            (queueIdx << 192) |
   813	            (uint256(uint160(player)) << 32) |
   814	            uint256(owed);
   815	
   816	        if (owed == 0) {
   817	            bool skip;
   818	            (packed, skip) = _resolveZeroOwedRemainder(
   819	                packed,
   820	                owedMap,
   821	                player,
   822	                entropy,
   823	                baseKey
   824	            );
   825	            if (skip) return (1, 0, true);
   826	            owed = 1;
   827	        }
   828	
   829	        uint32 baseOv = (processed == 0 && owed <= 2) ? 4 : 2;
   830	        if (room <= baseOv) return (0, 0, false);
   831	        {
   832	            uint32 availRoom = room - baseOv;
   833	            uint32 maxT = (availRoom <= 256)
   834	                ? (availRoom >> 1)
   835	                : (availRoom - 256);
   836	            take = owed > maxT ? maxT : owed;
   837	        }
   838	        if (take == 0) return (0, 0, false);
   839	
   840	        _raritySymbolBatch(
   841	            player,
   842	            baseKey,
   843	            processed,
   844	            take,
   845	            entropy,
   846	            counts,
   847	            touchedTraits
   848	        );
   849	        emit TraitsGenerated(player, baseKey, take);
   850	
   851	        writesUsed =
   852	            ((take <= 256) ? (take << 1) : (take + 256)) +
   853	            baseOv +
   854	            (take == owed ? 1 : 0);

   856	        uint8 rem = uint8(packed);

   859	            remainingOwed = owed - take;
   860	        }

   864	            }

   866	        }

  1500	        uint64[] calldata betIds
  1501	    ) external {
  1502	        uint256 len = players.length;
  1503	        if (len == 0 || betIds.length != len) revert LengthMismatch();
  1504	
  1505	        // Short-circuit: probe item 0 (the caller's own choice). A resolved
  1506	        // bet is deleted (slot == 0), so a zero slot means a competitor got ahead.
  1507	        // The probe read doubles as iteration 0's bet read (do-while; len >= 1 here),
  1508	        // so later items load their slot at the loop bottom instead of re-reading item 0.
  1509	        uint256 betPacked = degeneretteBets[players[0]][betIds[0]];
  1510	        if (betPacked == 0) revert BatchAlreadyTaken();
  1511	
  1512	        uint256 successCount;
  1513	        uint256 totalResolved;
  1514	        uint256 i;
  1515	        // Single-bet array reused each iteration: resolveDegeneretteBets is the
  1516	        // catchable external boundary that gives per-item isolation (try/catch needs
  1517	        // an external call), so no dedicated self-call wrapper is required.
  1518	        uint64[] memory ids = new uint64[](1);
  1519	        do {
  1520	            // currency bits [40..41]: WWXRP is the most +EV currency, so it is excluded
  1521	            // from the >=3 reward gate to keep the faucet closed.
  1522	            uint8 currency = uint8((betPacked >> 40) & 0x3);
  1523	            ids[0] = betIds[i];
  1524	            // Per-item isolation: a stale/reverting/not-ready bet skips, never bricks.
  1525	            try this.resolveDegeneretteBets(players[i], ids) {
  1526	                // Any resolution counts toward the no-work gate; only non-WWXRP
  1527	                // resolutions count toward the >=3 flat-reward gate.
  1528	                unchecked {
  1529	                    ++totalResolved;
  1530	                    if (currency != 3) ++successCount;
  1531	                }
  1532	            } catch {}
  1533	            unchecked {
  1534	                ++i;
  1535	            }
  1536	            if (i == len) break;
  1537	            betPacked = degeneretteBets[players[i]][betIds[i]];
  1538	        } while (true);
  1539	
  1540	        // Flat ~1-FLIP "lose": pay ONCE at >=3 non-WWXRP resolutions; revert
  1541	        // NoWork() if nothing resolved; 1-2 resolved commit UNPAID (never strand the tail).
  1542	        if (totalResolved == 0) revert NoWork();
  1543	        if (successCount >= 3) coinflip.creditFlip(msg.sender, RESOLVE_FLAT_FLIP);
  1544	    }

  1546	    /// @notice O(1) discovery: does advanceGame() have pending work?

  1549	    ///      unbounded scan.
  1550	    function advanceDue() external view returns (bool) {
  1551	        if (_simulatedDayIndex() != dailyIdx) return true;

  1564	    /// @notice Would `who` earn the mintFlip advance bounty if they cranked right now?

  1570	
  1571	    /// @notice O(1) discovery hint: is there an openable box at the current open frontier?
  1572	    /// @dev rngLock/liveness-aware: FALSE during the freeze (the open leg no-ops). Checks the
  1573	    ///      frontier index (boxCursorIndex, clamped to the genesis index 1) against LR_INDEX-1
  1574	    ///      where words land. O(1), no scan; a drained frontier with boxes at a higher finalized
  1575	    ///      index self-heals as the next sweep advances the frontier.
  1576	    function boxesPending() external view returns (bool) {
  1577	        if (rngLockedFlag || _livenessTriggered()) return false;
  1578	        uint48 active = uint48(_lrRead(LR_INDEX_SHIFT, LR_INDEX_MASK));
  1579	        if (active <= 1) return false;
  1580	        uint48 finalized = active - 1; // words land at LR_INDEX-1 (the just-finalized index)
  1581	        uint48 idx = boxCursorIndex == 0 ? 1 : boxCursorIndex; // the open frontier
  1582	        if (idx > finalized) return false; // swept up to the un-finalized active index
  1583	        if (lootboxRngWordByIndex[idx] == 0) return false; // frontier index not yet worded
  1584	        uint256 effectiveCursor = boxCursorIndex == idx ? boxCursor : 0;
  1585	        return boxPlayers[idx].length > effectiveCursor;
  1586	    }
  1587	
  1588	    /// @notice True once the permissionless sweep has fully distributed every box at `index`
  1589	    ///         (the monotonic open frontier boxCursorIndex has advanced past it). The active /
  1590	    ///         finalizing index is not yet complete; indices below the frontier are drained.
  1591	    /// @param index Lootbox RNG index to query.
  1592	    function boxIndexComplete(uint48 index) external view returns (bool) {
  1593	        return index < boxCursorIndex;
  1594	    }

  1227	    /// @dev Daily RNG processing gate called during advanceGame. Applies VRF word,
  1228	    ///      processes coinflip payouts, rolls daily quest, resolves pending gambling
  1229	    ///      burn redemptions, stores lootbox RNG, and handles VRF timeout retries (12h).
  1230	    function rngGate(
  1231	        uint48 ts,
  1232	        uint24 day,
  1233	        uint24 lvl,
  1234	        bool isTicketJackpotDay,
  1235	        uint8 coinflipBonus
  1236	    ) internal returns (uint256 word, uint32 gapDays) {
  1237	        // Already recorded for today
  1238	        uint256 recordedWord = rngWordByDay[day];
  1239	        if (recordedWord != 0) return (recordedWord, 0);
  1240	
  1241	        uint256 currentWord = rngWordCurrent;
  1242	
  1243	        // Have a fresh VRF word ready
  1244	        if (currentWord != 0 && rngRequestTime != 0) {
  1245	            // Backfill gap days from VRF stall before processing current day.
  1246	            // Gated on rngWordByDay[idx + 1] == 0 so the backfill runs at
  1247	            // most once per lock window: dailyIdx is only updated by
  1248	            // _unlockRng, so a multi-day drain would otherwise re-enter
  1249	            // this branch on each new wall-clock day and re-process the
  1250	            // same gap range, doubling purchaseStartDay and re-running
  1251	            // coinflip payouts for already-resolved days.
  1252	            uint24 idx = dailyIdx;
  1253	            if (day > idx + 1 && rngWordByDay[idx + 1] == 0) {
  1254	                uint24 gapCount = day - idx - 1;
  1255	                _backfillGapDays(currentWord, idx + 1, day);
  1256	
  1257	                // Backfill any lootbox indices that never got a VRF word (orphaned by stall).
  1258	                // Uses fresh VRF entropy, not predictable on-chain state.
  1259	                _backfillOrphanedLootboxIndices(currentWord);
  1260	
  1261	                // Extend death clock by the stall duration -- gap days don't count toward
  1262	                // the 120-day inactivity timeout since the game was stalled, not abandoned.
  1263	                purchaseStartDay += gapCount;
  1264	                gapDays = gapCount;
  1265	            }
  1266	
  1267	            // Normal daily RNG processing (request from current day)
  1268	            currentWord = _applyDailyRng(day, currentWord);
  1269	            coinflip.processCoinflipPayouts(coinflipBonus, currentWord, day);
  1270	            // Force the MINT_FLIP daily on the first jackpot day (lastPurchaseDay still set here,
  1271	            // jackpot not yet entered) so the FLIP-mint quest only lands when the redeem window is
  1272	            // live. Turbo (compressedJackpotFlag == 2) is skipped — its jackpot collapses at this
  1273	            // request, leaving no full open day for that quest.
  1274	            // Force the buy-a-foil-pack daily on the first purchase day of a level:
  1275	            // phaseTransitionActive is set at level end (_endPhase) and cleared only once
  1276	            // the transition completes (line 440), and this roll runs before that completion
  1277	            // in the same advance — so it is true exactly on the day the new purchase phase
  1278	            // opens. Gated on gapDays == 0 so a VRF-stall backfill (which defers the whole
  1279	            // transition to the next advance, line 412) does not roll the foil quest early.
  1280	            // Mutually exclusive with the first-jackpot-day MINT_FLIP force (opposite cycle ends).
  1281	            quests.rollDailyQuest(
  1282	                day,
  1283	                currentWord,
  1284	                lastPurchaseDay && compressedJackpotFlag != 2,
  1285	                phaseTransitionActive && gapDays == 0
  1286	            );
  1287	
  1288	            // Resolve the sentinel-stamped gambling-burn pool if any. Reading the
  1289	            // sentinel rather than deriving `day - 1` makes multi-day RNG stalls correct by
  1290	            // construction: the sentinel always names the (at most one) unresolved day, so a
  1291	            // single resolve call after the stall recovers covers the stuck pool exactly.
  1292	            {
  1293	                IsDGNRS sdgnrs = IsDGNRS(
  1294	                    ContractAddresses.SDGNRS
  1295	                );
  1296	                uint24 toResolve = sdgnrs.pendingResolveDay();
  1297	                if (toResolve != 0) {
  1298	                    uint16 redemptionRoll = uint16(
  1299	                        ((currentWord >> 8) % 151) + 25
  1300	                    );
  1301	                    sdgnrs.resolveRedemptionPeriod(redemptionRoll, toResolve);
  1302	                }
  1303	            }
  1304	
  1305	            _finalizeLootboxRng(currentWord);
  1306	            return (currentWord, gapDays);
  1307	        }
  1308	
  1309	        // Waiting for VRF - check for timeout retry. A daily request (rngLockedFlag) gets the
  1310	        // 12h VRF retry; a lootbox-only mid-day request (rngLockedFlag == false) that bled past
  1311	        // the day boundary is abandoned after MIDDAY_RNG_STALL_TIMEOUT and promoted to this day's
  1312	        // daily request — _requestRng's isRetry path keeps the reserved index, so the fresh daily
  1313	        // word finalizes that bucket just as the mid-day word would have.
  1314	        if (rngRequestTime != 0) {
  1315	            uint48 elapsed = ts - rngRequestTime;
  1316	            uint48 timeout = rngLockedFlag ? 12 hours : MIDDAY_RNG_STALL_TIMEOUT;
  1317	            if (elapsed >= timeout) {
  1318	                _requestRng(isTicketJackpotDay, lvl);
  1319	                return (1, 0);
  1320	            }
  1321	            revert RngNotReady();
  1322	        }
  1323	
  1324	        // Need fresh RNG
  1325	        _requestRng(isTicketJackpotDay, lvl);
  1326	        return (1, 0);
  1327	    }
  1328	
  1329	    function _finalizeLootboxRng(uint256 rngWord) private {
  1330	        uint48 index = uint48(_lrRead(LR_INDEX_SHIFT, LR_INDEX_MASK)) - 1;
  1331	        if (lootboxRngWordByIndex[index] != 0) return;
  1332	        lootboxRngWordByIndex[index] = rngWord;
  1333	        emit LootboxRngApplied(index, rngWord, vrfRequestId);
  1334	    }
  1335
